16  package com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope;

18  import com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix;
19  import com.irurueta.algebra.WrongSizeException;
20  import com.irurueta.geometry.AxisRotation3D;
21  import com.irurueta.geometry.InvalidRotationMatrixException;
22  import com.irurueta.geometry.Rotation3D;
23  import com.irurueta.geometry.RotationException;
24  import com.irurueta.navigation.LockedException;
25  import com.irurueta.navigation.NotReadyException;
26  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.CoordinateTransformation;
27  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.ECEFFrame;
28  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.FrameType;
29  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException;
30  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.NEDFrame;
31  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.converters.NEDtoECEFFrameConverter;
32  import com.irurueta.navigation.frames.converters.NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter;
33  import com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.Constants;
34  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.BodyKinematics;
35  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.ECEFPosition;
36  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.ECEFVelocity;
37  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.NEDPosition;
38  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.NEDVelocity;
39  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.AngularSpeedTriad;
40  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.BodyKinematicsGenerator;
41  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.CalibrationException;
42  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.IMUErrors;
43  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.StandardDeviationBodyKinematics;
44  import com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators.ECEFKinematicsEstimator;
45  import com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod;
46  import com.irurueta.statistics.GaussianRandomizer;
47  import com.irurueta.statistics.UniformRandomizer;
48  import com.irurueta.units.Acceleration;
49  import com.irurueta.units.AccelerationUnit;

62  import static org.junit.Assert.*;
63  
64  public class PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibratorTest implements
65          RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibratorListener {
66  
67      private static final double TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 0.02;
68  
69      private static final double MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED = 9.80665E-6;
70      private static final double DEG_TO_RAD = 0.01745329252;
71  
72      private static final double MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES = -180.0;
73      private static final double MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES = 180.0;
74  
75      private static final double MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES = -90.0;
76      private static final double MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs = 90.0;
77      private static final double MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES = -180.0;
78      private static final double MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES = 180.0;
79      private static final double MIN_HEIGHT = -50.0;
80      private static final double MAX_HEIGHT = 50.0;
81  
82      private static final double MIN_ROTATION_RATE_DEGREES_PER_SECOND = 90.0;
83      private static final double MAX_ROTATION_RATE_DEGREES_PER_SECOND = 180.0;
84  
85      private static final double MIN_TIME_INTERVAL = 0.01;
86      private static final double MAX_TIME_INTERVAL = 0.1;
87  
88      private static final int MEASUREMENT_NUMBER = 1000;
89  
90      private static final int OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE = 5;
91  
92      private static final double THRESHOLD = 2e-1;
93      private static final double LARGE_THRESHOLD = 5e-1;
94  
95      private static final double ABSOLUTE_ERROR = 1e-9;
96      private static final double LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR = 5e-5;
97      private static final double VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR = 1e-2;
98  
99      private static final double OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR = 1000.0;
100 
101     private static final int TIMES = 100;
102 
103     private int mCalibrateStart;
104     private int mCalibrateEnd;
105     private int mCalibrateNextIteration;
106     private int mCalibrateProgressChange;
107 
108     @Test
109     public void testConstructor1() throws WrongSizeException {
110         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
111                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
112 
113         // check default values
114         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
115                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
116         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
117         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
118                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
119         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
120                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
121         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
122         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
123         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
124         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
125         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
126         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
127         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
128         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
129                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
130         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
131         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
132         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
133         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
134         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
135         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
136                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
137         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
138         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
139         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
140         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
141         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
142         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
143                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
144         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
145         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
146         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
147         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
148         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
149         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
150         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
151         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
152         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
153         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
154         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
155         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
156         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
157         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
158         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
159         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
160         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
161         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
162         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
163         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
164         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
165         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
166         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
167         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
168         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
169         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
170         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
171         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
172         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
173         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
174         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
175         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
176                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
177         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
178         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
179         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
180         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
181         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
182         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
183                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
184         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
185         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
186         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
187         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
188         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
189         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
190                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
191         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
192         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
193         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
194         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), 0.0, 0.0);
195         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), 0.0, 0.0);
196         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
197         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
198         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
199         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
200         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
201         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
202         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
203         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
204         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
205         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
206         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
207         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
208         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
209         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
210         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
211         assertArrayEquals(bias1, new double[3], 0.0);
212         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
213         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
214         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
215         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
216         assertEquals(bg1, new Matrix(3, 1));
217         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
218         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
219         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
220         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
221         assertEquals(mg1, new Matrix(3, 3));
222         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
223         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
224         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
225         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
226         assertEquals(gg1, new Matrix(3, 3));
227         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
228         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
229         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
230         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(),
231                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
232         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
233                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
234         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
235                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
236         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
237                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
238         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
239                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
240         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
241         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
242         Assert.assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(),
243                 TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_TIME_INTERVAL,
244                 0.0);
245         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
246         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(),
247                 TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_TIME_INTERVAL,
248                 0.0);
249         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
250         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
251         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
252         assertEquals(time1, time2);
253         assertNull(calibrator.getMeasurements());
254         assertNull(calibrator.getEcefPosition());
255         assertNull(calibrator.getNedPosition());
256         assertFalse(calibrator.getNedPosition(null));
257         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
258         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
259         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
260         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
261         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
262         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
263         Assert.assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
264                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
265         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
266                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
267         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
268                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
269         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
270         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
271         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
272         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
273         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
275         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
276         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
277         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
278         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
280         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
281         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
282         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
284         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
285         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
286         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
288         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
289         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
290         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
291         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
292         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
293         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
294         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
295         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
296         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
297         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
298         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
299         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
300                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
301         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
302         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
303         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
304         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
305         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
306         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
307         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
308         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
309         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
310         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
311         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
312         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
313         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
314         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
315         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
316         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
317         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
318         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
319         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
320         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
321         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
322     }
323 
324     @Test
325     public void testConstructor2() throws WrongSizeException {
326         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
327         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
328                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
329         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
330                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
331         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
332         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
333         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
334         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
335         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
336         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
337                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
338 
339         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
340         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
341                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
342         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
343                 Collections.emptyList();
344         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
345         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
346         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
347 
348         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
349         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
350         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
351         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
352 
353         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
354         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
355         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
356         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
357         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
358         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
359         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
360         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
361         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
362 
363         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
364                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
365                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
366 
367         // check default values
368         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
369                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
370         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
371         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
372                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
373         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
374                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
375         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
376         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
377         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
378         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
379         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
380         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
381         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
382         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
383                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
384         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
385         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
386         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
387         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
388         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
389         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
390                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
391         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
392         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
393         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
394         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
395         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
396         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
397                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
398         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
399         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
400         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
401         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
402         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
403         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
404         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
405         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
406         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
407         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
408         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
409         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
410         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
411         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
412         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
413         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
414         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
415         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
416         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
417         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
418         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
419         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
420         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
421         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
422         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
423         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
424         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
425         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
426         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
427         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
428         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
429         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
430                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
431         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
432         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
433         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
434         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
435         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
436         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
437                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
438         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
439         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
440         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
441         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
442         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
443         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
444                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
445         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
446         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
447         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
448         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
449         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
450         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
451         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
452         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
453         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
454         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
455         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
456         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
457         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
458         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
459         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
460         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
461         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
462         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
463         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
464         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
465         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
466         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
467         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
468         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
469         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
470         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
471         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
472         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
473         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
474         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
475         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
476         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
477         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
478         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
479         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
480         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
481         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
482         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
483         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
484         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
485                 0.0);
486         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
487                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
488         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
489                 rotationRate, 0.0);
490         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
491                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
492         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
493                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
494         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
495         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
496         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
497         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
498         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
499                 0.0);
500         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
501         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
502         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
503         assertEquals(time1, time2);
504         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
505         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
506         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
507         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
508         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
509         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
510         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
511         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
512         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
513         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
514         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
515         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
516         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
517                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
518         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
519                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
520         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
521                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
522         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
523         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
524         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
526         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
527         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
528         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
529         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
531         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
533         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
534         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
535         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
536         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
537         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
538         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
539         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
540         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
541         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
542         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
543         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
544         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
545         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
546         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
547         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
548         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
549         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
550         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
551         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
552         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
553                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
554         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
555         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
556         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
557         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
558         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
559         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
560         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
561         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
562         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
563         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
564         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
565         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
566         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
567         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
568         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
569         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
570         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
571         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
572         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
573         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
574         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
575 
576         // Force IllegalArgumentException
577         calibrator = null;
578         try {
579             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
580                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
581                     bg, mg, gg);
582             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
583         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
584         }
585         try {
586             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
587                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
588             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
589         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
590         }
591         try {
592             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
593                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
594                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
595             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
596         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
597         }
598         try {
599             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
600                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
601                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
602             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
603         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
604         }
605         try {
606             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
607                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
608                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
609             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
610         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
611         }
612         try {
613             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
614                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
615                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
616             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
617         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
618         }
619         try {
620             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
621                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
622                     new Matrix(1, 3));
623             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
624         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
625         }
626         try {
627             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
628                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
629                     new Matrix(3, 1));
630             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
631         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
632         }
633         assertNull(calibrator);
634     }
635 
636     @Test
637     public void testConstructor3() throws WrongSizeException {
638         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
639         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
640                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
641         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
642                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
643         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
644         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
645         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
646         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
647         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
648         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
649                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
650 
651         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
652         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
653                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
654         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
655                 Collections.emptyList();
656         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
657         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
658         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
659 
660         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
661         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
662         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
663         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
664 
665         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
666         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
667         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
668         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
669         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
670         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
671         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
672         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
673         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
674 
675         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
676                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
677                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
678                         bg, mg, gg, this);
679 
680         // check default values
681         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
682                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
683         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
684         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
685                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
686         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
687                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
688         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
689         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
690         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
691         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
692         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
693         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
694         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
695         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
696                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
697         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
698         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
699         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
700         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
701         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
702         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
703                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
704         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
705         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
706         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
707         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
708         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
709         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
710                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
711         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
712         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
713         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
714         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
715         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
716         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
717         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
718         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
719         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
720         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
721         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
722         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
723         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
724         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
725         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
726         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
727         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
728         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
729         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
730         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
731         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
732         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
733         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
734         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
735         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
736         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
737         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
738         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
739         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
740         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
741         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
742         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
743                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
744         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
745         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
746         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
747         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
748         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
749         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
750                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
751         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
752         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
753         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
754         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
755         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
756         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
757                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
758         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
759         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
760         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
761         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
762         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
763         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
764         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
765         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
766         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
767         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
768         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
769         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
770         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
771         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
772         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
773         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
774         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
775         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
776         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
777         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
778         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
779         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
780         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
781         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
782         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
783         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
784         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
785         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
786         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
787         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
788         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
789         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
790         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
791         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
792         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
793         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
794         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
795         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
796         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
797         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
798                 0.0);
799         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
800                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
801         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
802                 rotationRate, 0.0);
803         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
804                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
805         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
806                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
807         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
808         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
809         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
810         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
811         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
812                 0.0);
813         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
814         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
815         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
816         assertEquals(time1, time2);
817         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
818         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
819         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
820         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
821         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
822         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
823         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
824         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
825         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
826         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
827         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
828         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
829         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
830                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
831         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
832                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
833         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
834                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
835         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
836         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
837         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
838         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
839         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
840         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
841         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
842         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
843         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
844         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
845         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
846         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
847         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
848         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
849         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
850         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
851         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
852         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
853         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
854         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
855         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
856         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
857         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
858         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
859         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
860         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
861         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
862         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
863         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
864         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
865         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
866                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
868         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
870         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
871         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
872         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
873         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
874         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
875         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
877         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
878         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
879         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
880         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
881         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
882         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
883         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
884         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
885         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
886         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
887         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
888 
889         // Force IllegalArgumentException
890         calibrator = null;
891         try {
892             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
893                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
894                     bg, mg, gg, this);
895             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
896         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
897         }
898         try {
899             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
900                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
901                     this);
902             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
903         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
904         }
905         try {
906             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
907                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
908                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg,
909                     this);
910             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
911         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
912         }
913         try {
914             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
915                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
916                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg,
917                     this);
918             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
919         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
920         }
921         try {
922             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
923                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
924                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg,
925                     this);
926             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
927         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
928         }
929         try {
930             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
931                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
932                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg,
933                     this);
934             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
935         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
936         }
937         try {
938             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
939                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
940                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
941             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
942         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
943         }
944         try {
945             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
946                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
947                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
948             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
949         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
950         }
951         assertNull(calibrator);
952     }
953 
954     @Test
955     public void testConstructor4() throws WrongSizeException {
956         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
957         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
958                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
959         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
960                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
961         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
962         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
963         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
964         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
965         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
966         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
967                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
968 
969         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
970         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
971                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
972         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
973                 Collections.emptyList();
974         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
975         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
976         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
977 
978         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
979         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
980         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
981         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
982 
983         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
984         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
985         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
986         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
987         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
988         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
989         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
990         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
991         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
992 
993         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
994                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
995                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
996                         bias, mg, gg);
997 
998         // check default values
999         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
1000                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
1001         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
1002         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
1003                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
1004         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
1005                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
1006         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
1007         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
1008         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
1009         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
1010         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
1011         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1012         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1013         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
1014                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1015         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
1016         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
1017         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
1018         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1019         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1020         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
1021                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1022         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
1023         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
1024         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
1025         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1026         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1027         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
1028                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1029         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
1030         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
1031         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
1032         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
1033         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
1034         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
1035         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
1036         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
1037         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
1038         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1039         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
1040         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1041         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1042         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1043         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1044         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1045         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1046         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1047         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1048         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1049         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
1050         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
1051         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1052         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
1053         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
1054         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
1055         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
1056         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1057         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
1058         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
1059         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1060         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
1061                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1062         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
1063         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
1064         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
1065         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
1066         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1067         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
1068                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1069         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
1070         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
1071         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
1072         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
1073         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1074         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
1075                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1076         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
1077         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
1078         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
1079         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
1080         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
1081         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1082         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1083         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
1084         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
1085         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
1086         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
1087         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
1088         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
1089         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
1090         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
1091         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
1092         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
1093         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
1094         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
1095         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
1096         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
1097         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
1098         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
1099         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
1100         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
1101         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
1102         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1103         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
1104         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
1105         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
1106         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
1107         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1108         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
1109         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
1110         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
1111         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
1112         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1113         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
1114         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
1115         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
1116                 0.0);
1117         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
1118                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
1119         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
1120                 rotationRate, 0.0);
1121         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
1122                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1123         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
1124                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1125         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
1126         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
1127         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
1128         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
1129         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
1130                 0.0);
1131         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
1132         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
1133         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
1134         assertEquals(time1, time2);
1135         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
1136         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
1137         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1138         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
1139         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
1140         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1141         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
1142         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
1143         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
1144         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
1145         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
1146         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
1147         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
1148                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
1149         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
1150                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
1151         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
1152                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
1153         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
1154         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
1155         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
1156         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
1157         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
1158         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
1159         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
1160         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
1161         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
1162         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
1163         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
1164         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
1165         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
1166         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
1167         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
1168         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
1169         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
1170         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
1171         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
1172         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
1173         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
1174         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
1175         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
1176         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
1177         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
1178         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
1179         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
1180         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
1181         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
1182         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
1183         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
1184                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
1185         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
1186         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
1187         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1188         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1189         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
1190         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
1191         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1192         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1193         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
1194         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
1195         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1196         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1197         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
1198         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
1199         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
1200         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
1201         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
1202         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
1203         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
1204         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
1205         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
1206 
1207         // Force IllegalArgumentException
1208         calibrator = null;
1209         try {
1210             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1211                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
1212                     bias, mg, gg);
1213             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1214         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1215         }
1216         try {
1217             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1218                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg);
1219             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1220         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1221         }
1222         try {
1223             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1224                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
1225                     new double[1], mg, gg);
1226             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1227         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1228         }
1229         try {
1230             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1231                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1232                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
1233             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1234         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1235         }
1236         try {
1237             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1238                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1239                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
1240             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1241         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1242         }
1243         try {
1244             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1245                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1246                     new Matrix(1, 3));
1247             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1248         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1249         }
1250         try {
1251             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1252                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1253                     new Matrix(3, 1));
1254             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1255         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1256         }
1257         assertNull(calibrator);
1258     }
1259 
1260     @Test
1261     public void testConstructor5() throws WrongSizeException {
1262         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
1263         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
1264                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
1265         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
1266                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
1267         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
1268         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
1269         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
1270         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
1271         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
1272         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
1273                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
1274 
1275         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
1276         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
1277                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
1278         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
1279                 Collections.emptyList();
1280         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
1281         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
1282         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
1283 
1284         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
1285         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
1286         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
1287         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
1288 
1289         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
1290         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
1291         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
1292         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
1293         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
1294         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
1295         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
1296         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
1297         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
1298 
1299         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
1300                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1301                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
1302                         bias, mg, gg, this);
1303 
1304         // check default values
1305         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
1306                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
1307         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
1308         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
1309                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
1310         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
1311                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
1312         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
1313         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
1314         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
1315         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
1316         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
1317         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1318         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1319         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
1320                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1321         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
1322         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
1323         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
1324         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1325         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1326         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
1327                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1328         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
