1329         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
1330         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
1331         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
1332         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1333         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
1334                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1335         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
1336         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
1337         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
1338         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
1339         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
1340         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
1341         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
1342         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
1343         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
1344         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1345         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
1346         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1347         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1348         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1349         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1350         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1351         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1352         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
1353         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
1354         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
1355         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
1356         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
1357         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1358         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
1359         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
1360         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
1361         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
1362         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1363         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
1364         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
1365         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1366         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
1367                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1368         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
1369         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
1370         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
1371         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
1372         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1373         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
1374                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1375         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
1376         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
1377         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
1378         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
1379         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1380         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
1381                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1382         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
1383         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
1384         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
1385         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
1386         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
1387         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1388         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1389         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
1390         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
1391         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
1392         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
1393         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
1394         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
1395         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
1396         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
1397         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
1398         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
1399         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
1400         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
1401         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
1402         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
1403         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
1404         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
1405         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
1406         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
1407         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
1408         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1409         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
1410         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
1411         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
1412         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
1413         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1414         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
1415         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
1416         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
1417         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
1418         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1419         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
1420         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
1421         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
1422                 0.0);
1423         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
1424                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
1425         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
1426                 rotationRate, 0.0);
1427         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
1428                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1429         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
1430                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1431         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
1432         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
1433         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
1434         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
1435         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
1436                 0.0);
1437         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
1438         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
1439         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
1440         assertEquals(time1, time2);
1441         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
1442         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
1443         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1444         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
1445         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
1446         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1447         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
1448         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
1449         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
1450         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
1451         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
1452         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
1453         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
1454                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
1455         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
1456                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
1457         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
1458                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
1459         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
1460         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
1461         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
1462         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
1463         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
1464         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
1465         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
1466         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
1467         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
1468         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
1469         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
1470         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
1471         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
1472         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
1473         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
1474         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
1475         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
1476         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
1477         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
1478         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
1479         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
1480         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
1481         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
1482         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
1483         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
1484         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
1485         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
1486         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
1487         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
1488         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
1489         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
1490                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
1491         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
1492         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
1493         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1494         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1495         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
1496         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
1497         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1498         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1499         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
1500         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
1501         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1502         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1503         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
1504         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
1505         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
1506         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
1507         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
1508         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
1509         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
1510         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
1511         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
1512 
1513         // Force IllegalArgumentException
1514         calibrator = null;
1515         try {
1516             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1517                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
1518                     bias, mg, gg, this);
1519             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1520         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1521         }
1522         try {
1523             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1524                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1525                     this);
1526             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1527         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1528         }
1529         try {
1530             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1531                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
1532                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
1533             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1534         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1535         }
1536         try {
1537             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1538                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1539                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
1540             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1541         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1542         }
1543         try {
1544             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1545                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1546                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
1547             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1548         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1549         }
1550         try {
1551             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1552                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1553                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
1554             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1555         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1556         }
1557         try {
1558             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1559                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1560                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
1561             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1562         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1563         }
1564         assertNull(calibrator);
1565     }
1566 
1567     @Test
1568     public void testConstructor6() throws WrongSizeException {
1569         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
1570         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
1571                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
1572         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
1573                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
1574         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
1575         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
1576         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
1577         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
1578         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
1579         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
1580                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
1581 
1582         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
1583         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
1584                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
1585         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
1586                 Collections.emptyList();
1587         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
1588         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
1589         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
1590 
1591         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
1592         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
1593         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
1594         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
1595 
1596         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
1597         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
1598         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
1599         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
1600         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
1601         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
1602         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
1603         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
1604         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
1605 
1606         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
1607         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
1608         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
1609 
1610         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
1611         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
1612         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
1613 
1614         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
1615         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
1616         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
1617         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
1618         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
1619         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
1620         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
1621         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
1622         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
1623 
1624         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
1625                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
1626                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1627                         accelerometerBias, ma);
1628 
1629         // check default values
1630         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
1631                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
1632         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
1633         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
1634                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
1635         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
1636                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
1637         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
1638         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
1639         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
1640         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
1641         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
1642         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
1643         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1644         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
1645                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1646         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
1647         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
1648         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
1649         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
1650         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1651         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
1652                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1653         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
1654         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
1655         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
1656         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
1657         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1658         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
1659                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1660         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
1661         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
1662         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
1663         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
1664         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
1665         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
1666         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
1667         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
1668         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
1669         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1670         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
1671         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
1672         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
1673         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
1674         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
1675         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
1676         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
1677         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
1678         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
1679         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
1680         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
1681         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
1682         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1683         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
1684         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
1685         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
1686         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
1687         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1688         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
1689         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
1690         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1691         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
1692                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1693         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
1694         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
1695         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
1696         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
1697         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1698         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
1699                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1700         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
1701         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
1702         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
1703         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
1704         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1705         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
1706                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1707         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
1708         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
1709         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
1710         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
1711         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
1712         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
1713         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1714         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
1715         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
1716         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
1717         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
1718         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
1719         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
1720         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
1721         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
1722         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
1723         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
1724         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
1725         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
1726         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
1727         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
1728         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
1729         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
1730         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
1731         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
1732         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
1733         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
1734         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
1735         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
1736         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
1737         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
1738         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1739         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
1740         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
1741         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
1742         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
1743         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
1744         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
1745         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
1746         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
1747                 0.0);
1748         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
1749                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
1750         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
1751                 rotationRate, 0.0);
1752         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
1753                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
1754         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
1755                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
1756         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
1757         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
1758         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
1759         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
1760         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
1761                 0.0);
1762         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
1763         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
1764         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
1765         assertEquals(time1, time2);
1766         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
1767         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
1768         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1769         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
1770         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
1771         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
1772         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
1773         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
1774         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
1775         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
1776         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
1777         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
1778         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
1779                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
1780         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
1781                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
1782         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
1783                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
1784         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
1785         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
1786         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
1787         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
1788         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
1789         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
1790         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
1791         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
1792         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
1793         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
1794         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
1795         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
1796         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
1797         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
1798         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
1799         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
1800         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
1801         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
1802         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
1803         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
1804         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
1805         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
1806         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
1807         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
1808         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
1809         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
1810         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
1811         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
1812         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
1813         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
1814         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
1815                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
1816         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
1817         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
1818         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1819         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1820         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
1821         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
1822         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1823         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1824         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
1825         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
1826         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
1827         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
1828         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
1829         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
1830         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
1831         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
1832         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
1833         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
1834         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
1835         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
1836         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
1837 
1838         // Force IllegalArgumentException
1839         calibrator = null;
1840         try {
1841             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1842                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
1843                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
1844             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1845         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1846         }
1847         try {
1848             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1849                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1850                     accelerometerBias, ma);
1851             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1852         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1853         }
1854         try {
1855             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1856                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
1857                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
1858             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1859         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1860         }
1861         try {
1862             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1863                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1864                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
1865                     ma);
1866             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1867         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1868         }
1869         try {
1870             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1871                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1872                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
1873                     ma);
1874             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1875         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1876         }
1877         try {
1878             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1879                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1880                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
1881                     ma);
1882             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1883         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1884         }
1885         try {
1886             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1887                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
1888                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
1889                     ma);
1890             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1891         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1892         }
1893         try {
1894             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1895                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
1896                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
1897             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1898         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1899         }
1900         try {
1901             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1902                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1903                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3));
1904             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1905         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1906         }
1907         try {
1908             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
1909                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1910                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1));
1911             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
1912         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
1913         }
1914         assertNull(calibrator);
1915     }
1916 
1917     @Test
1918     public void testConstructor7() throws WrongSizeException {
1919         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
1920         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
1921                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
1922         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
1923                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
1924         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
1925         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
1926         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
1927         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
1928         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
1929         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
1930                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
1931 
1932         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
1933         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
1934                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
1935         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
1936                 Collections.emptyList();
1937         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
1938         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
1939         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
1940 
1941         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
1942         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
1943         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
1944         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
1945 
1946         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
1947         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
1948         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
1949         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
1950         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
1951         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
1952         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
1953         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
1954         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
1955 
1956         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
1957         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
1958         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
1959 
1960         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
1961         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
1962         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
1963 
1964         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
1965         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
1966         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
1967         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
1968         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
1969         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
1970         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
1971         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
1972         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
1973 
1974         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
1975                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
1976                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
1977                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
1978 
1979         // check default values
1980         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
1981                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
1982         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
1983         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
1984                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
1985         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
1986                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
1987         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
1988         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
1989         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
1990         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
1991         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
1992         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
1993         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1994         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
1995                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
1996         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
1997         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
1998         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
1999         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
2000         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2001         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
2002                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2003         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
2004         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
2005         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
2006         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
2007         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2008         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
2009                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2010         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
2011         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
2012         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
2013         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
2014         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
2015         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
2016         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
2017         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
2018         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
2019         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2020         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
2021         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
2022         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
2023         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
2024         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
2025         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
2026         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
2027         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
2028         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
2029         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
2030         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
2031         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
2032         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2033         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
2034         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
2035         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
2036         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
2037         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2038         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
2039         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
2040         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2041         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
2042                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2043         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
2044         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
2045         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
2046         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
2047         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2048         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
2049                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2050         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
2051         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
2052         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
2053         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
2054         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2055         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
2056                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2057         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
2058         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
2059         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
2060         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
2061         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
2062         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2063         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2064         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
2065         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
2066         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
2067         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
2068         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
2069         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
2070         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
2071         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
2072         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
2073         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
2074         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
2075         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
2076         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
2077         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
2078         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
2079         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
2080         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
2081         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
2082         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
2083         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2084         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
2085         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
2086         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
2087         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
2088         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2089         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
2090         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
2091         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
2092         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
2093         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2094         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
2095         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
2096         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
2097                 0.0);
2098         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
2099                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
2100         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
2101                 rotationRate, 0.0);
2102         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
2103                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2104         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
2105                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2106         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
2107         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
2108         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
2109         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
2110         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
2111                 0.0);
2112         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
2113         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
2114         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
2115         assertEquals(time1, time2);
2116         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
2117         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
2118         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2119         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
2120         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
2121         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2122         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
2123         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
2124         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
2125         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
2126         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
2127         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
2128         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
2129                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
2130         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
2131                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
2132         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
2133                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
2134         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
2135         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
2136         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
2137         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
2138         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
2139         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
2140         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
2141         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
2142         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
2143         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
2144         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
2145         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
2146         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
2147         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
2148         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
2149         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
2150         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
2151         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
2152         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
2153         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
2154         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
2155         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
2156         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
2157         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
2158         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
2159         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
2160         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
2161         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
2162         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
2163         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
2164         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
2165                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
2166         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
2167         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
2168         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2169         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2170         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
2171         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
2172         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2173         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2174         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
2175         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
2176         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2177         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2178         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
2179         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
2180         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
2181         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
2182         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
2183         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
2184         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
2185         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
2186         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
2187 
2188         // Force IllegalArgumentException
2189         calibrator = null;

2194             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2195         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

2267     @Test
2268     public void testConstructor8() throws WrongSizeException {
2269         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
2270         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
2271                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
2272         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
2273                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
2274         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
2275         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
2276         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
2277         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
2278         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
2279         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
2280                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
2281 
2282         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
2283         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
2284                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
2285         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
2286                 Collections.emptyList();
2287         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
2288         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
2289         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
2290 
2291         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
2292         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
2293         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
2294         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
2295 
2296         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
2297         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
2298         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
2299         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
2300         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
2301         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
2302         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
2303         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
2304         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
2305 
2306         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
2307         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
2308         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
2309 
2310         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
2311         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
2312         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
2313 
2314         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
2315         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
2316         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
2317         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
2318         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
2319         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
2320         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
2321         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
2322         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
2323 
2324         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
2325                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
2326                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2327                         ba, ma);
2328 
2329         // check default values
2330         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
2331                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
2332         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
2333         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
2334                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
2335         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
2336                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
2337         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
2338         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
2339         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
2340         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
2341         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
2342         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
2343         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2344         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
2345                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2346         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
2347         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
2348         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
2349         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
2350         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2351         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
2352                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2353         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
2354         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
2355         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
2356         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
2357         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2358         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
2359                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2360         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
2361         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
2362         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
2363         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
2364         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
2365         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
2366         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
2367         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
2368         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
2369         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2370         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
2371         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
2372         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
2373         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
2374         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
2375         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
2376         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
2377         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
2378         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
2379         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
2380         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
2381         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
2382         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2383         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
2384         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
2385         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
2386         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
2387         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2388         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
2389         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
2390         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2391         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
2392                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2393         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
2394         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
2395         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
2396         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
2397         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2398         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
2399                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2400         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
2401         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
2402         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
2403         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
2404         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2405         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
2406                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2407         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
2408         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
2409         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
2410         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
2411         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
2412         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2413         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2414         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
2415         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
2416         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
2417         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
2418         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
2419         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
2420         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
2421         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
2422         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
2423         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
2424         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
2425         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
2426         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
2427         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
2428         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
2429         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
2430         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
2431         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
2432         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
2433         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2434         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
2435         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
2436         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
2437         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
2438         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2439         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
2440         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
2441         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
2442         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
2443         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2444         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
2445         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
2446         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
2447                 0.0);
2448         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
2449                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
2450         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
2451                 rotationRate, 0.0);
2452         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
2453                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2454         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
2455                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2456         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
2457         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
2458         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
2459         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
2460         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
2461                 0.0);
2462         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
2463         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
2464         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
2465         assertEquals(time1, time2);
2466         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
2467         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
2468         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2469         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
2470         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
2471         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2472         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
2473         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
2474         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
2475         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
2476         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
2477         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
2478         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
2479                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
2480         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
2481                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
2482         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
2483                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
2484         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
2485         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
2486         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
2487         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
2488         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
2489         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
2490         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
2491         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
2492         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
2493         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
2494         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
2495         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
2496         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
2497         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
2498         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
2499         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
2500         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
2501         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
2502         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
2503         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
2504         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
2505         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
2506         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
2507         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
2508         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
2509         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
2510         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
2511         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
2512         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
2513         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
2514         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
2515                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
2516         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
2517         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
2518         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2519         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2520         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
2521         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
2522         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2523         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
2525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
2526         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2527         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2528         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
2529         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
2530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
2531         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
2532         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
2533         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
2534         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
2535         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
2536         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
2537 
2538         // Force IllegalArgumentException
2539         calibrator = null;
2540         try {
2541             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2542                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
