2545         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2546         }
2547         try {
2548             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2549                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2550                     ba, ma);
2551             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2552         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2553         }
2554         try {
2555             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2556                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
2557                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
2558             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2559         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2560         }
2561         try {
2562             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2563                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
2564                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
2565             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2566         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2567         }
2568         try {
2569             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2570                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2571                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
2572             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2573         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2574         }
2575         try {
2576             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2577                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2578                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
2579             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2580         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2581         }
2582         try {
2583             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2584                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
2585                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
2586             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2587         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2588         }
2589         try {
2590             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2591                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
2592                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
2593             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2594         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2595         }
2596         try {
2597             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2598                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2599                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
2600             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2601         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2602         }
2603         try {
2604             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2605                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2606                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
2607             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2608         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2609         }
2610         try {
2611             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2612                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2613                     ba, new Matrix(1, 3));
2614             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2615         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2616         }
2617         try {
2618             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2619                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2620                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1));
2621             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2622         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2623         }
2624         assertNull(calibrator);
2625     }
2626 
2627     @Test
2628     public void testConstructor9() throws WrongSizeException {
2629         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
2630         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
2631                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
2632         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
2633                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
2634         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
2635         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
2636         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
2637         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
2638         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
2639         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
2640                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
2641 
2642         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
2643         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
2644                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
2645         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
2646                 Collections.emptyList();
2647         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
2648         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
2649         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
2650 
2651         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
2652         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
2653         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
2654         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
2655 
2656         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
2657         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
2658         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
2659         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
2660         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
2661         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
2662         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
2663         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
2664         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
2665 
2666         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
2667         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
2668         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
2669 
2670         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
2671         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
2672         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
2673 
2674         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
2675         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
2676         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
2677         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
2678         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
2679         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
2680         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
2681         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
2682         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
2683 
2684         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
2685                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
2686                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg, ba, ma,
2687                         this);
2688 
2689         // check default values
2690         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
2691                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
2692         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
2693         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
2694                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
2695         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
2696                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
2697         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
2698         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
2699         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
2700         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
2701         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
2702         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
2703         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2704         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
2705                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2706         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
2707         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
2708         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
2709         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
2710         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2711         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
2712                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2713         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
2714         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
2715         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
2716         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
2717         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2718         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
2719                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
2720         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
2721         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
2722         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
2723         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
2724         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
2725         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
2726         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
2727         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
2728         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
2729         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2730         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
2731         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
2732         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
2733         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
2734         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
2735         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
2736         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
2737         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
2738         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
2739         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
2740         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
2741         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
2742         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2743         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
2744         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
2745         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
2746         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
2747         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2748         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
2749         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
2750         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2751         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
2752                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2753         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
2754         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
2755         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
2756         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
2757         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2758         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
2759                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2760         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
2761         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
2762         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
2763         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
2764         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2765         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
2766                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2767         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
2768         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
2769         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
2770         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
2771         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
2772         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
2773         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2774         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
2775         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
2776         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
2777         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
2778         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
2779         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
2780         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
2781         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
2782         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
2783         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
2784         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
2785         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
2786         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
2787         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
2788         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
2789         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
2790         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
2791         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
2792         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
2793         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
2794         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
2795         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
2796         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
2797         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
2798         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2799         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
2800         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
2801         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
2802         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
2803         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
2804         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
2805         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
2806         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
2807                 0.0);
2808         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
2809                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
2810         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
2811                 rotationRate, 0.0);
2812         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
2813                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
2814         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
2815                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
2816         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
2817         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
2818         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
2819         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
2820         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
2821                 0.0);
2822         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
2823         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
2824         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
2825         assertEquals(time1, time2);
2826         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
2827         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
2828         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2829         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
2830         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
2831         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
2832         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
2833         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
2834         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
2835         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
2836         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
2837         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
2838         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
2839                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
2840         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
2841                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
2842         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
2843                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
2844         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
2845         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
2846         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
2847         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
2848         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
2849         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
2850         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
2851         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
2852         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
2853         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
2854         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
2855         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
2856         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
2857         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
2858         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
2859         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
2860         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
2861         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
2862         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
2863         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
2864         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
2865         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
2866         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
2867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
2868         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
2869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
2870         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
2871         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
2872         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
2873         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
2874         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
2875                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
2876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
2877         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
2878         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2879         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2880         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
2881         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
2882         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2883         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2884         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
2885         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
2886         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
2887         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
2888         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
2889         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
2890         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
2891         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
2892         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
2893         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
2894         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
2895         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
2896         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
2897 
2898         // Force IllegalArgumentException
2899         calibrator = null;
2900         try {
2901             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2902                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
2903                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
2904             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2905         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2906         }
2907         try {
2908             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2909                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2910                     ba, ma, this);
2911             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2912         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2913         }
2914         try {
2915             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2916                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
2917                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
2918             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2919         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2920         }
2921         try {

2923                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
2924                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
2925             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2926         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2927         }
2928         try {

2930                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2931                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma, this);
2932             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2933         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2934         }
2935         try {
2936             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2937                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2938                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma, this);
2939             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2940         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2941         }
2942         try {
2943             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2944                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
2945                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma, this);
2946             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2947         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2948         }
2949         try {
2950             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2951                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
2952                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma, this);
2953             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2954         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2955         }
2956         try {
2957             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2958                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2959                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma, this);
2960             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2961         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2962         }
2963         try {
2964             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2965                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
2966                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma, this);
2967             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2968         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2969         }
2970         try {
2971             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2972                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2973                     ba, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
2974             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2975         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2976         }
2977         try {
2978             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
2979                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
2980                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
2981             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
2982         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
2983         }
2984         assertNull(calibrator);

2986 
2987     @Test
2988     public void testConstructor10() throws WrongSizeException {
2989         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
2990         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
2991                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
2992         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
2993                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
2994         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
2995         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
2996         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
2997         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
2998         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
2999         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
3000                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
3001 
3002         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
3003         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
3004                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
3005         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
3006                 Collections.emptyList();
3007         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
3008         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
3009         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
3010 
3011         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
3012         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
3013         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
3014         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
3015 
3016         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
3017         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
3018         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
3019         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
3020         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
3021         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
3022         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
3023         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
3024         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
3025 
3026         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
3027                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
3028                         timeInterval, measurements, false, false, bg, mg, gg);
3029 
3030         // check default values
3031         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
3032                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
3033         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
3034         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
3035                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
3036         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
3037                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
3038         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
3039         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
3040         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
3041         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
3042         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
3043         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3044         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3045         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
3046                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3047         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
3048         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
3049         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
3050         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3051         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3052         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
3053                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3054         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
3055         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
3056         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
3057         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3058         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3059         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
3060                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3061         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
3062         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
3063         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
3064         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
3065         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
3066         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
3067         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
3068         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
3069         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
3070         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3071         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
3072         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3073         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3074         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3075         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3076         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3077         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3078         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3079         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3080         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3081         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
3082         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
3083         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3084         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
3085         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
3086         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
3087         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
3088         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3089         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
3090         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
3091         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3092         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
3093                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3094         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
3095         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
3096         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
3097         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
3098         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3099         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
3100                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3101         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
3102         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
3103         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
3104         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
3105         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3106         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
3107                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3108         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
3109         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
3110         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
3111         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
3112         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
3113         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3114         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3115         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
3116         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
3117         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
3118         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
3119         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
3120         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
3121         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
3122         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
3123         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
3124         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
3125         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
3126         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
3127         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
3128         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
3129         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
3130         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
3131         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
3132         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
3133         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
3134         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3135         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
3136         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
3137         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
3138         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
3139         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3140         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
3141         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
3142         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
3143         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
3144         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3145         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
3146         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
3147         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
3148                 0.0);
3149         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
3150                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
3151         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
3152                 rotationRate, 0.0);
3153         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
3154                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3155         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
3156                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3157         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
3158         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
3159         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
3160         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
3161         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
3162                 0.0);
3163         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
3164         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
3165         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
3166         assertEquals(time1, time2);
3167         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
3168         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
3169         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3170         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
3171         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
3172         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3173         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
3174         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
3175         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
3176         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
3177         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
3178         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
3179         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
3180                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
3181         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
3182                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
3183         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
3184                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
3185         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
3186         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
3187         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
3188         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
3189         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
3190         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
3191         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
3192         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
3193         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
3194         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
3195         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
3196         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
3197         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
3198         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
3199         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
3200         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
3201         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
3202         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
3203         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
3204         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
3205         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
3206         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
3207         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
3208         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
3209         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
3210         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
3211         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
3212         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
3213         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
3214         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
3215         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
3216                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
3217         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
3218         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
3219         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3220         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3221         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
3222         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
3223         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3224         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3225         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
3226         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
3227         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3228         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3229         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
3230         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
3231         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
3232         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
3233         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
3234         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
3235         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
3236         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
3237         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
3238 
3239         // Force IllegalArgumentException
3240         calibrator = null;
3241         try {
3242             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3243                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
3244                     true, false, bg, mg, gg);
3245             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3246         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3247         }
3248         try {
3249             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3250                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
3251                     true,
3252                     false, bg, mg, gg);
3253             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3254         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3255         }
3256         try {
3257             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3258                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3259                     true,
3260                     false,
3261                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
3262             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3263         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3264         }
3265         try {
3266             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3267                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3268                     true,
3269                     false,
3270                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
3271             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3272         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3273         }
3274         try {
3275             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3276                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3277                     true,
3278                     false, bg,
3279                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
3280             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3281         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3282         }
3283         try {
3284             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3285                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3286                     true,
3287                     false,
3288                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
3289             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3290         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3291         }
3292         try {
3293             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3294                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3295                     true,
3296                     false,
3297                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
3298             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3299         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3300         }
3301         try {
3302             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3303                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3304                     true,
3305                     false,
3306                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
3307             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3308         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3309         }
3310         assertNull(calibrator);
3311     }
3312 
3313     @Test
3314     public void testConstructor11() throws WrongSizeException {
3315         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
3316         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
3317                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
3318         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
3319                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
3320         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
3321         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
3322         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
3323         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
3324         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
3325         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
3326                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
3327 
3328         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
3329         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
3330                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
3331         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
3332                 Collections.emptyList();
3333         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
3334         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
3335         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
3336 
3337         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
3338         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
3339         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
3340         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
3341 
3342         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
3343         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
3344         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
3345         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
3346         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
3347         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
3348         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
3349         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
3350         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
3351 
3352         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
3353                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
3354                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
3355                         false, bg, mg, gg, this);
3356 
3357         // check default values
3358         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
3359                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
3360         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
3361         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
3362                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
3363         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
3364                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
3365         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
3366         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
3367         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
3368         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
3369         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
3370         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3371         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3372         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
3373                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3374         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
3375         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
3376         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
3377         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3378         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3379         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
3380                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3381         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
3382         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
3383         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
3384         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3385         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3386         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
3387                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3388         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
3389         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
3390         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
3391         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
3392         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
3393         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
3394         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
3395         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
3396         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
3397         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3398         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
3399         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3400         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3401         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3402         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3403         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3404         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3405         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3406         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3407         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3408         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
3409         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
3410         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3411         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
3412         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
3413         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
3414         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
3415         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3416         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
3417         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
3418         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3419         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
3420                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3421         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
3422         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
3423         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
3424         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
3425         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3426         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
3427                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3428         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
3429         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
3430         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
3431         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
3432         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3433         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
3434                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3435         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
3436         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
3437         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
3438         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
3439         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
3440         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3441         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3442         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
3443         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
3444         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
3445         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
3446         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
3447         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
3448         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
3449         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
3450         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
3451         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
3452         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
3453         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
3454         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
3455         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
3456         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
3457         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
3458         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
3459         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
3460         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
3461         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3462         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
3463         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
3464         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
3465         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
3466         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3467         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
3468         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
3469         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
3470         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
3471         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3472         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
3473         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
3474         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
3475                 0.0);
3476         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
3477                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
3478         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
3479                 rotationRate, 0.0);
3480         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
3481                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3482         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
3483                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3484         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
3485         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
3486         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
3487         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
3488         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
3489                 0.0);
3490         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
3491         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
3492         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
3493         assertEquals(time1, time2);
3494         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
3495         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
3496         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3497         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
3498         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
3499         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3500         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
3501         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
3502         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
3503         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
3504         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
3505         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
3506         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
3507                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
3508         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
3509                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
3510         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
3511                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
3512         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
3513         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
3514         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
3515         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
3516         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
3517         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
3518         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
3519         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
3520         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
3521         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
3522         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
3523         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
3524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
3525         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
3526         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
3527         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
3528         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
3529         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
3530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
3531         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
3532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
3533         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
3534         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
3535         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
3536         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
3537         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
3538         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
3539         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
3540         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
3541         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
3542         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
3543                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
3544         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
3545         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
3546         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3547         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3548         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
3549         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
3550         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3551         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3552         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
3553         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
3554         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3555         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3556         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
3557         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
3558         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
3559         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
3560         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
3561         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
3562         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
3563         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
3564         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
3565 
3566         // Force IllegalArgumentException
3567         calibrator = null;
3568         try {
3569             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3570                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
3571                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
3572                     this);
3573             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3574         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3575         }
3576         try {
3577             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3578                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
3579                     true,
3580                     false, bg, mg, gg, this);
3581             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3582         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3583         }
3584         try {
3585             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3586                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3587                     true,
3588                     false,
3589                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, this);
3590             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3591         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3592         }
3593         try {
3594             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3595                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3596                     true,
3597                     false,
3598                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, this);
3599             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3600         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3601         }
3602         try {
3603             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3604                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3605                     true,
3606                     false, bg,
3607                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
3608             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3609         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3610         }
3611         try {
3612             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3613                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3614                     true,
3615                     false,
3616                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
3617             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3618         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3619         }
3620         try {
3621             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3622                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3623                     true,
3624                     false,
3625                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
3626             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3627         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3628         }
3629         try {
3630             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3631                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3632                     true,
3633                     false,
3634                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
3635             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3636         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3637         }
3638         assertNull(calibrator);
3639     }
3640 
3641     @Test
3642     public void testConstructor12() throws WrongSizeException {
3643         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
3644         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
3645                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
3646         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
3647                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
3648         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
3649         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
3650         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
3651         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
3652         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
3653         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
3654                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
3655 
3656         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
3657         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
3658                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
3659         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
3660                 Collections.emptyList();
3661         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
3662         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
3663         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
3664 
3665         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
3666         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
3667         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
3668         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
3669 
3670         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
3671         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
3672         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
3673         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
3674         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
3675         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
3676         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
3677         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
3678         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
3679 
3680         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
3681                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
3682                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
3683                         false, bias, mg, gg);
3684 
3685         // check default values
3686         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
3687                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
3688         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
3689         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
3690                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
3691         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
3692                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
3693         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
3694         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
3695         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
3696         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
3697         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
3698         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3699         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3700         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
3701                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3702         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
3703         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
3704         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
3705         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3706         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3707         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
3708                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3709         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
3710         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
3711         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
3712         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
3713         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3714         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
3715                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
3716         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
3717         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
3718         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
3719         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
3720         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
3721         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
3722         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
3723         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
3724         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
3725         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3726         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
3727         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3728         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3729         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3730         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3731         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3732         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3733         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
3734         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
3735         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
3736         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
3737         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
3738         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3739         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
3740         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
3741         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
3742         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
3743         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3744         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
3745         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
3746         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3747         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
3748                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3749         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
3750         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
3751         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
3752         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
3753         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3754         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
3755                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3756         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
3757         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
3758         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
3759         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
3760         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3761         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
3762                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3763         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
3764         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
3765         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
3766         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
3767         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
3768         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
3769         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3770         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
3771         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
3772         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
3773         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
3774         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
3775         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
3776         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
3777         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
3778         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
3779         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
3780         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
3781         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
3782         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
3783         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
3784         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
3785         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
3786         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
3787         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
3788         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
3789         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
3790         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
3791         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
3792         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
3793         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
3794         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3795         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
3796         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
3797         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
3798         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
3799         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
3800         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
3801         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
3802         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
3803                 0.0);
3804         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
3805                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
3806         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
3807                 rotationRate, 0.0);
3808         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
3809                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
3810         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
3811                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
3812         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
3813         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
3814         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
3815         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
3816         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
3817                 0.0);
3818         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
3819         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
3820         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
3821         assertEquals(time1, time2);
3822         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
3823         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
3824         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3825         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
3826         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
3827         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
3828         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
3829         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
3830         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
3831         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
3832         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
3833         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
3834         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
3835                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
3836         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
3837                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
3838         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
3839                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
3840         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
3841         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
3842         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
3843         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
3844         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
3845         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
3846         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
3847         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
3848         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
3849         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
3850         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
3851         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
3852         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
3853         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
3854         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
