3855         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
3856         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
3857         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
3858         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
3859         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
3860         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
3861         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
3862         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
3863         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
3864         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
3865         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
3866         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
3867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
3868         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
3869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
3870         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
3871                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
3872         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
3873         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
3874         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3875         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
3877         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
3878         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3879         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3880         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
3881         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
3882         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
3883         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
3884         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
3885         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
3886         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
3887         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
3888         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
3889         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
3890         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
3891         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
3892         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
3893 
3894         // Force IllegalArgumentException
3895         calibrator = null;
3896         try {
3897             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3898                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
3899                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
3900             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3901         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3902         }
3903         try {
3904             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3905                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
3906                     true,
3907                     false, bias, mg, gg);
3908             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3909         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3910         }
3911         try {
3912             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3913                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3914                     true,
3915                     false,
3916                     new double[1], mg, gg);
3917             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3918         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3919         }
3920         try {
3921             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3922                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3923                     true,
3924                     false, bias,
3925                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
3926             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3927         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3928         }
3929         try {
3930             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3931                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3932                     true,
3933                     false,
3934                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
3935             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3936         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3937         }
3938         try {
3939             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3940                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3941                     true,
3942                     false,
3943                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
3944             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3945         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3946         }
3947         try {
3948             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
3949                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
3950                     true,
3951                     false,
3952                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
3953             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
3954         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
3955         }
3956         assertNull(calibrator);
3957     }
3958 
3959     @Test
3960     public void testConstructor13() throws WrongSizeException {
3961         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
3962         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
3963                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
3964         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
3965                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
3966         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
3967         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
3968         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
3969         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
3970         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
3971         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
3972                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
3973 
3974         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
3975         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
3976                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
3977         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
3978                 Collections.emptyList();
3979         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
3980         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
3981         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
3982 
3983         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
3984         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
3985         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
3986         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
3987 
3988         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
3989         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
3990         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
3991         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
3992         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
3993         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
3994         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
3995         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
3996         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
3997 
3998         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
3999                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
4000                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
4001                         false, bias, mg, gg, this);
4002 
4003         // check default values
4004         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
4005                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
4006         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
4007         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
4008                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
4009         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
4010                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
4011         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
4012         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
4013         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
4014         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
4015         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
4016         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
4017         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4018         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
4019                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4020         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
4021         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
4022         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
4023         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
4024         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4025         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
4026                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4027         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
4028         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
4029         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
4030         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
4031         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4032         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
4033                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4034         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
4035         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
4036         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
4037         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
4038         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
4039         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
4040         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
4041         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
4042         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
4043         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4044         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
4045         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
4046         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
4047         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
4048         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
4049         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
4050         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
4051         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
4052         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
4053         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
4054         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
4055         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
4056         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4057         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
4058         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
4059         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
4060         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
4061         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4062         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
4063         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
4064         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4065         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
4066                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4067         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
4068         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
4069         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
4070         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
4071         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4072         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
4073                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4074         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
4075         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
4076         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
4077         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
4078         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4079         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
4080                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4081         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
4082         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
4083         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
4084         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
4085         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
4086         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4087         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4088         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
4089         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
4090         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
4091         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
4092         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
4093         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
4094         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
4095         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
4096         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
4097         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
4098         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
4099         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
4100         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
4101         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
4102         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
4103         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
4104         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
4105         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
4106         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
4107         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4108         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
4109         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
4110         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
4111         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
4112         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4113         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
4114         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
4115         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
4116         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
4117         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4118         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
4119         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
4120         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
4121                 0.0);
4122         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
4123                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
4124         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
4125                 rotationRate, 0.0);
4126         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
4127                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4128         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
4129                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4130         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
4131         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
4132         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
4133         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
4134         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
4135                 0.0);
4136         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
4137         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
4138         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
4139         assertEquals(time1, time2);
4140         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
4141         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
4142         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4143         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
4144         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
4145         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4146         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
4147         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
4148         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
4149         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
4150         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
4151         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
4152         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
4153                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
4154         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
4155                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
4156         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
4157                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
4158         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
4159         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
4160         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
4161         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
4162         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
4163         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
4164         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
4165         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
4166         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
4167         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
4168         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
4169         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
4170         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
4171         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
4172         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
4173         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
4174         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
4175         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
4176         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
4177         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
4178         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
4179         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
4180         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
4181         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
4182         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
4183         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
4184         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
4185         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
4186         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
4187         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
4188         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
4189                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
4190         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
4191         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
4192         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4193         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4194         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
4195         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
4196         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4197         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4198         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
4199         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
4200         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4201         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4202         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
4203         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
4204         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
4205         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
4206         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
4207         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
4208         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
4209         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
4210         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
4211 
4212         // Force IllegalArgumentException
4213         calibrator = null;
4214         try {
4215             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4216                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
4217                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
4218                     this);
4219             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4220         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4221         }
4222         try {
4223             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4224                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
4225                     true,
4226                     false, bias, mg, gg, this);
4227             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4228         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4229         }
4230         try {
4231             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4232                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4233                     true,
4234                     false,
4235                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
4236             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4237         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4238         }
4239         try {
4240             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4241                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4242                     true,
4243                     false, bias,
4244                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
4245             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4246         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4247         }
4248         try {
4249             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4250                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4251                     true,
4252                     false,
4253                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
4254             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4255         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4256         }
4257         try {
4258             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4259                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4260                     true,
4261                     false,
4262                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
4263             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4264         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4265         }
4266         try {
4267             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4268                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4269                     true,
4270                     false,
4271                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
4272             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4273         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4274         }
4275         assertNull(calibrator);
4276     }
4277 
4278     @Test
4279     public void testConstructor14() throws WrongSizeException {
4280         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
4281         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
4282                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
4283         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
4284                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
4285         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
4286         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
4287         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
4288         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
4289         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
4290         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
4291                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
4292 
4293         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
4294         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
4295                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
4296         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
4297                 Collections.emptyList();
4298         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
4299         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
4300         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
4301 
4302         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
4303         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
4304         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
4305         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
4306 
4307         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
4308         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
4309         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
4310         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
4311         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
4312         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
4313         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
4314         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
4315         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
4316 
4317         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
4318         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
4319         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
4320 
4321         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
4322         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
4323         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
4324 
4325         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
4326         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
4327         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
4328         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
4329         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
4330         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
4331         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
4332         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
4333         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
4334 
4335         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
4336                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
4337                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
4338                         false, bias, mg, gg,
4339                         accelerometerBias, ma);
4340 
4341         // check default values
4342         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
4343                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
4344         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
4345         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
4346                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
4347         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
4348                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
4349         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
4350         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
4351         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
4352         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
4353         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
4354         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
4355         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4356         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
4357                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4358         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
4359         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
4360         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
4361         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
4362         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4363         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
4364                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4365         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
4366         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
4367         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
4368         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
4369         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4370         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
4371                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4372         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
4373         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
4374         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
4375         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
4376         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
4377         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
4378         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
4379         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
4380         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
4381         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4382         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
4383         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
4384         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
4385         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
4386         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
4387         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
4388         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
4389         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
4390         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
4391         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
4392         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
4393         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
4394         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4395         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
4396         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
4397         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
4398         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
4399         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4400         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
4401         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
4402         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4403         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
4404                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4405         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
4406         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
4407         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
4408         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
4409         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4410         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
4411                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4412         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
4413         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
4414         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
4415         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
4416         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4417         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
4418                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4419         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
4420         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
4421         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
4422         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
4423         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
4424         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4425         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4426         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
4427         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
4428         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
4429         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
4430         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
4431         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
4432         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
4433         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
4434         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
4435         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
4436         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
4437         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
4438         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
4439         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
4440         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
4441         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
4442         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
4443         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
4444         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
4445         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4446         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
4447         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
4448         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
4449         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
4450         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4451         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
4452         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
4453         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
4454         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
4455         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4456         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
4457         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
4458         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
4459                 0.0);
4460         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
4461                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
4462         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
4463                 rotationRate, 0.0);
4464         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
4465                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4466         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
4467                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4468         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
4469         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
4470         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
4471         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
4472         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
4473                 0.0);
4474         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
4475         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
4476         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
4477         assertEquals(time1, time2);
4478         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
4479         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
4480         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4481         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
4482         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
4483         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4484         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
4485         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
4486         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
4487         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
4488         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
4489         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
4490         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
4491                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
4492         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
4493                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
4494         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
4495                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
4496         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
4497         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
4498         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
4499         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
4500         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
4501         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
4502         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
4503         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
4504         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
4505         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
4506         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
4507         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
4508         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
4509         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
4510         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
4511         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
4512         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
4513         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
4514         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
4515         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
4516         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
4517         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
4518         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
4519         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
4520         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
4521         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
4522         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
4523         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
4524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
4525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
4526         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
4527                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
4528         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
4529         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
4530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4531         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
4533         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
4534         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4535         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4536         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
4537         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
4538         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4539         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4540         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
4541         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
4542         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
4543         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
4544         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
4545         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
4546         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
4547         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
4548         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
4549 
4550         // Force IllegalArgumentException
4551         calibrator = null;
4552         try {
4553             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4554                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
4555                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
4556                     accelerometerBias, ma);
4557             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4558         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4559         }
4560         try {
4561             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4562                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
4563                     true,
4564                     false, bias, mg, gg,
4565                     accelerometerBias, ma);
4566             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4567         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4568         }
4569         try {
4570             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4571                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4572                     true,
4573                     false,
4574                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
4575             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4576         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4577         }
4578         try {
4579             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4580                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4581                     true,
4582                     false, bias,
4583                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
4584             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4585         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4586         }
4587         try {
4588             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4589                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4590                     true,
4591                     false,
4592                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
4593             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4594         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4595         }
4596         try {
4597             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4598                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4599                     true,
4600                     false,
4601                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma);
4602             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4603         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4604         }
4605         try {
4606             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4607                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4608                     true,
4609                     false,
4610                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma);
4611             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4612         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4613         }
4614         try {
4615             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4616                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4617                     true,
4618                     false,
4619                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
4620             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4621         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4622         }
4623         try {
4624             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4625                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4626                     true,
4627                     false,
4628                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
4629                     new Matrix(1, 3));
4630             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4631         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4632         }
4633         try {
4634             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4635                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4636                     true,
4637                     false,
4638                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
4639                     new Matrix(3, 1));
4640             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4641         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4642         }
4643         assertNull(calibrator);
4644     }
4645 
4646     @Test
4647     public void testConstructor15() throws WrongSizeException {
4648         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
4649         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
4650                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
4651         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
4652                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
4653         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
4654         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
4655         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
4656         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
4657         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
4658         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
4659                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
4660 
4661         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
4662         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
4663                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
4664         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
4665                 Collections.emptyList();
4666         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
4667         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
4668         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
4669 
4670         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
4671         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
4672         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
4673         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
4674 
4675         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
4676         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
4677         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
4678         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
4679         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
4680         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
4681         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
4682         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
4683         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
4684 
4685         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
4686         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
4687         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
4688 
4689         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
4690         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
4691         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
4692 
4693         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
4694         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
4695         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
4696         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
4697         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
4698         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
4699         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
4700         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
4701         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
4702 
4703         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
4704                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
4705                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
4706                         false, bias, mg, gg,
4707                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
4708 
4709         // check default values
4710         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
4711                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
4712         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
4713         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
4714                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
4715         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
4716                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
4717         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
4718         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
4719         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
4720         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
4721         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
4722         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
4723         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4724         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
4725                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4726         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
4727         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
4728         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
4729         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
4730         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4731         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
4732                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4733         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
4734         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
4735         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
4736         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
4737         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4738         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
4739                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
4740         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
4741         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
4742         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
4743         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
4744         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
4745         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
4746         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
4747         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
4748         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
4749         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4750         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
4751         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
4752         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
4753         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
4754         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
4755         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
4756         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
4757         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
4758         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
4759         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
4760         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
4761         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
4762         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4763         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
4764         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
4765         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
4766         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
4767         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4768         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
4769         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
4770         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4771         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
4772                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4773         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
4774         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
4775         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
4776         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
4777         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4778         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
4779                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4780         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
4781         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
4782         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
4783         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
4784         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4785         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
4786                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4787         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
4788         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
4789         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
4790         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
4791         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
4792         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
4793         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4794         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
4795         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
4796         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
4797         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
4798         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
4799         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
4800         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
4801         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
4802         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
4803         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
4804         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
4805         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
4806         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
4807         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
4808         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
4809         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
4810         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
4811         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
4812         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
4813         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
4814         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
4815         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
4816         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
4817         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
4818         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4819         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
4820         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
4821         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
4822         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
4823         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
4824         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
4825         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
4826         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
4827                 0.0);
4828         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
4829                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
4830         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
4831                 rotationRate, 0.0);
4832         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
4833                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
4834         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
4835                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
4836         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
4837         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
4838         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
4839         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
4840         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
4841                 0.0);
4842         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
4843         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
4844         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
4845         assertEquals(time1, time2);
4846         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
4847         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
4848         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4849         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
4850         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
4851         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
4852         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
4853         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
4854         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
4855         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
4856         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
4857         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
4858         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
4859                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
4860         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
4861                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
4862         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
4863                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
4864         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
4865         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
4866         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
4867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
4868         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
4869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
4870         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
4871         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
4872         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
4873         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
4874         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
4875         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
4876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
4877         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
4878         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
4879         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
4880         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
4881         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
4882         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
4883         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
4884         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
4885         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
4886         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
4887         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
4888         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
4889         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
4890         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
4891         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
4892         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
4893         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
4894         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
4895                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
4896         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
4897         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
4898         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4899         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4900         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
4901         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
4902         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4903         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4904         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
4905         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
4906         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
4907         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
4908         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
4909         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
4910         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
4911         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
4912         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
4913         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
4914         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
4915         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
4916         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
4917 
4918         // Force IllegalArgumentException
4919         calibrator = null;
4920         try {
4921             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4922                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
4923                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
4924                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
4925             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4926         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4927         }
4928         try {
4929             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4930                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
4931                     true,
4932                     false, bias, mg, gg,
4933                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
4934             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4935         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4936         }
4937         try {
4938             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4939                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4940                     true,
4941                     false,
4942                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
4943                     this);
4944             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4945         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4946         }
4947         try {
4948             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4949                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4950                     true,
4951                     false, bias,
4952                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
4953                     this);
4954             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4955         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4956         }
4957         try {
4958             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4959                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4960                     true,
4961                     false,
4962                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
4963                     this);
4964             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4965         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4966         }
4967         try {
4968             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4969                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4970                     true,
4971                     false,
4972                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma,
4973                     this);
4974             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4975         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4976         }
4977         try {
4978             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4979                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4980                     true,
4981                     false,
4982                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma,
4983                     this);
4984             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4985         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4986         }
4987         try {
4988             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4989                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4990                     true,
4991                     false,
4992                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
4993             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
4994         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
4995         }
4996         try {
4997             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
4998                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
4999                     true,
5000                     false,
5001                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
5002                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
5003             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5004         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5005         }
5006         try {
5007             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5008                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5009                     true,
5010                     false,
5011                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
5012                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
5013             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5014         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5015         }
5016         assertNull(calibrator);
5017     }
5018 
5019     @Test
5020     public void testConstructor16() throws WrongSizeException {
5021         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
5022         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
5023                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
5024         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
5025                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
5026         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
5027         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
5028         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
5029         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
5030         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
5031         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
5032                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
5033 
5034         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
5035         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
5036                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
5037         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
5038                 Collections.emptyList();
5039         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
5040         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
5041         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
5042 
5043         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
5044         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
5045         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
5046         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
5047 
5048         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
5049         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
5050         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
5051         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
5052         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
5053         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
5054         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
5055         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
5056         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
5057 
5058         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
5059         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
5060         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
5061 
5062         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
5063         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
5064         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
5065 
5066         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
5067         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
5068         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
5069         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
5070         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
5071         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
5072         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
5073         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
5074         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
5075 
5076         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
5077                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
5078                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
5079                         false, bg, mg, gg,
5080                         ba, ma);
5081 
5082         // check default values
5083         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
5084                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
5085         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
5086         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
5087                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
5088         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
5089                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
5090         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
5091         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
5092         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
5093         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
5094         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
5095         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
5096         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5097         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
5098                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5099         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
5100         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
5101         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
5102         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
5103         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5104         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
5105                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5106         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
5107         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
5108         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
5109         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
5110         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5111         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
5112                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5113         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
5114         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
5115         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
5116         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
5117         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
5118         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
5119         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
5120         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
5121         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
5122         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5123         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
5124         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
5125         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
5126         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
5127         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
5128         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
5129         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
5130         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
5131         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
5132         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
5133         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
5134         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
5135         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5136         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
5137         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
5138         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
5139         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
5140         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5141         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
5142         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
5143         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5144         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
5145                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5146         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
5147         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
5148         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
5149         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
5150         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5151         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
5152                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5153         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
5154         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
5155         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
5156         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
5157         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5158         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
5159                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5160         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
5161         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
5162         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
5163         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
5164         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
5165         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5166         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5167         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
5168         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
5169         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
5170         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
5171         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
5172         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
5173         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
5174         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
5175         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
5176         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
