5177         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
5178         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
5179         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
5180         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
5181         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
5182         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
5183         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
5184         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
5185         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
5186         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5187         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
5188         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
5189         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
5190         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
5191         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5192         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
5193         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
5194         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
5195         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
5196         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5197         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
5198         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
5199         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
5200                 0.0);
5201         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
5202                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
5203         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
5204                 rotationRate, 0.0);
5205         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
5206                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5207         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
5208                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5209         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
5210         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
5211         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
5212         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
5213         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
5214                 0.0);
5215         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
5216         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
5217         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
5218         assertEquals(time1, time2);
5219         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
5220         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
5221         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5222         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
5223         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
5224         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5225         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
5226         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
5227         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
5228         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
5229         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
5230         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
5231         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
5232                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
5233         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
5234                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
5235         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
5236                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
5237         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
5238         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
5239         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
5240         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
5241         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
5242         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
5243         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
5244         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
5245         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
5246         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
5247         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
5248         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
5249         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
5250         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
5251         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
5252         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
5253         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
5254         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
5255         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
5256         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
5257         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
5258         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
5259         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
5260         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
5261         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
5262         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
5263         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
5264         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
5265         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
5266         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
5267         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
5268                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
5269         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
5270         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
5271         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5272         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5273         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
5274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
5275         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5276         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5277         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
5278         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
5279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5280         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5281         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
5282         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
5283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
5284         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
5285         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
5286         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
5287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
5288         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
5289         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
5290 
5291         // Force IllegalArgumentException
5292         calibrator = null;
5293         try {
5294             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5295                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
5296                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
5297                     ba, ma);
5298             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5299         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5300         }
5301         try {
5302             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5303                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
5304                     true,
5305                     false, bg, mg, gg,
5306                     ba, ma);
5307             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5308         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5309         }
5310         try {
5311             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5312                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5313                     true,
5314                     false,
5315                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
5316             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5317         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5318         }
5319         try {

5321                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5322                     true,
5323                     false,
5324                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
5325             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5326         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5327         }

5329             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5330                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5331                     true,
5332                     false, bg,
5333                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
5334             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5335         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5336         }
5337         try {
5338             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5339                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5340                     true,
5341                     false,
5342                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
5343             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5344         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5345         }
5346         try {
5347             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5348                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5349                     true,
5350                     false,
5351                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
5352             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5353         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5354         }
5355         try {
5356             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5357                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5358                     true,
5359                     false,
5360                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
5361             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5362         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5363         }
5364         try {
5365             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5366                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5367                     true,
5368                     false,
5369                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
5370             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5371         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5372         }
5373         try {
5374             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5375                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
5376                     true,
5377                     false,
5378                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
5379             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5380         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5381         }
5382         try {
5383             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5384                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,

5386                     false,
5387                     bg, mg, gg, ba,

5389             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");

5391         }
5392         try {

5395                     true,
5396                     false,
5397                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
5398                     new Matrix(3, 1));
5399             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5400         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5401         }
5402         assertNull(calibrator);
5403     }

5405     @Test
5406     public void testConstructor17() throws WrongSizeException {
5407         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
5408         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
5409                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
5410         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
5411                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
5412         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
5413         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
5414         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
5415         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
5416         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
5417         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
5418                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
5419 
5420         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
5421         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
5422                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
5423         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
5424                 Collections.emptyList();
5425         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
5426         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
5427         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
5428 
5429         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
5430         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
5431         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
5432         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
5433 
5434         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
5435         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
5436         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
5437         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
5438         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
5439         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
5440         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
5441         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
5442         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
5443 
5444         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
5445         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
5446         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
5447 
5448         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
5449         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
5450         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
5451 
5452         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
5453         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
5454         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
5455         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
5456         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
5457         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
5458         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
5459         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
5460         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
5461 
5462         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
5463                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition, rotationRate,
5464                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
5465                         false, bg, mg, gg,
5466                         ba, ma, this);
5467 
5468         // check default values
5469         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
5470                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
5471         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
5472         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
5473                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
5474         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
5475                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
5476         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
5477         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
5478         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
5479         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
5480         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
5481         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
5482         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5483         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
5484                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5485         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
5486         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
5487         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
5488         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
5489         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5490         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
5491                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5492         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
5493         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
5494         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
5495         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
5496         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5497         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
5498                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5499         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
5500         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
5501         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
5502         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
5503         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
5504         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
5505         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
5506         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
5507         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
5508         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5509         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
5510         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
5511         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
5512         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
5513         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
5514         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
5515         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
5516         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
5517         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
5518         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
5519         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
5520         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
5521         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5522         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
5523         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
5524         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
5525         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
5526         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5527         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
5528         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
5529         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5530         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
5531                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5532         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
5533         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
5534         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
5535         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
5536         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5537         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
5538                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5539         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
5540         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
5541         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
5542         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
5543         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5544         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
5545                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5546         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
5547         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
5548         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
5549         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
5550         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
5551         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5552         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5553         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
5554         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
5555         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
5556         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
5557         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
5558         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
5559         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
5560         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
5561         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
5562         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
5563         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
5564         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
5565         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
5566         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
5567         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
5568         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
5569         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
5570         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
5571         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
5572         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5573         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
5574         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
5575         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
5576         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
5577         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5578         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
5579         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
5580         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
5581         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
5582         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5583         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
5584         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
5585         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
5586                 0.0);
5587         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
5588                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
5589         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
5590                 rotationRate, 0.0);
5591         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
5592                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5593         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
5594                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5595         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
5596         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
5597         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
5598         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
5599         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
5600                 0.0);
5601         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
5602         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
5603         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
5604         assertEquals(time1, time2);
5605         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
5606         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
5607         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5608         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
5609         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
5610         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5611         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
5612         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
5613         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
5614         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
5615         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
5616         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
5617         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
5618                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
5619         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
5620                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
5621         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
5622                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
5623         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
5624         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
5625         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
5626         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
5627         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
5628         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
5629         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
5630         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
5631         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
5632         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
5633         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
5634         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
5635         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
5636         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
5637         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
5638         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
5639         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
5640         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
5641         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
5642         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
5643         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
5644         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
5645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
5646         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
5647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
5648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
5649         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
5650         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
5651         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
5652         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
5653         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
5654                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
5655         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
5656         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
5657         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5658         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5659         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
5660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
5661         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5662         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5663         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
5664         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
5665         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
5666         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
5667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
5668         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
5669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
5670         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
5671         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
5672         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
5673         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
5674         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
5675         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
5676 
5677         // Force IllegalArgumentException
5678         calibrator = null;
5679         try {
5680             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
5681                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
5682                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
5683                     ba, ma, this);
5684             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
5685         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
5686         }

5689                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,

5791     @Test
5792     public void testConstructor18() throws WrongSizeException {
5793         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
5794         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
5795                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
5796         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
5797                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
5798         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
5799         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
5800         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
5801         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
5802         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
5803         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
5804                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
5805 
5806         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
5807         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
5808                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
5809         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
5810                 Collections.emptyList();
5811         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
5812         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
5813         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
5814 
5815         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
5816         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
5817         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
5818         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
5819 
5820         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
5821         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
5822         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
5823         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
5824         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
5825         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
5826         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
5827         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
5828         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
5829 
5830         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
5831                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
5832                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
5833 
5834         // check default values
5835         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
5836                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
5837         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
5838         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
5839                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
5840         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
5841                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
5842         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
5843         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
5844         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
5845         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
5846         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
5847         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
5848         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5849         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
5850                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5851         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
5852         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
5853         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
5854         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
5855         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5856         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
5857                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5858         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
5859         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
5860         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
5861         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
5862         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5863         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
5864                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
5865         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
5866         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
5867         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
5868         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
5869         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
5870         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
5871         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
5872         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
5873         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
5874         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5875         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
5876         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
5877         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
5878         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
5879         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
5880         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
5881         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
5882         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
5883         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
5884         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
5885         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
5886         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
5887         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5888         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
5889         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
5890         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
5891         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
5892         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5893         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
5894         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
5895         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5896         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
5897                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5898         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
5899         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
5900         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
5901         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
5902         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5903         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
5904                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5905         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
5906         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
5907         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
5908         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
5909         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5910         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
5911                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5912         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
5913         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
5914         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
5915         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
5916         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
5917         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
5918         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5919         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
5920         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
5921         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
5922         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
5923         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
5924         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
5925         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
5926         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
5927         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
5928         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
5929         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
5930         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
5931         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
5932         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
5933         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
5934         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
5935         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
5936         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
5937         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
5938         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
5939         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
5940         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
5941         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
5942         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
5943         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5944         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
5945         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
5946         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
5947         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
5948         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
5949         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
5950         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
5951         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
5952                 0.0);
5953         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
5954                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
5955         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
5956                 rotationRate, 0.0);
5957         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
5958                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
5959         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
5960                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
5961         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
5962         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
5963         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
5964         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
5965         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
5966                 0.0);
5967         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
5968         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
5969         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
5970         assertEquals(time1, time2);
5971         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
5972         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5973         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5974         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
5975         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
5976         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
5977         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
5978         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
5979         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
5980         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
5981         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
5982         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
5983         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
5984                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
5985         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
5986                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
5987         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
5988                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
5989         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
5990         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
5991         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
5992         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
5993         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
5994         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
5995         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
5996         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
5997         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
5998         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
5999         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
6000         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
6001         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
6002         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
6003         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
6004         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
6005         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
6006         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
6007         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
6008         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
6009         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
6010         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
6011         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
6012         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
6013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
6014         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
6015         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
6016         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
6017         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
6018         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
6019         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
6020                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
6021         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
6022         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
6023         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6024         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6025         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
6026         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
6027         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6028         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6029         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
6030         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
6031         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6032         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6033         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
6034         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
6035         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
6036         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
6037         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
6038         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
6039         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
6040         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
6041         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
6042 
6043         // Force IllegalArgumentException
6044         calibrator = null;
6045         try {
6046             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6047                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
6048                     bg, mg, gg);
6049             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6050         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6051         }
6052         try {
6053             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6054                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
6055             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6056         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6057         }
6058         try {
6059             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6060                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6061                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
6062             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6063         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6064         }
6065         try {
6066             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6067                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6068                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
6069             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6070         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6071         }
6072         try {
6073             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6074                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
6075                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
6076             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6077         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6078         }
6079         try {
6080             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6081                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
6082                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
6083             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6084         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6085         }
6086         try {
6087             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6088                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
6089                     new Matrix(1, 3));
6090             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6091         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6092         }
6093         try {
6094             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6095                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
6096                     new Matrix(3, 1));
6097             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6098         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6099         }
6100         assertNull(calibrator);
6101     }
6102 
6103     @Test
6104     public void testConstructor19() throws WrongSizeException {
6105         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
6106         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
6107                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
6108         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
6109                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
6110         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
6111         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
6112         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
6113         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
6114         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
6115         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
6116                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
6117 
6118         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
6119         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
6120                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
6121         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
6122                 Collections.emptyList();
6123         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
6124         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
6125         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
6126 
6127         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
6128         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
6129         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
6130         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
6131 
6132         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
6133         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
6134         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
6135         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
6136         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
6137         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
6138         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
6139         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
6140         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
6141 
6142         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
6143                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6144                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6145                         bg, mg, gg, this);
6146 
6147         // check default values
6148         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
6149                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
6150         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
6151         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
6152                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
6153         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
6154                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
6155         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
6156         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
6157         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
6158         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
6159         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
6160         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6161         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6162         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
6163                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6164         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
6165         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
6166         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
6167         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6168         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6169         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
6170                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6171         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
6172         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
6173         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
6174         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6175         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6176         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
6177                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6178         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
6179         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
6180         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
6181         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
6182         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
6183         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
6184         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
6185         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
6186         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
6187         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6188         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
6189         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6190         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6191         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6192         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6193         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6194         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6195         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6196         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6197         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6198         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
6199         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
6200         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6201         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
6202         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
6203         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
6204         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
6205         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6206         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
6207         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
6208         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6209         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
6210                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6211         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
6212         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
6213         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
6214         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
6215         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6216         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
6217                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6218         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
6219         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
6220         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
6221         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
6222         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6223         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
6224                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6225         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
6226         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
6227         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
6228         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
6229         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
6230         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6231         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6232         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
6233         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
6234         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
6235         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
6236         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
6237         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
6238         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
6239         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
6240         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
6241         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
6242         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
6243         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
6244         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
6245         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
6246         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
6247         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
6248         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
6249         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
6250         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
6251         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6252         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
6253         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
6254         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
6255         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
6256         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6257         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
6258         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
6259         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
6260         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
6261         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6262         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
6263         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
6264         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
6265                 0.0);
6266         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
6267                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
6268         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
6269                 rotationRate, 0.0);
6270         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
6271                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6272         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
6273                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6274         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
6275         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
6276         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
6277         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
6278         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
6279                 0.0);
6280         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
6281         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
6282         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
6283         assertEquals(time1, time2);
6284         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
6285         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6286         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6287         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
6288         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
6289         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6290         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
6291         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
6292         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
6293         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
6294         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
6295         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
6296         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
6297                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
6298         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
6299                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
6300         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
6301                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
6302         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
6303         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
6304         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
6305         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
6306         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
6307         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
6308         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
6309         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
6310         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
6311         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
6312         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
6313         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
6314         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
6315         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
6316         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
6317         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
6318         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
6319         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
6320         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
6321         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
6322         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
6323         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
6324         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
6325         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
6326         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
6327         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
6328         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
6329         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
6330         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
6331         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
6332         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
6333                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
6334         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
6335         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
6336         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6337         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6338         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
6339         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
6340         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6341         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6342         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
6343         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
6344         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6345         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6346         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
6347         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
6348         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
6349         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
6350         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
6351         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
6352         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
6353         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
6354         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
6355 
6356         // Force IllegalArgumentException
6357         calibrator = null;
6358         try {
6359             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6360                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
6361                     bg, mg, gg, this);
6362             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6363         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6364         }
6365         try {
6366             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6367                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
6368                     this);
6369             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6370         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6371         }
6372         try {
6373             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6374                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6375                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg,
6376                     this);
6377             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6378         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6379         }
6380         try {
6381             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6382                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6383                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg,
6384                     this);
6385             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6386         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6387         }
6388         try {
6389             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6390                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
6391                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg,
6392                     this);
6393             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6394         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6395         }
6396         try {
6397             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6398                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
6399                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg,
6400                     this);
6401             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6402         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6403         }
6404         try {
6405             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6406                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
6407                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
6408             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6409         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6410         }
6411         try {
6412             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6413                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
6414                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
6415             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6416         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6417         }
6418         assertNull(calibrator);
6419     }
6420 
6421     @Test
6422     public void testConstructor20() throws WrongSizeException {
6423         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
6424         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
6425                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
6426         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
6427                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
6428         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
6429         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
6430         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
6431         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
6432         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
6433         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
6434                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
6435 
6436         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
6437         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
6438                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
6439         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
6440                 Collections.emptyList();
6441         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
6442         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
6443         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
6444 
6445         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
6446         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
6447         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
6448         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
6449 
6450         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
6451         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
6452         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
6453         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
6454         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
6455         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
6456         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
6457         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
6458         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
6459 
6460         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
6461                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6462                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6463                         bias, mg, gg);
6464 
6465         // check default values
6466         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
6467                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
6468         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
6469         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
6470                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
6471         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
6472                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
6473         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
6474         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
6475         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
6476         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
6477         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
6478         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6479         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6480         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
6481                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6482         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
6483         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
6484         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
6485         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6486         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6487         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
6488                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6489         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
6490         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
6491         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
6492         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6493         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6494         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
6495                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6496         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
6497         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
6498         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
6499         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
6500         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
6501         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
6502         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
6503         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
6504         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
6505         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6506         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
6507         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6508         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6509         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6510         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6511         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6512         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6513         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6514         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6515         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6516         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
6517         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
6518         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6519         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
6520         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
6521         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
6522         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
6523         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6524         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
6525         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
6526         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6527         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
6528                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6529         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
6530         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
6531         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
6532         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
6533         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6534         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
6535                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6536         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
6537         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
6538         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
6539         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
6540         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6541         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
6542                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6543         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
6544         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
6545         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
6546         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
6547         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
6548         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6549         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6550         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
6551         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
6552         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
6553         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
6554         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
6555         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
6556         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
6557         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
6558         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
6559         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
6560         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
6561         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
6562         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
6563         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
6564         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
6565         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
6566         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
6567         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
6568         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
6569         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6570         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
6571         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
6572         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
6573         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
6574         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6575         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
6576         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
6577         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
6578         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
6579         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6580         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
6581         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
6582         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
6583                 0.0);
6584         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
6585                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
6586         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
