6587                 rotationRate, 0.0);
6588         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
6589                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6590         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
6591                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6592         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
6593         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
6594         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
6595         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
6596         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
6597                 0.0);
6598         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
6599         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
6600         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
6601         assertEquals(time1, time2);
6602         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
6603         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6604         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6605         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
6606         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
6607         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6608         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
6609         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
6610         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
6611         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
6612         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
6613         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
6614         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
6615                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
6616         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
6617                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
6618         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
6619                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
6620         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
6621         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
6622         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
6623         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
6624         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
6625         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
6626         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
6627         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
6628         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
6629         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
6630         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
6631         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
6632         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
6633         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
6634         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
6635         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
6636         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
6637         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
6638         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
6639         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
6640         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
6641         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
6642         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
6643         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
6644         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
6645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
6646         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
6647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
6648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
6649         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
6650         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
6651                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
6652         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
6653         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
6654         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6655         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6656         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
6657         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
6658         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6659         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
6661         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
6662         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6663         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6664         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
6665         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
6666         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
6667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
6668         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
6669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
6670         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
6671         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
6672         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
6673 
6674         // Force IllegalArgumentException
6675         calibrator = null;
6676         try {
6677             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6678                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
6679                     bias, mg, gg);
6680             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6681         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6682         }
6683         try {
6684             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6685                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg);
6686             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6687         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6688         }
6689         try {
6690             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6691                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6692                     new double[1], mg, gg);
6693             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6694         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6695         }
6696         try {
6697             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6698                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
6699                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
6700             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6701         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6702         }
6703         try {
6704             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6705                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
6706                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
6707             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6708         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6709         }
6710         try {
6711             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6712                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
6713                     new Matrix(1, 3));
6714             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6715         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6716         }
6717         try {
6718             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6719                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
6720                     new Matrix(3, 1));
6721             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6722         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6723         }
6724         assertNull(calibrator);
6725     }
6726 
6727     @Test
6728     public void testConstructor21() throws WrongSizeException {
6729         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
6730         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
6731                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
6732         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
6733                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
6734         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
6735         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
6736         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
6737         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
6738         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
6739         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
6740                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
6741 
6742         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
6743         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
6744                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
6745         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
6746                 Collections.emptyList();
6747         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
6748         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
6749         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
6750 
6751         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
6752         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
6753         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
6754         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
6755 
6756         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
6757         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
6758         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
6759         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
6760         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
6761         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
6762         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
6763         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
6764         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
6765 
6766         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
6767                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6768                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6769                         bias, mg, gg, this);
6770 
6771         // check default values
6772         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
6773                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
6774         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
6775         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
6776                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
6777         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
6778                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
6779         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
6780         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
6781         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
6782         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
6783         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
6784         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6785         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6786         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
6787                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6788         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
6789         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
6790         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
6791         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6792         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6793         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
6794                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6795         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
6796         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
6797         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
6798         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
6799         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6800         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
6801                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
6802         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
6803         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
6804         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
6805         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
6806         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
6807         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
6808         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
6809         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
6810         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
6811         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6812         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
6813         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6814         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6815         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6816         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6817         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6818         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6819         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
6820         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
6821         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
6822         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
6823         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
6824         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6825         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
6826         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
6827         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
6828         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
6829         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6830         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
6831         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
6832         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6833         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
6834                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6835         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
6836         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
6837         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
6838         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
6839         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6840         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
6841                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6842         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
6843         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
6844         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
6845         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
6846         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6847         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
6848                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6849         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
6850         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
6851         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
6852         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
6853         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
6854         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
6855         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6856         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
6857         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
6858         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
6859         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
6860         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
6861         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
6862         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
6863         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
6864         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
6865         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
6866         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
6867         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
6868         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
6869         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
6870         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
6871         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
6872         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
6873         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
6874         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
6875         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
6876         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
6877         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
6878         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
6879         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
6880         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6881         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
6882         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
6883         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
6884         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
6885         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
6886         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
6887         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
6888         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
6889                 0.0);
6890         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
6891                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
6892         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
6893                 rotationRate, 0.0);
6894         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
6895                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
6896         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
6897                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
6898         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
6899         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
6900         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
6901         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
6902         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
6903                 0.0);
6904         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
6905         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
6906         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
6907         assertEquals(time1, time2);
6908         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
6909         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6910         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6911         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
6912         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
6913         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
6914         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
6915         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
6916         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
6917         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
6918         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
6919         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
6920         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
6921                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
6922         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
6923                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
6924         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
6925                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
6926         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
6927         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
6928         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
6929         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
6930         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
6931         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
6932         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
6933         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
6934         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
6935         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
6936         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
6937         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
6938         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
6939         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
6940         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
6941         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
6942         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
6943         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
6944         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
6945         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
6946         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
6947         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
6948         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
6949         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
6950         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
6951         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
6952         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
6953         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
6954         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
6955         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
6956         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
6957                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
6958         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
6959         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
6960         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6961         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6962         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
6963         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
6964         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6965         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6966         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
6967         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
6968         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
6969         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
6970         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
6971         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
6972         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
6973         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
6974         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
6975         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
6976         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
6977         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
6978         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
6979 
6980         // Force IllegalArgumentException
6981         calibrator = null;
6982         try {
6983             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6984                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
6985                     bias, mg, gg, this);
6986             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6987         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6988         }
6989         try {
6990             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6991                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
6992                     this);
6993             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
6994         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
6995         }
6996         try {
6997             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
6998                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
6999                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
7000             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7001         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7002         }
7003         try {
7004             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7005                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7006                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
7007             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7008         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7009         }
7010         try {
7011             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7012                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7013                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
7014             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7015         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7016         }
7017         try {
7018             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7019                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7020                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
7021             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7022         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7023         }
7024         try {
7025             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7026                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7027                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
7028             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7029         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7030         }
7031         assertNull(calibrator);
7032     }
7033 
7034     @Test
7035     public void testConstructor22() throws WrongSizeException {
7036         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
7037         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
7038                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
7039         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
7040                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
7041         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
7042         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
7043         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
7044         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
7045         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
7046         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
7047                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
7048 
7049         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
7050         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
7051                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
7052         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
7053                 Collections.emptyList();
7054         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
7055         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
7056         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
7057 
7058         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
7059         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
7060         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
7061         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
7062 
7063         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
7064         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
7065         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
7066         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
7067         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
7068         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
7069         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
7070         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
7071         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
7072 
7073         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
7074         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
7075         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
7076 
7077         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
7078         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
7079         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
7080 
7081         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
7082         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
7083         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
7084         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
7085         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
7086         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
7087         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
7088         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
7089         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
7090 
7091         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
7092                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
7093                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7094                         accelerometerBias, ma);
7095 
7096         // check default values
7097         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
7098                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
7099         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
7100         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
7101                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
7102         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
7103                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
7104         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
7105         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
7106         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
7107         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
7108         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
7109         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
7110         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7111         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
7112                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7113         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
7114         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
7115         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
7116         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
7117         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7118         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
7119                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7120         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
7121         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
7122         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
7123         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
7124         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7125         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
7126                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7127         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
7128         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
7129         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
7130         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
7131         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
7132         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
7133         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
7134         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
7135         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
7136         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7137         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
7138         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
7139         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
7140         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
7141         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
7142         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
7143         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
7144         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
7145         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
7146         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
7147         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
7148         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
7149         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7150         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
7151         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
7152         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
7153         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
7154         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7155         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
7156         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
7157         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7158         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
7159                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7160         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
7161         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
7162         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
7163         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
7164         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7165         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
7166                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7167         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
7168         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
7169         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
7170         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
7171         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7172         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
7173                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7174         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
7175         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
7176         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
7177         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
7178         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
7179         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7180         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7181         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
7182         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
7183         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
7184         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
7185         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
7186         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
7187         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
7188         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
7189         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
7190         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
7191         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
7192         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
7193         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
7194         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
7195         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
7196         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
7197         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
7198         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
7199         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
7200         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7201         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
7202         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
7203         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
7204         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
7205         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7206         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
7207         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
7208         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
7209         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
7210         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7211         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
7212         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
7213         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
7214                 0.0);
7215         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
7216                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
7217         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
7218                 rotationRate, 0.0);
7219         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
7220                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7221         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
7222                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7223         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
7224         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
7225         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
7226         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
7227         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
7228                 0.0);
7229         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
7230         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
7231         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
7232         assertEquals(time1, time2);
7233         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
7234         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7235         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7236         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
7237         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
7238         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7239         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
7240         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
7241         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
7242         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
7243         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
7244         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
7245         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
7246                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
7247         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
7248                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
7249         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
7250                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
7251         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
7252         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
7253         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
7254         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
7255         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
7256         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
7257         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
7258         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
7259         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
7260         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
7261         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
7262         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
7263         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
7264         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
7265         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
7266         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
7267         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
7268         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
7269         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
7270         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
7271         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
7272         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
7273         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
7274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
7275         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
7276         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
7277         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
7278         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
7279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
7280         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
7281         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
7282                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
7283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
7284         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
7285         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7286         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
7288         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
7289         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7290         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7291         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
7292         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
7293         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7294         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7295         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
7296         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
7297         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
7298         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
7299         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
7300         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
7301         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
7302         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
7303         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
7304 
7305         // Force IllegalArgumentException
7306         calibrator = null;
7307         try {
7308             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7309                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
7310                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
7311             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7312         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7313         }
7314         try {
7315             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7316                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7317                     accelerometerBias, ma);
7318             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7319         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7320         }
7321         try {
7322             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7323                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
7324                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
7325             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7326         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7327         }
7328         try {
7329             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7330                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7331                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
7332                     ma);
7333             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7334         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7335         }
7336         try {
7337             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7338                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7339                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
7340                     ma);
7341             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7342         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7343         }
7344         try {
7345             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7346                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7347                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
7348                     ma);
7349             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7350         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7351         }
7352         try {
7353             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7354                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7355                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
7356                     ma);
7357             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7358         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7359         }
7360         try {
7361             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(ecefPosition,
7362                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7363                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
7364             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7365         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7366         }
7367         try {
7368             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7369                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7370                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3));
7371             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7372         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7373         }
7374         try {
7375             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7376                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7377                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1));
7378             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7379         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7380         }
7381         assertNull(calibrator);
7382     }
7383 
7384     @Test
7385     public void testConstructor23() throws WrongSizeException {
7386         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
7387         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
7388                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
7389         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
7390                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
7391         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
7392         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
7393         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
7394         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
7395         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
7396         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
7397                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
7398 
7399         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
7400         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
7401                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
7402         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
7403                 Collections.emptyList();
7404         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
7405         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
7406         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
7407 
7408         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
7409         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
7410         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
7411         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
7412 
7413         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
7414         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
7415         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
7416         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
7417         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
7418         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
7419         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
7420         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
7421         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
7422 
7423         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
7424         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
7425         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
7426 
7427         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
7428         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
7429         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
7430 
7431         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
7432         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
7433         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
7434         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
7435         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
7436         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
7437         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
7438         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
7439         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
7440 
7441         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
7442                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
7443                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7444                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
7445 
7446         // check default values
7447         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
7448                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
7449         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
7450         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
7451                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
7452         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
7453                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
7454         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
7455         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
7456         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
7457         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
7458         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
7459         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
7460         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7461         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
7462                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7463         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
7464         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
7465         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
7466         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
7467         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7468         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
7469                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7470         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
7471         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
7472         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
7473         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
7474         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7475         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
7476                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7477         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
7478         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
7479         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
7480         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
7481         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
7482         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
7483         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
7484         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
7485         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
7486         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7487         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
7488         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
7489         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
7490         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
7491         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
7492         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
7493         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
7494         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
7495         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
7496         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
7497         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
7498         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
7499         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7500         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
7501         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
7502         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
7503         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
7504         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7505         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
7506         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
7507         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7508         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
7509                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7510         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
7511         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
7512         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
7513         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
7514         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7515         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
7516                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7517         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
7518         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
7519         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
7520         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
7521         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7522         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
7523                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7524         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
7525         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
7526         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
7527         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
7528         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
7529         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7530         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7531         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
7532         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
7533         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
7534         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
7535         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
7536         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
7537         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
7538         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
7539         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
7540         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
7541         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
7542         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
7543         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
7544         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
7545         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
7546         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
7547         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
7548         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
7549         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
7550         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7551         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
7552         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
7553         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
7554         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
7555         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7556         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
7557         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
7558         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
7559         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
7560         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7561         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
7562         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
7563         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
7564                 0.0);
7565         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
7566                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
7567         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
7568                 rotationRate, 0.0);
7569         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
7570                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7571         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
7572                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7573         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
7574         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
7575         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
7576         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
7577         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
7578                 0.0);
7579         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
7580         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
7581         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
7582         assertEquals(time1, time2);
7583         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
7584         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7585         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7586         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
7587         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
7588         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7589         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
7590         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
7591         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
7592         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
7593         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
7594         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
7595         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
7596                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
7597         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
7598                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
7599         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
7600                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
7601         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
7602         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
7603         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
7604         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
7605         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
7606         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
7607         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
7608         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
7609         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
7610         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
7611         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
7612         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
7613         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
7614         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
7615         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
7616         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
7617         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
7618         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
7619         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
7620         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
7621         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
7622         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
7623         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
7624         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
7625         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
7626         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
7627         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
7628         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
7629         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
7630         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
7631         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
7632                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
7633         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
7634         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
7635         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7636         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7637         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
7638         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
7639         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7640         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7641         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
7642         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
7643         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7644         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
7646         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
7647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
7648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
7649         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
7650         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
7651         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
7652         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
7653         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
7654 
7655         // Force IllegalArgumentException
7656         calibrator = null;
7657         try {
7658             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7659                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
7660                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
7661             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7662         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7663         }
7664         try {
7665             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7666                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7667                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
7668             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7669         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7670         }
7671         try {
7672             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7673                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
7674                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
7675             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7676         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7677         }
7678         try {
7679             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7680                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7681                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
7682                     ma, this);
7683             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7684         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7685         }
7686         try {
7687             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7688                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7689                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
7690                     ma, this);
7691             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7692         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7693         }
7694         try {
7695             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7696                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7697                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
7698                     ma, this);
7699             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7700         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7701         }
7702         try {
7703             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7704                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
7705                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
7706                     ma, this);
7707             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7708         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7709         }
7710         try {
7711             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7712                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
7713                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
7714             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7715         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7716         }
7717         try {
7718             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7719                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7720                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
7721             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7722         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7723         }
7724         try {
7725             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
7726                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
7727                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
7728             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
7729         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
7730         }
7731         assertNull(calibrator);
7732     }
7733 
7734     @Test
7735     public void testConstructor24() throws WrongSizeException {
7736         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
7737         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
7738                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
7739         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
7740                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
7741         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
7742         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
7743         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
7744         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
7745         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
7746         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
7747                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
7748 
7749         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
7750         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
7751                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
7752         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
7753                 Collections.emptyList();
7754         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
7755         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
7756         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
7757 
7758         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
7759         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
7760         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
7761         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
7762 
7763         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
7764         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
7765         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
7766         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
7767         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
7768         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
7769         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
7770         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
7771         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
7772 
7773         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
7774         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
7775         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
7776 
7777         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
7778         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
7779         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
7780 
7781         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
7782         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
7783         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
7784         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
7785         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
7786         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
7787         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
7788         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
7789         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
7790 
7791         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
7792                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
7793                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
7794                         ba, ma);
7795 
7796         // check default values
7797         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
7798                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
7799         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
7800         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
7801                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
7802         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
7803                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
7804         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
7805         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
7806         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
7807         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
7808         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
7809         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
7810         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7811         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
7812                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7813         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
7814         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
7815         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
7816         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
7817         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7818         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
7819                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7820         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
7821         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
7822         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
7823         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
7824         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7825         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
7826                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
7827         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
7828         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
7829         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
7830         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
7831         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
7832         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
7833         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
7834         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
7835         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
7836         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7837         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
7838         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
7839         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
7840         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
7841         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
7842         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
7843         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
7844         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
7845         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
7846         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
7847         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
7848         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
7849         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7850         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
7851         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
7852         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
7853         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
7854         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7855         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
7856         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
7857         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7858         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
7859                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7860         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
7861         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
7862         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
7863         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
7864         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7865         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
7866                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7867         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
7868         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
7869         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
7870         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
7871         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7872         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
7873                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7874         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
7875         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
7876         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
