7877         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
7878         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
7879         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
7880         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7881         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
7882         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
7883         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
7884         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
7885         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
7886         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
7887         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
7888         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
7889         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
7890         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
7891         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
7892         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
7893         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
7894         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
7895         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
7896         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
7897         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
7898         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
7899         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
7900         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
7901         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
7902         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
7903         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
7904         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
7905         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7906         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
7907         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
7908         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
7909         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
7910         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
7911         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
7912         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
7913         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
7914                 0.0);
7915         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
7916                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
7917         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
7918                 rotationRate, 0.0);
7919         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
7920                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
7921         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
7922                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
7923         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
7924         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
7925         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
7926         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
7927         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
7928                 0.0);
7929         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
7930         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
7931         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
7932         assertEquals(time1, time2);
7933         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
7934         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7935         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7936         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
7937         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
7938         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
7939         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
7940         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
7941         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
7942         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
7943         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
7944         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
7945         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
7946                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
7947         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
7948                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
7949         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
7950                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
7951         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
7952         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
7953         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
7954         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
7955         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
7956         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
7957         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
7958         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
7959         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
7960         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
7961         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
7962         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
7963         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
7964         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
7965         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
7966         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
7967         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
7968         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
7969         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
7970         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
7971         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
7972         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
7973         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
7974         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
7975         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
7976         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
7977         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
7978         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
7979         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
7980         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
7981         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
7982                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
7983         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
7984         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
7985         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7986         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7987         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
7988         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
7989         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7990         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7991         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
7992         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
7993         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
7994         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
7995         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
7996         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
7997         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
7998         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
7999         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
8000         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
8001         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
8002         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
8003         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
8004 
8005         // Force IllegalArgumentException
8006         calibrator = null;
8007         try {
8008             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8009                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
8010                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma);
8011             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8012         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8013         }
8014         try {
8015             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8016                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
8017                     ba, ma);
8018             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8019         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8020         }
8021         try {
8022             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8023                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
8024                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
8025             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8026         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8027         }
8028         try {
8029             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8030                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
8031                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
8032             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8033         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8034         }
8035         try {
8036             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8037                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8038                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
8039             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8040         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8041         }
8042         try {
8043             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8044                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8045                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
8046             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8047         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8048         }
8049         try {
8050             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8051                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
8052                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
8053             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8054         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8055         }
8056         try {
8057             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8058                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
8059                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
8060             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8061         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8062         }
8063         try {
8064             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8065                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8066                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
8067             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8068         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8069         }
8070         try {
8071             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8072                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8073                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
8074             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8075         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8076         }
8077         try {
8078             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8079                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
8080                     ba, new Matrix(1, 3));
8081             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8082         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8083         }
8084         try {
8085             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8086                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
8087                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1));
8088             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8089         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8090         }
8091         assertNull(calibrator);
8092     }
8093 
8094     @Test
8095     public void testConstructor25() throws WrongSizeException {
8096         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
8097         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
8098                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
8099         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
8100                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
8101         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
8102         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
8103         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
8104         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
8105         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
8106         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
8107                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
8108 
8109         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
8110         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
8111                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
8112         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
8113                 Collections.emptyList();
8114         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
8115         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
8116         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
8117 
8118         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
8119         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
8120         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
8121         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
8122 
8123         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
8124         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
8125         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
8126         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
8127         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
8128         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
8129         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
8130         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
8131         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
8132 
8133         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
8134         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
8135         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
8136 
8137         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
8138         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
8139         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
8140 
8141         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
8142         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
8143         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
8144         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
8145         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
8146         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
8147         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
8148         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
8149         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
8150 
8151         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
8152                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
8153                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg, ba, ma,
8154                         this);
8155 
8156         // check default values
8157         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
8158                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
8159         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
8160         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
8161                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
8162         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
8163                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
8164         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
8165         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
8166         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
8167         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
8168         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
8169         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
8170         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8171         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
8172                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8173         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
8174         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
8175         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
8176         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
8177         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8178         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
8179                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8180         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
8181         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
8182         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
8183         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
8184         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8185         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
8186                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8187         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
8188         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
8189         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
8190         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
8191         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
8192         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
8193         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
8194         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
8195         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
8196         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8197         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
8198         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
8199         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
8200         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
8201         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
8202         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
8203         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
8204         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
8205         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
8206         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
8207         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
8208         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
8209         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8210         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
8211         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
8212         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
8213         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
8214         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8215         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
8216         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
8217         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8218         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
8219                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8220         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
8221         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
8222         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
8223         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
8224         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8225         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
8226                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8227         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
8228         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
8229         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
8230         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
8231         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8232         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
8233                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8234         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
8235         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
8236         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
8237         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
8238         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
8239         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8240         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8241         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
8242         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
8243         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
8244         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
8245         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
8246         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
8247         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
8248         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
8249         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
8250         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
8251         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
8252         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
8253         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
8254         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
8255         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
8256         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
8257         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
8258         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
8259         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
8260         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8261         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
8262         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
8263         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
8264         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
8265         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8266         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
8267         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
8268         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
8269         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
8270         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8271         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
8272         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
8273         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
8274                 0.0);
8275         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
8276                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
8277         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
8278                 rotationRate, 0.0);
8279         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
8280                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8281         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
8282                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8283         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
8284         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
8285         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
8286         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
8287         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
8288                 0.0);
8289         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
8290         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
8291         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
8292         assertEquals(time1, time2);
8293         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
8294         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8295         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8296         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
8297         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
8298         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8299         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
8300         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
8301         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
8302         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
8303         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
8304         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
8305         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
8306                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
8307         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
8308                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
8309         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
8310                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
8311         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
8312         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
8313         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
8314         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
8315         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
8316         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
8317         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
8318         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
8319         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
8320         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
8321         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
8322         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
8323         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
8324         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
8325         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
8326         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
8327         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
8328         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
8329         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
8330         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
8331         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
8332         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
8333         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
8334         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
8335         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
8336         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
8337         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
8338         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
8339         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
8340         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
8341         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
8342                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
8343         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
8344         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
8345         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8346         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8347         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
8348         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
8349         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8350         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8351         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
8352         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
8353         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8354         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8355         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
8356         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
8357         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
8358         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
8359         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
8360         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
8361         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
8362         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
8363         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
8364 
8365         // Force IllegalArgumentException
8366         calibrator = null;
8367         try {
8368             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8369                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
8370                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
8371             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8372         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8373         }
8374         try {
8375             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8376                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
8377                     ba, ma, this);
8378             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8379         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8380         }

8383                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
8384                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);

8387         }

8391                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);

8393         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8394         }

8397                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8398                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma, this);
8399             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8400         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8401         }

8403             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8404                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8405                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma, this);
8406             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8407         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8408         }
8409         try {
8410             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8411                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
8412                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma, this);
8413             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8414         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8415         }
8416         try {
8417             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8418                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
8419                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma, this);
8420             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8421         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8422         }
8423         try {
8424             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8425                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8426                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma, this);
8427             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8428         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8429         }
8430         try {
8431             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8432                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
8433                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma, this);
8434             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8435         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8436         }

8441             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8442         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

8444         try {
8445             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
8446                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
8447                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1), this);

8449         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

8451         assertNull(calibrator);

8454     @Test
8455     public void testConstructor26() throws WrongSizeException {
8456         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
8457         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
8458                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
8459         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
8460                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
8461         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
8462         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
8463         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
8464         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
8465         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
8466         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
8467                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
8468 
8469         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
8470         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
8471                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
8472         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
8473                 Collections.emptyList();
8474         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
8475         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
8476         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
8477 
8478         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
8479         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
8480         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
8481         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
8482 
8483         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
8484         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
8485         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
8486         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
8487         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
8488         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
8489         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
8490         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
8491         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
8492 
8493         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
8494                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
8495                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
8496                         false, bg, mg, gg);
8497 
8498         // check default values
8499         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
8500                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
8501         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
8502         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
8503                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
8504         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
8505                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
8506         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
8507         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
8508         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
8509         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
8510         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
8511         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8512         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8513         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
8514                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8515         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
8516         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
8517         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
8518         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8519         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8520         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
8521                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8522         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
8523         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
8524         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
8525         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8526         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8527         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
8528                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8529         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
8530         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
8531         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
8532         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
8533         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
8534         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
8535         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
8536         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
8537         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
8538         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8539         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
8540         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8541         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8542         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8543         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8544         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8545         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8546         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8547         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8548         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8549         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
8550         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
8551         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8552         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
8553         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
8554         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
8555         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
8556         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8557         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
8558         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
8559         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8560         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
8561                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8562         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
8563         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
8564         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
8565         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
8566         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8567         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
8568                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8569         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
8570         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
8571         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
8572         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
8573         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8574         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
8575                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8576         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
8577         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
8578         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
8579         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
8580         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
8581         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8582         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8583         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
8584         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
8585         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
8586         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
8587         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
8588         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
8589         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
8590         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
8591         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
8592         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
8593         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
8594         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
8595         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
8596         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
8597         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
8598         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
8599         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
8600         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
8601         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
8602         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8603         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
8604         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
8605         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
8606         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
8607         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8608         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
8609         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
8610         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
8611         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
8612         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8613         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
8614         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
8615         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
8616                 0.0);
8617         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
8618                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
8619         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
8620                 rotationRate, 0.0);
8621         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
8622                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8623         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
8624                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8625         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
8626         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
8627         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
8628         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
8629         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
8630                 0.0);
8631         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
8632         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
8633         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
8634         assertEquals(time1, time2);
8635         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
8636         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8637         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8638         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
8639         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
8640         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8641         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
8642         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
8643         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
8644         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
8645         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
8646         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
8647         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
8648                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
8649         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
8650                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
8651         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
8652                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
8653         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
8654         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
8655         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
8656         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
8657         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
8658         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
8659         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
8660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
8661         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
8662         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
8663         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
8664         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
8665         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
8666         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
8667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
8668         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
8669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
8670         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
8671         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
8672         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
8673         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
8674         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
8675         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
8676         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
8677         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
8678         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
8679         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
8680         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
8681         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
8682         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
8683         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
8684                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
8685         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
8686         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
8687         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8688         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8689         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
8690         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
8691         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8692         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8693         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
8694         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
8695         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
8696         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
8697         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
8698         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
8699         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
8700         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
8701         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
8702         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
8703         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
8704         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
8705         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
8706

8714         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8715         }

8718                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,

8728                     false,

8730             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8731         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8732         }

8737                     false,

8739             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8740         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
8741         }

8748             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
8749         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

8781     @Test
8782     public void testConstructor27() throws WrongSizeException {
8783         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
8784         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
8785                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
8786         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
8787                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
8788         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
8789         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
8790         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
8791         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
8792         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
8793         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
8794                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
8795 
8796         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
8797         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
8798                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
8799         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
8800                 Collections.emptyList();
8801         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
8802         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
8803         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
8804 
8805         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
8806         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
8807         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
8808         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
8809 
8810         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
8811         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
8812         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
8813         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
8814         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
8815         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
8816         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
8817         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
8818         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
8819 
8820         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
8821                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
8822                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
8823                         false, bg, mg, gg, this);
8824 
8825         // check default values
8826         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
8827                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
8828         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
8829         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
8830                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
8831         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
8832                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
8833         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
8834         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
8835         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
8836         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
8837         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
8838         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8839         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8840         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
8841                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8842         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
8843         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
8844         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
8845         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8846         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8847         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
8848                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8849         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
8850         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
8851         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
8852         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
8853         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8854         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
8855                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
8856         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
8857         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
8858         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
8859         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
8860         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
8861         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
8862         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
8863         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
8864         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
8865         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8866         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
8867         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8868         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8869         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8870         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8871         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8872         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8873         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
8874         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
8875         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
8876         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
8877         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
8878         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8879         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
8880         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
8881         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
8882         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
8883         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8884         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
8885         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
8886         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8887         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
8888                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8889         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
8890         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
8891         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
8892         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
8893         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8894         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
8895                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8896         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
8897         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
8898         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
8899         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
8900         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8901         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
8902                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8903         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
8904         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
8905         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
8906         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
8907         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
8908         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
8909         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8910         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
8911         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
8912         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
8913         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
8914         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
8915         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
8916         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
8917         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
8918         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
8919         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
8920         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
8921         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
8922         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
8923         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
8924         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
8925         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
8926         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
8927         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
8928         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
8929         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
8930         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
8931         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
8932         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
8933         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
8934         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8935         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
8936         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
8937         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
8938         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
8939         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
8940         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
8941         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
8942         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
8943                 0.0);
8944         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
8945                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
8946         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
8947                 rotationRate, 0.0);
8948         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
8949                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
8950         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
8951                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
8952         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
8953         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
8954         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
8955         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
8956         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
8957                 0.0);
8958         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
8959         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
8960         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
8961         assertEquals(time1, time2);
8962         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
8963         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8964         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8965         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
8966         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
8967         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
8968         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
8969         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
8970         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
8971         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
8972         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
8973         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
8974         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
8975                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
8976         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
8977                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
8978         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
8979                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
8980         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
8981         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
8982         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
8983         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
8984         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
8985         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
8986         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
8987         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
8988         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
8989         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
8990         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
8991         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
8992         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
8993         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
8994         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
8995         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
8996         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
8997         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
8998         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
8999         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
9000         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
9001         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
9002         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
9003         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
9004         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
9005         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
9006         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
9007         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
9008         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
9009         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
9010         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
9011                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
9012         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
9013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
9014         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9015         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9016         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
9017         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
9018         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9019         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9020         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
9021         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
9022         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9023         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9024         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
9025         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
9026         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
9027         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
9028         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
9029         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
9030         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
9031         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
9032         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
9033

9035         calibrator = null;
9036         try {
9037             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,

9076             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9077         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

9099                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9100                     true,
9101                     false,
