9109     @Test
9110     public void testConstructor28() throws WrongSizeException {
9111         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
9112         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
9113                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
9114         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
9115                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
9116         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
9117         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
9118         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
9119         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
9120         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
9121         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
9122                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
9123 
9124         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
9125         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
9126                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
9127         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
9128                 Collections.emptyList();
9129         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
9130         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
9131         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
9132 
9133         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
9134         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
9135         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
9136         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
9137 
9138         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
9139         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
9140         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
9141         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
9142         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
9143         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
9144         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
9145         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
9146         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
9147 
9148         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
9149                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
9150                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
9151                         false, bias, mg, gg);
9152 
9153         // check default values
9154         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
9155                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
9156         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
9157         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
9158                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
9159         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
9160                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
9161         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
9162         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
9163         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
9164         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
9165         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
9166         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9167         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9168         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
9169                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9170         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
9171         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
9172         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
9173         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9174         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9175         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
9176                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9177         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
9178         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
9179         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
9180         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9181         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9182         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
9183                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9184         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
9185         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
9186         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
9187         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
9188         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
9189         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
9190         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
9191         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
9192         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
9193         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9194         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
9195         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9196         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9197         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9198         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9199         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9200         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9201         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9202         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9203         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9204         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
9205         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
9206         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9207         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
9208         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
9209         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
9210         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
9211         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9212         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
9213         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
9214         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9215         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
9216                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9217         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
9218         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
9219         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
9220         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
9221         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9222         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
9223                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9224         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
9225         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
9226         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
9227         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
9228         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9229         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
9230                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9231         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
9232         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
9233         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
9234         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
9235         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
9236         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9237         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9238         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
9239         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
9240         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
9241         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
9242         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
9243         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
9244         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
9245         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
9246         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
9247         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
9248         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
9249         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
9250         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
9251         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
9252         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
9253         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
9254         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
9255         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
9256         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
9257         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9258         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
9259         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
9260         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
9261         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
9262         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9263         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
9264         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
9265         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
9266         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
9267         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9268         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
9269         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
9270         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
9271                 0.0);
9272         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
9273                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
9274         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
9275                 rotationRate, 0.0);
9276         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
9277                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9278         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
9279                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9280         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
9281         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
9282         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
9283         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
9284         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
9285                 0.0);
9286         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
9287         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
9288         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
9289         assertEquals(time1, time2);
9290         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
9291         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9292         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9293         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
9294         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
9295         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9296         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
9297         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
9298         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
9299         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
9300         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
9301         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
9302         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
9303                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
9304         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
9305                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
9306         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
9307                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
9308         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
9309         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
9310         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
9311         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
9312         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
9313         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
9314         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
9315         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
9316         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
9317         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
9318         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
9319         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
9320         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
9321         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
9322         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
9323         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
9324         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
9325         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
9326         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
9327         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
9328         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
9329         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
9330         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
9331         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
9332         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
9333         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
9334         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
9335         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
9336         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
9337         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
9338         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
9339                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
9340         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
9341         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
9342         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9343         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9344         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
9345         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
9346         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9347         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9348         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
9349         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
9350         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9351         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9352         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
9353         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
9354         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
9355         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
9356         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
9357         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
9358         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
9359         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
9360         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
9361 
9362         // Force IllegalArgumentException
9363         calibrator = null;
9364         try {
9365             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9366                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
9367                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
9368             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9369         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9370         }
9371         try {
9372             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9373                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
9374                     true,
9375                     false, bias, mg, gg);
9376             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9377         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9378         }
9379         try {
9380             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9381                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9382                     true,
9383                     false,
9384                     new double[1], mg, gg);
9385             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9386         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9387         }
9388         try {
9389             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9390                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9391                     true,
9392                     false, bias,
9393                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
9394             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9395         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9396         }
9397         try {
9398             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9399                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9400                     true,
9401                     false,
9402                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
9403             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9404         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9405         }
9406         try {
9407             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9408                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9409                     true,
9410                     false,
9411                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
9412             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9413         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9414         }
9415         try {
9416             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9417                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9418                     true,
9419                     false,
9420                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
9421             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9422         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9423         }
9424         assertNull(calibrator);
9425     }
9426 
9427     @Test
9428     public void testConstructor29() throws WrongSizeException {
9429         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
9430         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
9431                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
9432         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
9433                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
9434         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
9435         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
9436         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
9437         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
9438         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
9439         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
9440                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
9441 
9442         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
9443         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
9444                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
9445         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
9446                 Collections.emptyList();
9447         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
9448         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
9449         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
9450 
9451         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
9452         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
9453         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
9454         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
9455 
9456         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
9457         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
9458         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
9459         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
9460         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
9461         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
9462         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
9463         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
9464         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
9465 
9466         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
9467                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
9468                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
9469                         false, bias, mg, gg, this);
9470 
9471         // check default values
9472         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
9473                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
9474         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
9475         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
9476                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
9477         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
9478                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
9479         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
9480         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
9481         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
9482         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
9483         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
9484         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9485         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9486         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
9487                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9488         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
9489         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
9490         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
9491         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9492         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9493         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
9494                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9495         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
9496         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
9497         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
9498         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
9499         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9500         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
9501                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9502         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
9503         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
9504         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
9505         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
9506         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
9507         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
9508         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
9509         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
9510         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
9511         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9512         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
9513         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9514         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9515         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9516         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9517         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9518         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9519         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
9520         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
9521         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
9522         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
9523         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
9524         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9525         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
9526         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
9527         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
9528         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
9529         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9530         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
9531         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
9532         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9533         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
9534                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9535         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
9536         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
9537         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
9538         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
9539         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9540         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
9541                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9542         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
9543         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
9544         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
9545         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
9546         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9547         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
9548                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9549         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
9550         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
9551         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
9552         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
9553         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
9554         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9555         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9556         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
9557         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
9558         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
9559         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
9560         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
9561         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
9562         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
9563         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
9564         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
9565         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
9566         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
9567         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
9568         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
9569         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
9570         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
9571         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
9572         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
9573         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
9574         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
9575         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9576         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
9577         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
9578         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
9579         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
9580         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9581         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
9582         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
9583         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
9584         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
9585         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9586         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
9587         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
9588         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
9589                 0.0);
9590         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
9591                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
9592         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
9593                 rotationRate, 0.0);
9594         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
9595                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9596         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
9597                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9598         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
9599         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
9600         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
9601         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
9602         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
9603                 0.0);
9604         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
9605         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
9606         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
9607         assertEquals(time1, time2);
9608         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
9609         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9610         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9611         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
9612         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
9613         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9614         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
9615         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
9616         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
9617         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
9618         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
9619         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
9620         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
9621                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
9622         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
9623                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
9624         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
9625                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
9626         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
9627         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
9628         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
9629         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
9630         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
9631         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
9632         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
9633         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
9634         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
9635         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
9636         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
9637         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
9638         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
9639         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
9640         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
9641         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
9642         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
9643         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
9644         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
9645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
9646         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
9647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
9648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
9649         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
9650         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
9651         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
9652         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
9653         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
9654         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
9655         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
9656         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
9657                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
9658         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
9659         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
9660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9661         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9662         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
9663         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
9664         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9665         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9666         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
9667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
9668         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9669         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
9670         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
9671         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
9672         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
9673         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
9674         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
9675         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
9676         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
9677         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
9678         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
9679 
9680         // Force IllegalArgumentException
9681         calibrator = null;
9682         try {
9683             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9684                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
9685                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
9686                     this);
9687             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9688         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9689         }
9690         try {
9691             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9692                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
9693                     true,
9694                     false, bias, mg, gg, this);
9695             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9696         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9697         }
9698         try {
9699             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9700                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9701                     true,
9702                     false,
9703                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
9704             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9705         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9706         }
9707         try {
9708             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9709                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9710                     true,
9711                     false, bias,
9712                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
9713             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9714         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9715         }
9716         try {
9717             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9718                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9719                     true,
9720                     false,
9721                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
9722             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9723         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9724         }
9725         try {
9726             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9727                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9728                     true,
9729                     false,
9730                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
9731             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9732         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9733         }
9734         try {
9735             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
9736                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
9737                     true,
9738                     false,
9739                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
9740             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
9741         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
9742         }
9743         assertNull(calibrator);
9744     }
9745 
9746     @Test
9747     public void testConstructor30() throws WrongSizeException {
9748         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
9749         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
9750                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
9751         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
9752                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
9753         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
9754         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
9755         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
9756         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
9757         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
9758         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
9759                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
9760 
9761         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
9762         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
9763                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
9764         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
9765                 Collections.emptyList();
9766         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
9767         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
9768         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
9769 
9770         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
9771         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
9772         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
9773         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
9774 
9775         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
9776         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
9777         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
9778         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
9779         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
9780         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
9781         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
9782         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
9783         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
9784 
9785         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
9786         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
9787         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
9788 
9789         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
9790         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
9791         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
9792 
9793         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
9794         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
9795         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
9796         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
9797         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
9798         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
9799         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
9800         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
9801         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
9802 
9803         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
9804                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
9805                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
9806                         false, bias, mg, gg,
9807                         accelerometerBias, ma);
9808 
9809         // check default values
9810         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
9811                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
9812         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
9813         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
9814                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
9815         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
9816                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
9817         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
9818         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
9819         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
9820         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
9821         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
9822         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
9823         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9824         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
9825                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9826         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
9827         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
9828         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
9829         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
9830         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9831         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
9832                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9833         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
9834         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
9835         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
9836         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
9837         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9838         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
9839                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
9840         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
9841         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
9842         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
9843         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
9844         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
9845         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
9846         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
9847         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
9848         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
9849         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9850         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
9851         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
9852         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
9853         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
9854         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
9855         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
9856         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
9857         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
9858         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
9859         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
9860         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
9861         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
9862         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9863         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
9864         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
9865         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
9866         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
9867         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9868         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
9869         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
9870         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9871         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
9872                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9873         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
9874         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
9875         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
9876         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
9877         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9878         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
9879                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9880         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
9881         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
9882         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
9883         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
9884         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9885         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
9886                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9887         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
9888         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
9889         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
9890         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
9891         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
9892         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
9893         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9894         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
9895         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
9896         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
9897         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
9898         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
9899         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
9900         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
9901         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
9902         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
9903         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
9904         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
9905         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
9906         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
9907         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
9908         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
9909         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
9910         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
9911         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
9912         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
9913         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
9914         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
9915         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
9916         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
9917         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
9918         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9919         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
9920         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
9921         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
9922         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
9923         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
9924         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
9925         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
9926         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
9927                 0.0);
9928         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
9929                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
9930         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
9931                 rotationRate, 0.0);
9932         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
9933                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
9934         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
9935                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
9936         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
9937         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
9938         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
9939         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
9940         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
9941                 0.0);
9942         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
9943         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
9944         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
9945         assertEquals(time1, time2);
9946         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
9947         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9948         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9949         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
9950         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
9951         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
9952         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
9953         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
9954         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
9955         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
9956         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
9957         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
9958         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
9959                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
9960         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
9961                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
9962         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
9963                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
9964         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
9965         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
9966         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
9967         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
9968         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
9969         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
9970         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
9971         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
9972         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
9973         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
9974         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
9975         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
9976         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
9977         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
9978         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
9979         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
9980         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
9981         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
9982         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
9983         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
9984         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
9985         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
9986         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
9987         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
9988         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
9989         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
9990         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
9991         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
9992         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
9993         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
9994         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
9995                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
9996         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
9997         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
9998         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
9999         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10000         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
10001         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
10002         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10003         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10004         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
10005         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
10006         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10007         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10008         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
10009         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
10010         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
10011         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
10012         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
10013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
10014         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
10015         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
10016         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
10017 
10018         // Force IllegalArgumentException
10019         calibrator = null;
10020         try {
10021             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10022                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
10023                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
10024                     accelerometerBias, ma);

10026         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

10032                     false, bias, mg, gg,

10080         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
