10113 
10114     @Test
10115     public void testConstructor31() throws WrongSizeException {
10116         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
10117         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
10118                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
10119         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
10120                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
10121         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
10122         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
10123         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
10124         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
10125         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
10126         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
10127                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
10128 
10129         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
10130         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
10131                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
10132         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
10133                 Collections.emptyList();
10134         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
10135         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
10136         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
10137 
10138         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
10139         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
10140         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
10141         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
10142 
10143         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
10144         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
10145         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
10146         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
10147         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
10148         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
10149         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
10150         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
10151         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
10152 
10153         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
10154         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
10155         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
10156 
10157         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
10158         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
10159         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
10160 
10161         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
10162         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
10163         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
10164         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
10165         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
10166         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
10167         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
10168         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
10169         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
10170 
10171         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
10172                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
10173                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
10174                         false, bias, mg, gg,
10175                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
10176 
10177         // check default values
10178         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
10179                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
10180         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
10181         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
10182                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
10183         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
10184                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
10185         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
10186         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
10187         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
10188         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
10189         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
10190         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
10191         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10192         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
10193                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10194         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
10195         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
10196         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
10197         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
10198         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10199         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
10200                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10201         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
10202         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
10203         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
10204         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
10205         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10206         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
10207                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10208         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
10209         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
10210         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
10211         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
10212         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
10213         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
10214         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
10215         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
10216         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
10217         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
10218         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
10219         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
10220         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
10221         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
10222         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
10223         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
10224         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
10225         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
10226         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
10227         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
10228         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
10229         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
10230         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10231         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
10232         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
10233         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
10234         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
10235         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
10236         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
10237         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
10238         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10239         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
10240                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
10241         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
10242         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
10243         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
10244         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
10245         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10246         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
10247                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10248         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
10249         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
10250         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
10251         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
10252         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10253         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
10254                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10255         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
10256         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
10257         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
10258         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
10259         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
10260         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
10261         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10262         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
10263         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
10264         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
10265         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
10266         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
10267         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
10268         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
10269         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
10270         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
10271         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
10272         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
10273         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
10274         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
10275         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
10276         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
10277         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
10278         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
10279         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
10280         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
10281         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
10282         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
10283         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
10284         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
10285         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
10286         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10287         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
10288         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
10289         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
10290         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
10291         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10292         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
10293         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
10294         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
10295                 0.0);
10296         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
10297                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
10298         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
10299                 rotationRate, 0.0);
10300         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
10301                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10302         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
10303                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
10304         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
10305         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
10306         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
10307         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
10308         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
10309                 0.0);
10310         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
10311         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
10312         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
10313         assertEquals(time1, time2);
10314         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
10315         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10316         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10317         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
10318         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
10319         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10320         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
10321         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
10322         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
10323         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
10324         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
10325         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
10326         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
10327                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
10328         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
10329                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
10330         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
10331                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
10332         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
10333         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
10334         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
10335         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
10336         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
10337         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
10338         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
10339         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
10340         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
10341         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
10342         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
10343         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
10344         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
10345         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
10346         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
10347         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
10348         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
10349         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
10350         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
10351         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
10352         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
10353         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
10354         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
10355         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
10356         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
10357         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
10358         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
10359         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
10360         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
10361         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
10362         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
10363                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
10364         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
10365         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
10366         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10367         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10368         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
10369         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
10370         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10371         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10372         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
10373         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
10374         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10375         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10376         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
10377         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
10378         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
10379         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
10380         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
10381         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
10382         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
10383         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
10384         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
10385 
10386         // Force IllegalArgumentException
10387         calibrator = null;
10388         try {
10389             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10390                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
10391                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
10392                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
10393             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10394         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10395         }
10396         try {
10397             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10398                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
10399                     true,
10400                     false, bias, mg, gg,
10401                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
10402             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10403         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10404         }
10405         try {
10406             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10407                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10408                     true,
10409                     false,
10410                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
10411                     this);
10412             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10413         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10414         }
10415         try {
10416             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10417                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10418                     true,
10419                     false, bias,
10420                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
10421                     this);
10422             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10423         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10424         }
10425         try {
10426             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10427                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10428                     true,
10429                     false,
10430                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
10431                     this);
10432             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10433         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10434         }
10435         try {
10436             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10437                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10438                     true,
10439                     false,
10440                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma,
10441                     this);
10442             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10443         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10444         }
10445         try {
10446             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10447                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10448                     true,
10449                     false,
10450                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma,
10451                     this);
10452             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10453         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10454         }
10455         try {
10456             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10457                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10458                     true,
10459                     false,
10460                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
10461             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10462         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10463         }
10464         try {
10465             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10466                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10467                     true,
10468                     false,
10469                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
10470                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
10471             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10472         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10473         }
10474         try {
10475             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10476                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10477                     true,
10478                     false,
10479                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
10480                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
10481             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10482         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10483         }
10484         assertNull(calibrator);
10485     }
10486 
10487     @Test
10488     public void testConstructor32() throws WrongSizeException {
10489         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
10490         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
10491                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
10492         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
10493                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
10494         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
10495         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
10496         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
10497         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
10498         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
10499         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
10500                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
10501 
10502         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
10503         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
10504                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
10505         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
10506                 Collections.emptyList();
10507         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
10508         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
10509         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
10510 
10511         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
10512         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
10513         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
10514         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
10515 
10516         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
10517         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
10518         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
10519         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
10520         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
10521         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
10522         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
10523         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
10524         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
10525 
10526         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
10527         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
10528         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
10529 
10530         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
10531         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
10532         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
10533 
10534         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
10535         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
10536         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
10537         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
10538         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
10539         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
10540         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
10541         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
10542         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
10543 
10544         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
10545                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
10546                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
10547                         false, bg, mg, gg,
10548                         ba, ma);
10549 
10550         // check default values
10551         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
10552                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
10553         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
10554         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
10555                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
10556         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
10557                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
10558         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
10559         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
10560         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
10561         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
10562         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
10563         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
10564         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10565         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
10566                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10567         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
10568         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
10569         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
10570         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
10571         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10572         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
10573                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10574         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
10575         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
10576         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
10577         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
10578         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10579         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
10580                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10581         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
10582         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
10583         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
10584         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
10585         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
10586         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
10587         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
10588         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
10589         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
10590         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
10591         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
10592         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
10593         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
10594         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
10595         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
10596         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
10597         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
10598         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
10599         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
10600         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
10601         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
10602         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
10603         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10604         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
10605         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
10606         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
10607         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
10608         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
10609         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
10610         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
10611         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10612         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
10613                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
10614         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
10615         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
10616         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
10617         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
10618         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10619         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
10620                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10621         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
10622         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
10623         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
10624         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
10625         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10626         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
10627                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10628         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
10629         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
10630         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
10631         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
10632         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
10633         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
10634         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10635         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
10636         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
10637         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
10638         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
10639         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
10640         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
10641         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
10642         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
10643         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
10644         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
10645         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
10646         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
10647         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
10648         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
10649         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
10650         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
10651         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
10652         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
10653         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
10654         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
10655         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
10656         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
10657         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
10658         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
10659         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10660         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
10661         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
10662         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
10663         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
10664         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10665         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
10666         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
10667         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
10668                 0.0);
10669         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
10670                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
10671         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
10672                 rotationRate, 0.0);
10673         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
10674                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10675         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
10676                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
10677         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
10678         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
10679         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
10680         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
10681         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
10682                 0.0);
10683         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
10684         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
10685         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
10686         assertEquals(time1, time2);
10687         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
10688         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10689         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10690         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
10691         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
10692         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
10693         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
10694         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
10695         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
10696         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
10697         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
10698         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
10699         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
10700                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
10701         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
10702                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
10703         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
10704                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
10705         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
10706         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
10707         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
10708         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
10709         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
10710         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
10711         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
10712         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
10713         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
10714         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
10715         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
10716         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
10717         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
10718         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
10719         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
10720         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
10721         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
10722         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
10723         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
10724         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
10725         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
10726         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
10727         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
10728         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
10729         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
10730         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
10731         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
10732         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
10733         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
10734         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
10735         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
10736                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
10737         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
10738         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
10739         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10740         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10741         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
10742         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
10743         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10744         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10745         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
10746         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
10747         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
10748         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
10749         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
10750         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
10751         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
10752         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
10753         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
10754         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
10755         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
10756         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
10757         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
10758 
10759         // Force IllegalArgumentException
10760         calibrator = null;
10761         try {
10762             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10763                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
10764                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
10765                     ba, ma);
10766             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10767         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10768         }
10769         try {

10771                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
10772                     true,
10773                     false, bg, mg, gg,
10774                     ba, ma);

10776         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

10803         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

10812         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10813         }

10815             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10816                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10817                     true,
10818                     false,
10819                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
10820             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10821         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10822         }
10823         try {
10824             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10825                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10826                     true,
10827                     false,
10828                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
10829             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10830         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10831         }
10832         try {
10833             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10834                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10835                     true,
10836                     false,
10837                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
10838             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10839         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10840         }
10841         try {
10842             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10843                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
10844                     true,

10846                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
10847             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10848         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

10851             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition,
10852                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,

10863                     true,
10864                     false,

10866                     new Matrix(3, 1));
10867             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
10868         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
10869         }
10870         assertNull(calibrator);

10872 
10873     @Test
10874     public void testConstructor33() throws WrongSizeException {
10875         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
10876         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
10877                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
10878         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
10879                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
10880         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
10881         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
10882         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
10883         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
10884         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
10885         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
10886                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
10887 
10888         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
10889         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
10890                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
10891         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
10892                 Collections.emptyList();
10893         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
10894         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
10895         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
10896 
10897         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
10898         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
10899         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
10900         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
10901 
10902         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
10903         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
10904         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
10905         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
10906         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
10907         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
10908         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
10909         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
10910         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
10911 
10912         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
10913         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
10914         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
10915 
10916         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
10917         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
10918         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
10919 
10920         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
10921         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
10922         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
10923         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
10924         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
10925         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
10926         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
10927         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
10928         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
10929 
10930         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
10931                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(nedPosition, rotationRate,
10932                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
10933                         false, bg, mg, gg,
10934                         ba, ma, this);
10935 
10936         // check default values
10937         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
10938                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
10939         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
10940         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
10941                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
10942         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
10943                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
10944         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
10945         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
10946         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
10947         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
10948         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
10949         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
10950         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10951         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
10952                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10953         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
10954         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
10955         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
10956         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
10957         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10958         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
10959                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10960         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
10961         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
10962         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
10963         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
10964         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10965         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
10966                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
10967         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
10968         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
10969         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
10970         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
10971         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
10972         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
10973         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
10974         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
10975         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
10976         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
10977         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
10978         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
10979         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
10980         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
10981         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
10982         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
10983         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
10984         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
10985         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
10986         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
10987         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
10988         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
10989         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
10990         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
10991         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
10992         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
10993         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
10994         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
10995         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
10996         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
10997         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
10998         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
10999                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11000         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
11001         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
11002         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
11003         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
11004         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11005         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
11006                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11007         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
11008         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
11009         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
11010         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
11011         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11012         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
11013                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11014         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
11015         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
11016         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
11017         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
11018         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
11019         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
11020         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11021         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
11022         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
11023         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
11024         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
11025         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
11026         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
11027         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
11028         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
11029         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
11030         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
11031         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
11032         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
11033         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
11034         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
11035         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
11036         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
11037         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
11038         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
11039         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
11040         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11041         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
11042         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
11043         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
11044         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
11045         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11046         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
11047         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
11048         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
11049         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
11050         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11051         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
11052         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
11053         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
11054                 0.0);
11055         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
11056                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
11057         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
11058                 rotationRate, 0.0);
11059         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
11060                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11061         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
11062                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11063         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
11064         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
11065         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
11066         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
11067         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
11068                 0.0);
11069         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
11070         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
11071         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
11072         assertEquals(time1, time2);
11073         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
11074         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11075         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11076         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
11077         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
11078         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11079         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
11080         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
11081         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
11082         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
11083         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
11084         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
11085         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
11086                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
11087         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
11088                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
11089         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
11090                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
11091         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
11092         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
11093         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
11094         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
11095         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
11096         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
11097         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
11098         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
11099         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
11100         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
11101         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
11102         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
11103         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
11104         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
11105         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
11106         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
11107         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
11108         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
11109         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
11110         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
11111         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
11112         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
11113         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
11114         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
11115         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
11116         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
11117         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
11118         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
11119         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
11120         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
11121         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
11122                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
11123         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
11124         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
11125         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11126         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11127         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
11128         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
11129         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11130         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11131         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
11132         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
11133         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11134         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11135         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
11136         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
11137         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
11138         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
11139         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
11140         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
11141         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
11142         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
11143         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
