11258 
11259     @Test
11260     public void testConstructor34() throws WrongSizeException {
11261         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
11262         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
11263                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores);
11264 
11265         // check default values
11266         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
11267                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
11268         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
11269         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
11270                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
11271         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
11272                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
11273         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
11274         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
11275         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
11276         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
11277         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
11278         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11279         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11280         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
11281                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11282         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
11283         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
11284         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
11285         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11286         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11287         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
11288                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11289         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
11290         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
11291         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
11292         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11293         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11294         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
11295                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11296         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
11297         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
11298         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
11299         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
11300         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
11301         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
11302         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
11303         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
11304         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
11305         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11306         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
11307         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11308         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11309         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11310         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11311         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11312         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11313         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11314         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11315         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11316         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
11317         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
11318         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11319         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
11320         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
11321         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
11322         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
11323         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
11324         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
11325         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11326         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11327         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
11328                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11329         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
11330         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
11331         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
11332         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11333         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11334         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
11335                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11336         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
11337         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
11338         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
11339         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11340         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11341         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
11342                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11343         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
11344         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
11345         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
11346         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), 0.0, 0.0);
11347         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), 0.0, 0.0);
11348         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
11349         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11350         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
11351         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
11352         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
11353         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11354         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11355         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11356         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11357         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11358         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11359         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11360         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11361         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11362         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
11363         assertArrayEquals(bias1, new double[3], 0.0);
11364         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
11365         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
11366         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
11367         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
11368         assertEquals(bg1, new Matrix(3, 1));
11369         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11370         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
11371         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
11372         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
11373         assertEquals(mg1, new Matrix(3, 3));
11374         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11375         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
11376         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
11377         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
11378         assertEquals(gg1, new Matrix(3, 3));
11379         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11380         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
11381         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
11382         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(),
11383                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
11384         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
11385                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
11386         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
11387                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
11388         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
11389                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11390         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
11391                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11392         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
11393         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
11394         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(),
11395                 TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_TIME_INTERVAL,
11396                 0.0);
11397         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
11398         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(),
11399                 TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_TIME_INTERVAL,
11400                 0.0);
11401         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
11402         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
11403         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
11404         assertEquals(time1, time2);
11405         assertNull(calibrator.getMeasurements());
11406         assertNull(calibrator.getEcefPosition());
11407         assertNull(calibrator.getNedPosition());
11408         assertFalse(calibrator.getNedPosition(null));
11409         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
11410         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
11411         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
11412         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
11413         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
11414         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
11415         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
11416                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
11417         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
11418                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
11419         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
11420                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
11421         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
11422         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
11423         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
11424         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
11425         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
11426         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
11427         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
11428         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
11429         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
11430         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
11431         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
11432         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
11433         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
11434         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
11435         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
11436         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
11437         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
11438         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
11439         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
11440         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
11441         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
11442         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
11443         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
11444         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
11445         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
11446         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
11447         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
11448         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
11449         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
11450         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
11451         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
11452                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
11453         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
11454         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
11455         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11456         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11457         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
11458         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
11459         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11460         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11461         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
11462         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
11463         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11464         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11465         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
11466         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
11467         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
11468         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
11469         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
11470         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
11471         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
11472         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
11473         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
11474 
11475         // Force IllegalArgumentException
11476         calibrator = null;
11477         try {
11478             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9]);
11479             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11480         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11481         }
11482         assertNull(calibrator);
11483     }
11484 
11485     @Test
11486     public void testConstructor35() throws WrongSizeException {
11487         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
11488         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
11489                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
11490         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
11491                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
11492         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
11493         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
11494         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
11495         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
11496         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
11497         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
11498                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
11499 
11500         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
11501         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
11502                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
11503         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
11504                 Collections.emptyList();
11505         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
11506         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
11507         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
11508 
11509         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
11510         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
11511         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
11512         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
11513 
11514         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
11515         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
11516         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
11517         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
11518         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
11519         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
11520         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
11521         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
11522         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
11523 
11524         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
11525         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
11526                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11527                         ecefPosition, rotationRate,
11528                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
11529 
11530         // check default values
11531         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
11532                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
11533         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
11534         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
11535                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
11536         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
11537                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
11538         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
11539         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
11540         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
11541         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
11542         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
11543         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11544         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11545         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
11546                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11547         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
11548         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
11549         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
11550         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11551         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11552         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
11553                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11554         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
11555         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
11556         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
11557         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11558         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11559         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
11560                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11561         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
11562         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
11563         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
11564         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
11565         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
11566         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
11567         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
11568         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
11569         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
11570         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11571         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
11572         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11573         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11574         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11575         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11576         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11577         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11578         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11579         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11580         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11581         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
11582         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
11583         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11584         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
11585         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
11586         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
11587         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
11588         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
11589         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
11590         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
11591         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11592         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
11593                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11594         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
11595         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
11596         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
11597         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
11598         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11599         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
11600                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11601         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
11602         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
11603         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
11604         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
11605         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11606         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
11607                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11608         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
11609         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
11610         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
11611         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
11612         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
11613         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
11614         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11615         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
11616         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
11617         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
11618         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
11619         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
11620         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
11621         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
11622         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
11623         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
11624         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
11625         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
11626         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
11627         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
11628         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
11629         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
11630         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
11631         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
11632         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
11633         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
11634         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11635         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
11636         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
11637         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
11638         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
11639         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11640         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
11641         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
11642         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
11643         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
11644         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11645         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
11646         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
11647         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
11648                 0.0);
11649         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
11650                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
11651         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
11652                 rotationRate, 0.0);
11653         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
11654                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11655         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
11656                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11657         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
11658         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
11659         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
11660         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
11661         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
11662                 0.0);
11663         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
11664         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
11665         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
11666         assertEquals(time1, time2);
11667         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
11668         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
11669         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11670         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
11671         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
11672         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11673         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
11674         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
11675         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
11676         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
11677         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
11678         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
11679         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
11680                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
11681         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
11682                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
11683         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
11684                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
11685         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
11686         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
11687         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
11688         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
11689         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
11690         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
11691         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
11692         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
11693         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
11694         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
11695         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
11696         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
11697         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
11698         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
11699         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
11700         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
11701         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
11702         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
11703         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
11704         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
11705         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
11706         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
11707         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
11708         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
11709         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
11710         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
11711         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
11712         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
11713         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
11714         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
11715         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
11716                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
11717         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
11718         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
11719         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11720         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11721         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
11722         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
11723         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11724         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11725         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
11726         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
11727         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
11728         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
11729         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
11730         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
11731         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
11732         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
11733         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
11734         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
11735         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
11736         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
11737         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
11738 
11739         // Force IllegalArgumentException
11740         calibrator = null;
11741         try {
11742             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
11743                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
11744                     bg, mg, gg);
11745             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11746         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11747         }
11748         try {
11749             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11750                     ecefPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
11751                     bg, mg, gg);
11752             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11753         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11754         }
11755         try {
11756             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11757                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg,
11758                     mg, gg);
11759             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11760         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11761         }
11762         try {
11763             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11764                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
11765                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
11766             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11767         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11768         }
11769         try {
11770             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11771                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
11772                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
11773             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11774         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11775         }
11776         try {
11777             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11778                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
11779                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
11780             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11781         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11782         }
11783         try {
11784             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11785                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
11786                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
11787             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11788         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11789         }
11790         try {
11791             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11792                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
11793                     new Matrix(1, 3));
11794             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11795         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11796         }
11797         try {
11798             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
11799                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
11800                     new Matrix(3, 1));
11801             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
11802         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
11803         }
11804         assertNull(calibrator);
11805     }
11806 
11807     @Test
11808     public void testConstructor36() throws WrongSizeException {
11809         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
11810         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
11811                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
11812         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
11813                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
11814         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
11815         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
11816         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
11817         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
11818         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
11819         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
11820                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
11821 
11822         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
11823         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
11824                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
11825         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
11826                 Collections.emptyList();
11827         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
11828         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
11829         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
11830 
11831         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
11832         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
11833         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
11834         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
11835 
11836         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
11837         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
11838         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
11839         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
11840         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
11841         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
11842         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
11843         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
11844         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
11845 
11846         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
11847         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
11848                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
11849                         qualityScores, ecefPosition,
11850                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
11851                         bg, mg, gg, this);
11852 
11853         // check default values
11854         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
11855                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
11856         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
11857         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
11858                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
11859         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
11860                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
11861         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
11862         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
11863         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
11864         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
11865         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
11866         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11867         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11868         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
11869                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11870         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
11871         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
11872         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
11873         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11874         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11875         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
11876                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11877         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
11878         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
11879         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
11880         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
11881         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11882         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
11883                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
11884         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
11885         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
11886         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
11887         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
11888         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
11889         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
11890         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
11891         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
11892         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
11893         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11894         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
11895         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11896         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11897         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11898         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11899         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11900         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11901         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
11902         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
11903         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
11904         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
11905         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
11906         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11907         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
11908         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
11909         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
11910         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
11911         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
11912         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
11913         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
11914         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11915         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
11916                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11917         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
11918         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
11919         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
11920         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
11921         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11922         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
11923                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11924         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
11925         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
11926         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
11927         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
11928         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11929         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
11930                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11931         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
11932         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
11933         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
11934         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
11935         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
11936         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
11937         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11938         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
11939         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
11940         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
11941         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
11942         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
11943         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
11944         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
11945         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
11946         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
11947         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
11948         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
11949         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
11950         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
11951         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
11952         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
11953         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
11954         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
11955         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
11956         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
11957         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
11958         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
11959         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
11960         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
11961         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
11962         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11963         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
11964         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
11965         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
11966         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
11967         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
11968         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
11969         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
11970         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
11971                 0.0);
11972         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
11973                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
11974         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
11975                 rotationRate, 0.0);
11976         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
11977                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
11978         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
11979                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
11980         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
11981         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
11982         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
11983         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
11984         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
11985                 0.0);
11986         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
11987         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
11988         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
11989         assertEquals(time1, time2);
11990         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
11991         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
11992         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11993         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
11994         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
11995         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
11996         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
11997         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
11998         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
11999         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
12000         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
12001         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
12002         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
12003                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
12004         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
12005                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
12006         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
12007                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
12008         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
12009         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
12010         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
12011         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
12012         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
12013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
12014         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
12015         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
12016         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
12017         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
12018         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
12019         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
12020         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
12021         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
12022         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
12023         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
12024         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
12025         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
12026         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
12027         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
12028         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
12029         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
12030         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
12031         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
12032         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
12033         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
12034         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
12035         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
12036         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
12037         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
12038         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
12039                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
12040         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
12041         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
12042         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12043         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12044         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
12045         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
12046         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12047         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12048         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
12049         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
12050         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12051         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12052         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
12053         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
12054         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
12055         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
12056         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
12057         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
12058         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
12059         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
12060         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
12061 
12062         // Force IllegalArgumentException
12063         calibrator = null;
12064         try {
12065             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
12066                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12067                     bg, mg, gg, this);
12068             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12069         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12070         }
12071         try {
12072             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12073                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12074                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
12075                     bg, mg, gg, this);

12077         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12078         }

12080             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12081                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12082                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
12083                     this);
12084             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12085         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12086         }
12087         try {
12088             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12089                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12090                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12091                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg,
12092                     this);
12093             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12094         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12095         }
12096         try {
12097             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12098                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12099                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12100                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg,
12101                     this);
12102             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12103         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12104         }
12105         try {
12106             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12107                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12108                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
12109                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg,
12110                     this);
12111             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12112         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12113         }
12114         try {
12115             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12116                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12117                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
12118                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg,
12119                     this);
12120             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12121         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12122         }
12123         try {
12124             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12125                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12126                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,

12128             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12129         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12130         }
12131         try {
12132             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12133                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12134                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
12135                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
12136             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12137         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12138         }
12139         assertNull(calibrator);
