12141 
12142     @Test
12143     public void testConstructor37() throws WrongSizeException {
12144         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
12145         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
12146                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
12147         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
12148                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
12149         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
12150         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
12151         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
12152         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
12153         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
12154         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
12155                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
12156 
12157         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
12158         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
12159                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
12160         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
12161                 Collections.emptyList();
12162         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
12163         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
12164         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
12165 
12166         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
12167         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
12168         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
12169         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
12170 
12171         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
12172         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
12173         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
12174         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
12175         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
12176         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
12177         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
12178         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
12179         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
12180 
12181         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
12182         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
12183                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12184                         qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12185                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12186                         bias, mg, gg);
12187 
12188         // check default values
12189         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
12190                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
12191         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
12192         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
12193                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
12194         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
12195                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
12196         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
12197         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
12198         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
12199         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
12200         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
12201         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12202         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12203         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
12204                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12205         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
12206         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
12207         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
12208         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12209         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12210         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
12211                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12212         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
12213         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
12214         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
12215         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12216         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12217         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
12218                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12219         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
12220         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
12221         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
12222         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
12223         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
12224         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
12225         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
12226         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
12227         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
12228         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12229         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
12230         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12231         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12232         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12233         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12234         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12235         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12236         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12237         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12238         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12239         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
12240         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
12241         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12242         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
12243         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
12244         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
12245         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
12246         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12247         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
12248         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
12249         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12250         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
12251                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12252         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
12253         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
12254         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
12255         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
12256         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12257         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
12258                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12259         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
12260         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
12261         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
12262         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
12263         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12264         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
12265                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12266         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
12267         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
12268         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
12269         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
12270         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
12271         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12272         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12273         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
12274         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
12275         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
12276         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
12277         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
12278         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
12279         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
12280         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
12281         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
12282         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
12283         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
12284         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
12285         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
12286         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
12287         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
12288         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
12289         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
12290         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
12291         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
12292         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12293         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
12294         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
12295         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
12296         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
12297         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12298         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
12299         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
12300         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
12301         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
12302         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12303         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
12304         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
12305         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
12306                 0.0);
12307         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
12308                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
12309         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
12310                 rotationRate, 0.0);
12311         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
12312                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12313         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
12314                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12315         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
12316         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
12317         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
12318         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
12319         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
12320                 0.0);
12321         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
12322         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
12323         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
12324         assertEquals(time1, time2);
12325         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
12326         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
12327         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12328         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
12329         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
12330         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12331         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
12332         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
12333         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
12334         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
12335         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
12336         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
12337         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
12338                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
12339         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
12340                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
12341         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
12342                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
12343         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
12344         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
12345         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
12346         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
12347         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
12348         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
12349         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
12350         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
12351         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
12352         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
12353         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
12354         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
12355         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
12356         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
12357         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
12358         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
12359         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
12360         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
12361         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
12362         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
12363         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
12364         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
12365         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
12366         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
12367         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
12368         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
12369         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
12370         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
12371         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
12372         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
12373         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
12374                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
12375         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
12376         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
12377         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12378         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12379         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
12380         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
12381         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12382         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12383         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
12384         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
12385         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12386         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12387         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
12388         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
12389         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
12390         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
12391         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
12392         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
12393         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
12394         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
12395         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
12396 
12397         // Force IllegalArgumentException
12398         calibrator = null;
12399         try {
12400             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
12401                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12402                     bias, mg, gg);
12403             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12404         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12405         }
12406         try {
12407             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12408                     ecefPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
12409                     bias, mg, gg);
12410             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12411         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12412         }
12413         try {
12414             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12415                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias,
12416                     mg, gg);
12417             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12418         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12419         }
12420         try {
12421             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12422                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12423                     new double[1], mg, gg);
12424             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12425         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12426         }
12427         try {
12428             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12429                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
12430                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
12431             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12432         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12433         }
12434         try {
12435             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12436                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
12437                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
12438             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12439         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12440         }
12441         try {
12442             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12443                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
12444                     new Matrix(1, 3));
12445             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12446         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12447         }
12448         try {
12449             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
12450                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
12451                     new Matrix(3, 1));
12452             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12453         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12454         }
12455         assertNull(calibrator);
12456     }
12457 
12458     @Test
12459     public void testConstructor38() throws WrongSizeException {
12460         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
12461         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
12462                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
12463         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
12464                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
12465         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
12466         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
12467         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
12468         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
12469         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
12470         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
12471                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
12472 
12473         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
12474         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
12475                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
12476         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
12477                 Collections.emptyList();
12478         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
12479         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
12480         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
12481 
12482         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
12483         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
12484         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
12485         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
12486 
12487         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
12488         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
12489         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
12490         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
12491         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
12492         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
12493         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
12494         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
12495         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
12496 
12497         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
12498         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
12499                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12500                         qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12501                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12502                         bias, mg, gg, this);
12503 
12504         // check default values
12505         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
12506                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
12507         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
12508         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
12509                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
12510         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
12511                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
12512         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
12513         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
12514         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
12515         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
12516         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
12517         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12518         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12519         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
12520                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12521         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
12522         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
12523         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
12524         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12525         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12526         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
12527                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12528         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
12529         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
12530         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
12531         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
12532         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12533         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
12534                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12535         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
12536         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
12537         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
12538         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
12539         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
12540         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
12541         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
12542         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
12543         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
12544         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12545         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
12546         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12547         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12548         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12549         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12550         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12551         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12552         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
12553         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
12554         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
12555         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
12556         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
12557         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12558         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
12559         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
12560         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
12561         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
12562         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12563         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
12564         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
12565         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12566         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
12567                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12568         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
12569         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
12570         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
12571         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
12572         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12573         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
12574                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12575         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
12576         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
12577         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
12578         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
12579         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12580         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
12581                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12582         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
12583         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
12584         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
12585         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
12586         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
12587         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12588         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12589         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
12590         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
12591         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
12592         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
12593         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
12594         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
12595         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
12596         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
12597         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
12598         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
12599         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
12600         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
12601         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
12602         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
12603         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
12604         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
12605         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
12606         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
12607         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
12608         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12609         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
12610         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
12611         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
12612         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
12613         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12614         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
12615         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
12616         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
12617         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
12618         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12619         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
12620         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
12621         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
12622                 0.0);
12623         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
12624                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
12625         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
12626                 rotationRate, 0.0);
12627         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
12628                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12629         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
12630                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12631         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
12632         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
12633         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
12634         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
12635         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
12636                 0.0);
12637         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
12638         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
12639         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
12640         assertEquals(time1, time2);
12641         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
12642         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
12643         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12644         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
12645         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
12646         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12647         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
12648         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
12649         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
12650         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
12651         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
12652         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
12653         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
12654                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
12655         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
12656                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
12657         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
12658                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
12659         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
12660         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
12661         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
12662         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
12663         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
12664         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
12665         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
12666         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
12667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
12668         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
12669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
12670         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
12671         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
12672         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
12673         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
12674         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
12675         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
12676         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
12677         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
12678         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
12679         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
12680         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
12681         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
12682         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
12683         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
12684         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
12685         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
12686         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
12687         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
12688         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
12689         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
12690                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
12691         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
12692         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
12693         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12694         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12695         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
12696         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
12697         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12698         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12699         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
12700         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
12701         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
12702         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
12703         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
12704         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
12705         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
12706         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
12707         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
12708         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
12709         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
12710         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
12711         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
12712 
12713         // Force IllegalArgumentException
12714         calibrator = null;
12715         try {
12716             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
12717                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12718                     bias, mg, gg, this);
12719             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12720         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12721 
12722         }
12723         try {
12724             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12725                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12726                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
12727                     bias, mg, gg, this);
12728             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12729         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12730         }
12731         try {
12732             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12733                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12734                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
12735                     this);
12736             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12737         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12738         }
12739         try {
12740             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12741                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12742                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
12743                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
12744             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12745         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12746         }
12747         try {
12748             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12749                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12750                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
12751                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
12752             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12753         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12754         }
12755         try {
12756             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12757                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12758                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
12759                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
12760             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12761         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12762         }
12763         try {
12764             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12765                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12766                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
12767                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
12768             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12769         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12770         }
12771         try {
12772             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12773                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
12774                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
12775                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
12776             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
12777         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
12778         }
12779         assertNull(calibrator);
12780     }
12781 
12782     @Test
12783     public void testConstructor39() throws WrongSizeException {
12784         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
12785         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
12786                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
12787         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
12788                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
12789         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
12790         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
12791         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
12792         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
12793         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
12794         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
12795                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
12796 
12797         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
12798         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
12799                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
12800         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
12801                 Collections.emptyList();
12802         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
12803         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
12804         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
12805 
12806         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
12807         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
12808         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
12809         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
12810 
12811         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
12812         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
12813         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
12814         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
12815         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
12816         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
12817         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
12818         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
12819         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
12820 
12821         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
12822         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
12823         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
12824 
12825         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
12826         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
12827         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
12828 
12829         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
12830         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
12831         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
12832         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
12833         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
12834         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
12835         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
12836         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
12837         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
12838 
12839         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
12840         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
12841                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
12842                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
12843                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
12844                         accelerometerBias, ma);
12845 
12846         // check default values
12847         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
12848                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
12849         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
12850         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
12851                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
12852         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
12853                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
12854         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
12855         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
12856         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
12857         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
12858         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
12859         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
12860         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12861         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
12862                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12863         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
12864         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
12865         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
12866         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
12867         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12868         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
12869                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12870         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
12871         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
12872         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
12873         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
12874         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12875         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
12876                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
12877         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
12878         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
12879         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
12880         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
12881         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
12882         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
12883         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
12884         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
12885         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
12886         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12887         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
12888         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
12889         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
12890         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
12891         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
12892         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
12893         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
12894         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
12895         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
12896         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
12897         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
12898         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
12899         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12900         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
12901         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
12902         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
12903         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
12904         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12905         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
12906         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
12907         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12908         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
12909                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12910         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
12911         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
12912         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
12913         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
12914         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12915         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
12916                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12917         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
12918         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
12919         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
12920         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
12921         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12922         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
12923                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12924         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
12925         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
12926         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
12927         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
12928         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
12929         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
12930         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12931         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
12932         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
12933         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
12934         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
12935         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
12936         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
12937         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
12938         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
12939         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
12940         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
12941         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
12942         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
12943         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
12944         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
12945         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
12946         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
12947         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
12948         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
12949         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
12950         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
12951         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
12952         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
12953         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
12954         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
12955         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12956         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
12957         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
12958         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
12959         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
12960         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
12961         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
12962         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
12963         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
12964                 0.0);
12965         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
12966                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
12967         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
12968                 rotationRate, 0.0);
12969         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
12970                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
12971         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
12972                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
12973         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
12974         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
12975         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
12976         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
12977         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
12978                 0.0);
12979         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
12980         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
12981         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
12982         assertEquals(time1, time2);
12983         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
12984         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
12985         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12986         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
12987         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
12988         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
12989         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
12990         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
12991         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
12992         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
12993         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
12994         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
12995         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
12996                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
12997         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
12998                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
12999         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
13000                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
13001         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
13002         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
13003         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
13004         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
13005         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
13006         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
13007         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
13008         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
13009         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
13010         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
13011         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
13012         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
13013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
13014         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
13015         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
13016         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
13017         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
13018         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
13019         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
13020         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
13021         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
13022         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
13023         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
13024         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
13025         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
13026         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
13027         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
13028         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
13029         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
13030         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
13031         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
13032                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
13033         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
13034         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
13035         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13036         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13037         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
13038         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
13039         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13040         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13041         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
13042         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
13043         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13044         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13045         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
13046         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
13047         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
13048         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
13049         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
13050         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
13051         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
13052         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
13053         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
13054 
13055         // Force IllegalArgumentException
13056         calibrator = null;
13057         try {
13058             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13059                     new double[9], ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval,
13060                     measurements, bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
13061             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13062         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13063         }

13066                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,

13113         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

13121             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13122         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

13129             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13130         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

13150 
13151     @Test
13152     public void testConstructor40() throws WrongSizeException {
13153         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
13154         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
13155                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
13156         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
13157                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
13158         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
13159         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
13160         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
13161         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
13162         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
13163         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
13164                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
13165 
13166         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
13167         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
13168                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
13169         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
13170                 Collections.emptyList();
13171         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
13172         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
13173         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
13174 
13175         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
13176         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
13177         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
13178         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
13179 
13180         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
13181         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
13182         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
13183         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
13184         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
13185         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
13186         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
13187         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
13188         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
13189 
13190         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
13191         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
13192         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
13193 
13194         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
13195         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
13196         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
13197 
13198         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
13199         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
13200         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
13201         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
13202         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
13203         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
13204         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
13205         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
13206         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
13207 
13208         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
13209         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
13210                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
13211                         ecefPosition, rotationRate,
13212                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
13213                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
13214 
13215         // check default values
13216         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
13217                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
13218         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
13219         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
13220                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
13221         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
13222                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
13223         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
13224         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
13225         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
13226         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
13227         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
13228         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
13229         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13230         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
13231                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13232         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
13233         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
13234         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
13235         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
13236         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13237         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
13238                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13239         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
13240         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
13241         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
13242         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
13243         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13244         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
13245                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13246         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
13247         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
13248         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
13249         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
13250         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
13251         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
13252         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
13253         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
13254         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
13255         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
13256         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
13257         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
13258         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
13259         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
13260         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
13261         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
13262         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
13263         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
13264         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
13265         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
13266         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
13267         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
13268         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13269         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
13270         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
13271         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
13272         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
13273         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
13274         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
13275         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
13276         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13277         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
13278                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
13279         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
13280         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
13281         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
13282         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
13283         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13284         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
13285                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13286         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
13287         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
13288         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
13289         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
13290         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13291         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
13292                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13293         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
13294         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
13295         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
13296         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
13297         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
13298         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
13299         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13300         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
13301         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
13302         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
13303         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
13304         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
13305         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
13306         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
13307         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
13308         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
13309         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
13310         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
13311         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
13312         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
13313         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
13314         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
13315         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
13316         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
13317         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
13318         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
13319         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
13320         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
13321         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
13322         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
13323         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
13324         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13325         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
13326         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
13327         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
13328         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
13329         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13330         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
13331         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
13332         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
13333                 0.0);
13334         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
13335                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
13336         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
13337                 rotationRate, 0.0);
13338         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
13339                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13340         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
13341                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
13342         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
13343         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
13344         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
13345         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
13346         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
13347                 0.0);
13348         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
13349         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
13350         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
13351         assertEquals(time1, time2);
13352         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
13353         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
13354         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
13355         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
13356         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
13357         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
13358         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
13359         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
13360         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
13361         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
13362         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
13363         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
13364         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
13365                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
13366         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
13367                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
13368         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
13369                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
13370         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
13371         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
13372         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
13373         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
13374         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
13375         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
13376         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
13377         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
13378         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
13379         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
13380         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
13381         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
13382         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
13383         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
13384         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
13385         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
13386         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
13387         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
13388         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
13389         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
13390         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
13391         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
13392         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
13393         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
13394         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
13395         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
13396         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
13397         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
13398         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
13399         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
13400         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
13401                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
13402         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
13403         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
13404         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13405         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13406         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
13407         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
13408         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13409         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13410         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
13411         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
13412         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13413         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13414         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
13415         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
13416         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
13417         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
13418         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
13419         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
13420         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
13421         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
13422         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
13423 
13424         // Force IllegalArgumentException
13425         calibrator = null;
13426         try {
13427             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
13428                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
13429                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
13430             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13431         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13432         }
13433         try {
13434             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13435                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13436                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
13437                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
13438             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13439         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13440         }
13441         try {
13442             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13443                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13444                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
13445                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
13446             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13447         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13448         }
13449         try {
13450             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13451                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13452                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
13453                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
13454             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13455         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13456         }
13457         try {
13458             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13459                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13460                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
13461                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
13462                     ma, this);
13463             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13464         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13465         }
13466         try {
13467             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13468                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13469                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
13470                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
13471                     ma, this);
13472             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13473         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13474         }
13475         try {
13476             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13477                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13478                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
13479                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
13480                     ma, this);
13481             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13482         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13483         }
13484         try {
