13485             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13486                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13487                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
13488                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
13489                     ma, this);
13490             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13491         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13492         }
13493         try {
13494             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13495                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13496                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
13497                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
13498             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13499         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13500         }
13501         try {
13502             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13503                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13504                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
13505                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
13506             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13507         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13508         }
13509         try {
13510             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13511                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13512                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
13513                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
13514             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13515         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13516         }
13517         assertNull(calibrator);
13518     }
13519 
13520     @Test
13521     public void testConstructor41() throws WrongSizeException {
13522         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
13523         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
13524                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
13525         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
13526                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
13527         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
13528         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
13529         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
13530         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
13531         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
13532         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
13533                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
13534 
13535         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
13536         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
13537                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
13538         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
13539                 Collections.emptyList();
13540         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
13541         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
13542         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
13543 
13544         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
13545         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
13546         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
13547         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
13548 
13549         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
13550         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
13551         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
13552         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
13553         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
13554         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
13555         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
13556         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
13557         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
13558 
13559         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
13560         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
13561         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
13562 
13563         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
13564         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
13565         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
13566 
13567         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
13568         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
13569         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
13570         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
13571         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
13572         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
13573         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
13574         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
13575         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
13576 
13577         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
13578         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
13579                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
13580                         ecefPosition, rotationRate,
13581                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
13582                         ba, ma);
13583 
13584         // check default values
13585         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
13586                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
13587         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
13588         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
13589                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
13590         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
13591                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
13592         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
13593         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
13594         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
13595         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
13596         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
13597         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
13598         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13599         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
13600                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13601         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
13602         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
13603         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
13604         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
13605         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13606         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
13607                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13608         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
13609         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
13610         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
13611         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
13612         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13613         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
13614                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13615         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
13616         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
13617         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
13618         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
13619         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
13620         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
13621         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
13622         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
13623         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
13624         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
13625         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
13626         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
13627         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
13628         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
13629         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
13630         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
13631         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
13632         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
13633         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
13634         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
13635         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
13636         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
13637         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13638         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
13639         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
13640         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
13641         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
13642         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
13643         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
13644         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
13645         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13646         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
13647                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
13648         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
13649         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
13650         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
13651         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
13652         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13653         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
13654                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13655         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
13656         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
13657         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
13658         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
13659         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13660         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
13661                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13662         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
13663         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
13664         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
13665         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
13666         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
13667         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
13668         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13669         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
13670         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
13671         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
13672         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
13673         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
13674         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
13675         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
13676         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
13677         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
13678         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
13679         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
13680         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
13681         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
13682         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
13683         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
13684         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
13685         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
13686         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
13687         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
13688         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
13689         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
13690         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
13691         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
13692         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
13693         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13694         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
13695         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
13696         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
13697         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
13698         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
13699         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
13700         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
13701         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
13702                 0.0);
13703         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
13704                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
13705         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
13706                 rotationRate, 0.0);
13707         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
13708                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
13709         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
13710                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
13711         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
13712         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
13713         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
13714         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
13715         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
13716                 0.0);
13717         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
13718         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
13719         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
13720         assertEquals(time1, time2);
13721         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
13722         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
13723         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
13724         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
13725         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
13726         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
13727         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
13728         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
13729         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
13730         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
13731         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
13732         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
13733         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
13734                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
13735         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
13736                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
13737         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
13738                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
13739         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
13740         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
13741         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
13742         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
13743         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
13744         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
13745         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
13746         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
13747         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
13748         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
13749         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
13750         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
13751         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
13752         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
13753         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
13754         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
13755         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
13756         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
13757         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
13758         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
13759         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
13760         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
13761         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
13762         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
13763         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
13764         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
13765         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
13766         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
13767         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
13768         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
13769         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
13770                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
13771         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
13772         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
13773         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13774         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13775         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
13776         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
13777         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13778         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13779         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
13780         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
13781         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
13782         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
13783         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
13784         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
13785         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
13786         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
13787         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
13788         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
13789         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
13790         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
13791         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
13792 
13793         // Force IllegalArgumentException
13794         calibrator = null;
13795         try {
13796             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13797                     new double[9], ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval,
13798                     measurements, bg, mg, gg, ba, ma);
13799             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13800         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13801         }
13802         try {
13803             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13804                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13805                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
13806                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma);
13807             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13808         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13809         }
13810         try {
13811             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13812                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13813                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
13814                     ba, ma);
13815             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13816         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13817         }
13818         try {
13819             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13820                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13821                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
13822                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
13823             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13824         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13825         }
13826         try {
13827             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13828                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13829                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
13830                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
13831             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13832         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13833         }
13834         try {
13835             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13836                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13837                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
13838                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
13839             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13840         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13841         }
13842         try {
13843             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13844                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13845                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
13846                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
13847             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13848         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13849         }
13850         try {
13851             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13852                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13853                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
13854                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
13855             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13856         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13857         }
13858         try {
13859             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13860                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13861                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
13862                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
13863             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13864         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13865         }
13866         try {
13867             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13868                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13869                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
13870                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
13871             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13872         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13873         }
13874         try {
13875             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13876                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13877                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
13878                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
13879             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13880         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13881         }
13882         try {
13883             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13884                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13885                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
13886                     ba, new Matrix(1, 3));
13887             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13888         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13889         }
13890         try {
13891             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
13892                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
13893                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
13894                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1));
13895             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
13896         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
13897         }
13898         assertNull(calibrator);
13899     }
13900 
13901     @Test
13902     public void testConstructor42() throws WrongSizeException {
13903         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
13904         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
13905                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
13906         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
13907                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
13908         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
13909         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
13910         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
13911         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
13912         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
13913         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
13914                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
13915 
13916         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
13917         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
13918                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
13919         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
13920                 Collections.emptyList();
13921         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
13922         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
13923         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
13924 
13925         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
13926         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
13927         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
13928         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
13929 
13930         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
13931         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
13932         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
13933         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
13934         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
13935         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
13936         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
13937         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
13938         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
13939 
13940         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
13941         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
13942         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
13943 
13944         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
13945         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
13946         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
13947 
13948         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
13949         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
13950         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
13951         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
13952         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
13953         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
13954         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
13955         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
13956         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
13957 
13958         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
13959         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
13960                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
13961                         ecefPosition, rotationRate,
13962                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg, ba, ma,
13963                         this);
13964 
13965         // check default values
13966         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
13967                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
13968         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
13969         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
13970                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
13971         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
13972                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
13973         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
13974         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
13975         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
13976         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
13977         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
13978         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
13979         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13980         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
13981                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13982         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
13983         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
13984         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
13985         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
13986         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13987         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
13988                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13989         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
13990         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
13991         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
13992         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
13993         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13994         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
13995                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
13996         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
13997         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
13998         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
13999         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
14000         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
14001         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
14002         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
14003         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
14004         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
14005         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14006         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
14007         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
14008         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
14009         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
14010         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
14011         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
14012         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
14013         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
14014         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
14015         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
14016         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
14017         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
14018         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14019         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
14020         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
14021         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
14022         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
14023         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14024         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
14025         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
14026         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14027         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
14028                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14029         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
14030         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
14031         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
14032         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
14033         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14034         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
14035                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14036         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
14037         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
14038         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
14039         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
14040         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14041         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
14042                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14043         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
14044         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
14045         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
14046         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
14047         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
14048         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14049         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14050         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
14051         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
14052         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
14053         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
14054         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
14055         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
14056         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
14057         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
14058         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
14059         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
14060         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
14061         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
14062         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
14063         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
14064         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
14065         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
14066         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
14067         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
14068         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
14069         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14070         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
14071         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
14072         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
14073         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
14074         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14075         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
14076         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
14077         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
14078         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
14079         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14080         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
14081         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
14082         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
14083                 0.0);
14084         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
14085                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
14086         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
14087                 rotationRate, 0.0);
14088         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
14089                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14090         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
14091                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14092         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
14093         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
14094         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
14095         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
14096         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
14097                 0.0);
14098         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
14099         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
14100         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
14101         assertEquals(time1, time2);
14102         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
14103         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
14104         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14105         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
14106         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
14107         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14108         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
14109         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
14110         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
14111         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
14112         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
14113         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
14114         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
14115                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
14116         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
14117                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
14118         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
14119                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
14120         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
14121         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
14122         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
14123         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
14124         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
14125         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
14126         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
14127         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
14128         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
14129         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
14130         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
14131         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
14132         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
14133         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
14134         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
14135         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
14136         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
14137         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
14138         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
14139         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
14140         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
14141         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
14142         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
14143         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
14144         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
14145         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
14146         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
14147         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
14148         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
14149         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
14150         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
14151                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
14152         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
14153         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
14154         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14155         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14156         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
14157         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
14158         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14159         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14160         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
14161         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
14162         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14163         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14164         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
14165         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
14166         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
14167         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
14168         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
14169         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
14170         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
14171         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
14172         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
14173 
14174         // Force IllegalArgumentException
14175         calibrator = null;
14176         try {
14177             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
14178                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14179                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
14180             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14181         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14182         }
14183         try {
14184             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14185                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14186                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
14187                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
14188             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14189         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14190         }
14191         try {
14192             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14193                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14194                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
14195                     ba, ma, this);
14196             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14197         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14198         }
14199         try {
14200             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14201                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14202                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14203                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
14204             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14205         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14206         }
14207         try {
14208             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14209                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14210                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14211                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
14212             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14213         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14214         }
14215         try {
14216             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14217                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14218                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
14219                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma, this);
14220             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14221         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14222         }
14223         try {
14224             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14225                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14226                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
14227                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma, this);
14228             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14229         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14230         }
14231         try {
14232             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14233                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14234                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
14235                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma, this);
14236             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14237         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14238         }
14239         try {
14240             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14241                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14242                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
14243                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma, this);
14244             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14245         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14246         }
14247         try {
14248             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14249                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14250                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
14251                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma, this);
14252             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14253         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14254         }
14255         try {
14256             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14257                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14258                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
14259                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma, this);
14260             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14261         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14262         }
14263         try {
14264             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14265                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14266                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
14267                     ba, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
14268             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14269         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14270         }
14271         try {
14272             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14273                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14274                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
14275                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
14276             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14277         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14278         }
14279         assertNull(calibrator);
14280     }
14281 
14282     @Test
14283     public void testConstructor43() throws WrongSizeException {
14284         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
14285         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
14286                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
14287         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
14288                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
14289         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
14290         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
14291         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
14292         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
14293         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
14294         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
14295                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
14296 
14297         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
14298         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
14299                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
14300         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
14301                 Collections.emptyList();
14302         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
14303         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
14304         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
14305 
14306         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
14307         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
14308         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
14309         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
14310 
14311         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
14312         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
14313         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
14314         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
14315         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
14316         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
14317         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
14318         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
14319         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
14320 
14321         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
14322         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
14323                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14324                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
14325                         timeInterval, measurements,
14326                         false, false, bg, mg, gg);
14327 
14328         // check default values
14329         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
14330                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
14331         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
14332         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
14333                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
14334         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
14335                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
14336         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
14337         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
14338         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
14339         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
14340         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
14341         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14342         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14343         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
14344                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14345         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
14346         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
14347         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
14348         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14349         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14350         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
14351                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14352         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
14353         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
14354         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
14355         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14356         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14357         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
14358                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14359         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
14360         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
14361         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
14362         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
14363         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
14364         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
14365         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
14366         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
14367         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
14368         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14369         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
14370         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14371         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14372         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14373         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14374         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14375         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14376         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14377         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14378         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14379         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
14380         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
14381         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14382         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
14383         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
14384         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
14385         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
14386         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14387         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
14388         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
14389         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14390         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
14391                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14392         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
14393         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
14394         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
14395         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
14396         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14397         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
14398                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14399         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
14400         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
14401         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
14402         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
14403         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14404         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
14405                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14406         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
14407         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
14408         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
14409         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
14410         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
14411         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14412         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14413         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
14414         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
14415         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
14416         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
14417         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
14418         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
14419         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
14420         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
14421         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
14422         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
14423         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
14424         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
14425         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
14426         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
14427         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
14428         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
14429         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
14430         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
14431         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
14432         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14433         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
14434         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
14435         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
14436         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
14437         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14438         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
14439         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
14440         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
14441         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
14442         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14443         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
14444         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
14445         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
14446                 0.0);
14447         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
14448                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
14449         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
14450                 rotationRate, 0.0);
14451         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
14452                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14453         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
14454                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14455         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
14456         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
14457         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
14458         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
14459         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
14460                 0.0);
14461         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
14462         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
14463         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
14464         assertEquals(time1, time2);
14465         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
14466         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
14467         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14468         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
14469         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
14470         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14471         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
14472         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
14473         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
14474         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
14475         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
14476         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
14477         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
14478                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
14479         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
14480                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
14481         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
14482                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
14483         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
14484         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
14485         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
14486         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
14487         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
14488         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
14489         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
14490         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
14491         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
14492         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
14493         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
14494         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
14495         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
14496         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
14497         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
14498         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
14499         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
14500         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
14501         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
14502         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
14503         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
14504         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
14505         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
14506         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
14507         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
14508         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
14509         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
14510         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
14511         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
14512         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
14513         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
14514                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
14515         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
14516         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
14517         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14518         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14519         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
14520         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
14521         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14522         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14523         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
14524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
14525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14526         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14527         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
14528         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
14529         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
14530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
14531         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
14532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
14533         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
14534         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
14535         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
14536 
14537         // Force IllegalArgumentException
14538         calibrator = null;
14539         try {
14540             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
14541                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14542                     true, false, bg, mg, gg);
14543             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14544         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14545         }
14546         try {
14547             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14548                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14549                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
14550                     true, false, bg, mg, gg);
14551             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14552         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14553         }
14554         try {
14555             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14556                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14557                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
14558                     true,
14559                     false, bg, mg, gg);
14560             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14561         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14562         }
14563         try {
14564             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14565                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14566                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14567                     true,
14568                     false,
14569                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
14570             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14571         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14572         }
14573         try {
14574             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14575                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14576                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14577                     true,
14578                     false,
14579                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
14580             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14581         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14582         }
14583         try {
14584             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14585                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14586                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14587                     true,
14588                     false, bg,
14589                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
14590             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14591         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14592         }
14593         try {
14594             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14595                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14596                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14597                     true,
14598                     false,
14599                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
14600             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14601         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14602         }
14603         try {
14604             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14605                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14606                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14607                     true,
14608                     false,
14609                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
14610             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14611         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14612         }
14613         try {
14614             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14615                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14616                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14617                     true,
14618                     false,
14619                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
14620             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14621         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14622         }
14623         assertNull(calibrator);
14624     }
14625 
14626     @Test
14627     public void testConstructor44() throws WrongSizeException {
14628         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
14629         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
14630                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
14631         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
14632                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
14633         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
14634         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
14635         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
14636         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
14637         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
14638         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
14639                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
14640 
14641         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
14642         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
14643                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
14644         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
14645                 Collections.emptyList();
14646         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
14647         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
14648         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
14649 
14650         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
14651         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
14652         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
14653         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
14654 
14655         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
14656         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
14657         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
14658         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
14659         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
14660         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
14661         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
14662         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
14663         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
14664 
14665         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
14666         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
14667                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14668                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
14669                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
14670                         false, bg, mg, gg, this);
14671 
14672         // check default values
14673         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
14674                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
14675         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
14676         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
14677                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
14678         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
14679                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
14680         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
14681         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
14682         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
14683         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
14684         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
14685         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14686         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14687         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
14688                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14689         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
14690         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
14691         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
14692         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14693         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14694         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
14695                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14696         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
14697         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
14698         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
14699         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
14700         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14701         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
14702                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
14703         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
14704         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
14705         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
14706         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
14707         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
14708         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
14709         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
14710         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
14711         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
14712         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14713         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
14714         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14715         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14716         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14717         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14718         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14719         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14720         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
14721         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
14722         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
14723         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
14724         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
14725         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14726         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
14727         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
14728         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
14729         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
14730         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14731         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
14732         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
14733         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14734         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
14735                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14736         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
14737         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
14738         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
14739         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
14740         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14741         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
14742                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14743         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
14744         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
14745         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
14746         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
14747         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14748         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
14749                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14750         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
14751         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
14752         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
14753         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
14754         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
14755         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
14756         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14757         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
14758         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
14759         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
14760         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
14761         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
14762         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
14763         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
14764         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
14765         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
14766         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
14767         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
14768         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
14769         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
14770         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
14771         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
14772         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
14773         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
14774         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
14775         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
14776         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
14777         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
