14778         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
14779         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
14780         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
14781         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14782         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
14783         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
14784         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
14785         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
14786         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
14787         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
14788         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
14789         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
14790                 0.0);
14791         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
14792                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
14793         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
14794                 rotationRate, 0.0);
14795         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
14796                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
14797         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
14798                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
14799         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
14800         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
14801         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
14802         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
14803         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
14804                 0.0);
14805         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
14806         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
14807         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
14808         assertEquals(time1, time2);
14809         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
14810         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
14811         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14812         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
14813         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
14814         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
14815         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
14816         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
14817         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
14818         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
14819         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
14820         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
14821         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
14822                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
14823         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
14824                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
14825         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
14826                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
14827         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
14828         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
14829         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
14830         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
14831         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
14832         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
14833         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
14834         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
14835         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
14836         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
14837         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
14838         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
14839         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
14840         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
14841         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
14842         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
14843         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
14844         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
14845         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
14846         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
14847         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
14848         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
14849         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
14850         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
14851         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
14852         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
14853         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
14854         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
14855         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
14856         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
14857         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
14858                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
14859         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
14860         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
14861         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14862         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14863         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
14864         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
14865         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14866         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
14868         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
14869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
14870         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
14871         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
14872         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
14873         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
14874         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
14875         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
14876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
14877         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
14878         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
14879         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
14880 
14881         // Force IllegalArgumentException
14882         calibrator = null;
14883         try {
14884             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
14885                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14886                     true, false, bg, mg, gg, this);
14887             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14888         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14889         }
14890         try {
14891             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14892                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14893                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
14894                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
14895                     this);
14896             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14897         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14898         }
14899         try {
14900             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14901                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14902                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
14903                     true,
14904                     false, bg, mg, gg, this);
14905             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14906         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14907         }
14908         try {
14909             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14910                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14911                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14912                     true,
14913                     false,
14914                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, this);
14915             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14916         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14917         }
14918         try {
14919             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14920                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14921                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14922                     true,
14923                     false,
14924                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, this);
14925             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14926         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14927         }
14928         try {
14929             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14930                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14931                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14932                     true,
14933                     false, bg,
14934                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
14935             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14936         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14937         }
14938         try {
14939             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14940                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14941                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14942                     true,
14943                     false,
14944                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
14945             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14946         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14947         }
14948         try {
14949             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14950                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14951                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14952                     true,
14953                     false,
14954                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
14955             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14956         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14957         }
14958         try {
14959             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
14960                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
14961                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
14962                     true,
14963                     false,
14964                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
14965             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
14966         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
14967         }
14968         assertNull(calibrator);
14969     }
14970 
14971     @Test
14972     public void testConstructor45() throws WrongSizeException {
14973         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
14974         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
14975                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
14976         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
14977                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
14978         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
14979         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
14980         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
14981         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
14982         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
14983         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
14984                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
14985 
14986         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
14987         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
14988                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
14989         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
14990                 Collections.emptyList();
14991         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
14992         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
14993         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
14994 
14995         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
14996         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
14997         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
14998         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
14999 
15000         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
15001         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
15002         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
15003         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
15004         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
15005         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
15006         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
15007         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
15008         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
15009 
15010         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
15011         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
15012                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15013                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
15014                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
15015                         false, bias, mg, gg);
15016 
15017         // check default values
15018         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
15019                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
15020         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
15021         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
15022                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
15023         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
15024                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
15025         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
15026         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
15027         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
15028         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
15029         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
15030         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15031         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15032         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
15033                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15034         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
15035         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
15036         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
15037         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15038         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15039         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
15040                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15041         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
15042         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
15043         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
15044         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15045         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15046         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
15047                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15048         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
15049         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
15050         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
15051         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
15052         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
15053         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
15054         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
15055         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
15056         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
15057         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15058         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
15059         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15060         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15061         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15062         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15063         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15064         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15065         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15066         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15067         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15068         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
15069         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
15070         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15071         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
15072         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
15073         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
15074         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
15075         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15076         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
15077         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
15078         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15079         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
15080                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15081         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
15082         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
15083         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
15084         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
15085         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15086         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
15087                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15088         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
15089         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
15090         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
15091         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
15092         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15093         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
15094                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15095         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
15096         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
15097         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
15098         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
15099         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
15100         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15101         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15102         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
15103         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
15104         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
15105         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
15106         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
15107         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
15108         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
15109         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
15110         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
15111         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
15112         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
15113         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
15114         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
15115         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
15116         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
15117         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
15118         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
15119         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
15120         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
15121         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15122         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
15123         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
15124         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
15125         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
15126         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15127         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
15128         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
15129         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
15130         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
15131         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15132         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
15133         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
15134         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
15135                 0.0);
15136         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
15137                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
15138         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
15139                 rotationRate, 0.0);
15140         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
15141                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15142         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
15143                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15144         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
15145         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
15146         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
15147         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
15148         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
15149                 0.0);
15150         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
15151         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
15152         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
15153         assertEquals(time1, time2);
15154         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
15155         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
15156         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15157         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
15158         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
15159         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15160         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
15161         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
15162         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
15163         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
15164         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
15165         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
15166         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
15167                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
15168         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
15169                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
15170         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
15171                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
15172         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
15173         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
15174         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
15175         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
15176         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
15177         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
15178         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
15179         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
15180         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
15181         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
15182         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
15183         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
15184         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
15185         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
15186         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
15187         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
15188         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
15189         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
15190         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
15191         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
15192         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
15193         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
15194         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
15195         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
15196         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
15197         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
15198         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
15199         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
15200         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
15201         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
15202         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
15203                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
15204         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
15205         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
15206         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15207         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15208         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
15209         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
15210         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15211         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15212         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
15213         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
15214         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15215         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15216         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
15217         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
15218         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
15219         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
15220         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
15221         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
15222         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
15223         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
15224         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
15225 
15226         // Force IllegalArgumentException
15227         calibrator = null;
15228         try {
15229             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
15230                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15231                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
15232             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15233         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15234         }
15235         try {
15236             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15237                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15238                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
15239                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
15240             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15241         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15242         }
15243         try {
15244             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15245                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15246                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
15247                     true,
15248                     false, bias, mg, gg);
15249             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15250         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15251         }
15252         try {
15253             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15254                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15255                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15256                     true,
15257                     false,
15258                     new double[1], mg, gg);
15259             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15260         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15261         }
15262         try {
15263             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15264                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15265                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15266                     true,
15267                     false, bias,
15268                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
15269             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15270         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15271         }
15272         try {
15273             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15274                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15275                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15276                     true,
15277                     false,
15278                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
15279             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15280         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15281         }
15282         try {
15283             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15284                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15285                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15286                     true,
15287                     false,
15288                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
15289             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15290         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15291         }
15292         try {
15293             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15294                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15295                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15296                     true,
15297                     false,
15298                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
15299             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15300         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15301         }
15302         assertNull(calibrator);
15303     }
15304 
15305     @Test
15306     public void testConstructor46() throws WrongSizeException {
15307         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
15308         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
15309                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
15310         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
15311                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
15312         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
15313         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
15314         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
15315         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
15316         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
15317         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
15318                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
15319 
15320         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
15321         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
15322                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
15323         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
15324                 Collections.emptyList();
15325         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
15326         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
15327         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
15328 
15329         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
15330         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
15331         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
15332         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
15333 
15334         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
15335         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
15336         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
15337         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
15338         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
15339         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
15340         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
15341         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
15342         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
15343 
15344         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
15345         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
15346                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15347                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
15348                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
15349                         false, bias, mg, gg, this);
15350 
15351         // check default values
15352         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
15353                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
15354         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
15355         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
15356                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
15357         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
15358                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
15359         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
15360         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
15361         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
15362         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
15363         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
15364         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15365         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15366         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
15367                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15368         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
15369         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
15370         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
15371         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15372         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15373         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
15374                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15375         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
15376         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
15377         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
15378         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
15379         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15380         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
15381                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15382         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
15383         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
15384         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
15385         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
15386         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
15387         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
15388         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
15389         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
15390         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
15391         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15392         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
15393         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15394         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15395         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15396         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15397         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15398         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15399         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
15400         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
15401         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
15402         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
15403         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
15404         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15405         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
15406         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
15407         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
15408         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
15409         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15410         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
15411         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
15412         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15413         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
15414                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15415         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
15416         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
15417         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
15418         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
15419         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15420         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
15421                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15422         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
15423         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
15424         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
15425         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
15426         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15427         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
15428                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15429         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
15430         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
15431         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
15432         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
15433         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
15434         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15435         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15436         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
15437         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
15438         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
15439         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
15440         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
15441         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
15442         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
15443         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
15444         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
15445         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
15446         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
15447         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
15448         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
15449         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
15450         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
15451         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
15452         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
15453         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
15454         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
15455         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15456         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
15457         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
15458         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
15459         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
15460         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15461         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
15462         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
15463         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
15464         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
15465         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15466         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
15467         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
15468         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
15469                 0.0);
15470         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
15471                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
15472         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
15473                 rotationRate, 0.0);
15474         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
15475                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15476         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
15477                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15478         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
15479         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
15480         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
15481         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
15482         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
15483                 0.0);
15484         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
15485         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
15486         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
15487         assertEquals(time1, time2);
15488         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
15489         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
15490         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15491         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
15492         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
15493         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15494         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
15495         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
15496         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
15497         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
15498         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
15499         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
15500         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
15501                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
15502         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
15503                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
15504         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
15505                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
15506         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
15507         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
15508         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
15509         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
15510         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
15511         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
15512         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
15513         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
15514         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
15515         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
15516         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
15517         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
15518         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
15519         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
15520         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
15521         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
15522         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
15523         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
15524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
15525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
15526         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
15527         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
15528         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
15529         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
15530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
15531         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
15532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
15533         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
15534         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
15535         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
15536         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
15537                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
15538         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
15539         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
15540         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15541         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15542         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
15543         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
15544         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15545         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15546         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
15547         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
15548         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15549         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15550         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
15551         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
15552         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
15553         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
15554         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
15555         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
15556         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
15557         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
15558         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
15559 
15560         // Force IllegalArgumentException
15561         calibrator = null;
15562         try {
15563             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
15564                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15565                     true, false, bias, mg, gg, this);
15566             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15567         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15568         }
15569         try {
15570             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15571                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15572                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
15573                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
15574                     this);
15575             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15576         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15577         }
15578         try {
15579             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15580                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15581                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
15582                     true,
15583                     false, bias, mg, gg, this);
15584             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15585         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15586         }
15587         try {
15588             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15589                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15590                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15591                     true,
15592                     false,
15593                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
15594             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15595         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15596         }
15597         try {
15598             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15599                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15600                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15601                     true,
15602                     false, bias,
15603                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
15604             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15605         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15606         }
15607         try {
15608             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15609                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15610                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15611                     true,
15612                     false,
15613                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
15614             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15615         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15616         }
15617         try {
15618             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15619                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15620                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15621                     true,
15622                     false,
15623                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
15624             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15625         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15626         }
15627         try {
15628             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15629                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15630                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15631                     true,
15632                     false,
15633                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
15634             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15635         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15636         }
15637         assertNull(calibrator);
15638     }
15639 
15640     @Test
15641     public void testConstructor47() throws WrongSizeException {
15642         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
15643         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
15644                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
15645         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
15646                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
15647         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
15648         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
15649         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
15650         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
15651         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
15652         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
15653                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
15654 
15655         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
15656         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
15657                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
15658         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
15659                 Collections.emptyList();
15660         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
15661         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
15662         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
15663 
15664         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
15665         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
15666         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
15667         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
15668 
15669         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
15670         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
15671         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
15672         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
15673         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
15674         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
15675         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
15676         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
15677         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
15678 
15679         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
15680         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
15681         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
15682 
15683         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
15684         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
15685         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
15686 
15687         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
15688         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
15689         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
15690         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
15691         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
15692         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
15693         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
15694         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
15695         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
15696 
15697         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
15698         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
15699                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15700                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
15701                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
15702                         false, bias, mg, gg,
15703                         accelerometerBias, ma);
15704 
15705         // check default values
15706         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
15707                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
15708         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
15709         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
15710                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
15711         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
15712                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
15713         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
15714         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
15715         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
15716         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
15717         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
15718         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
15719         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15720         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
15721                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15722         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
15723         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
15724         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
15725         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
15726         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15727         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
15728                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15729         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
15730         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
15731         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
15732         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
15733         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15734         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
15735                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
15736         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
15737         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
15738         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
15739         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
15740         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
15741         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
15742         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
15743         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
15744         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
15745         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15746         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
15747         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
15748         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
15749         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
15750         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
15751         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
15752         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
15753         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
15754         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
15755         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
15756         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
15757         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
15758         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15759         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
15760         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
15761         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
15762         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
15763         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15764         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
15765         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
15766         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15767         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
15768                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15769         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
15770         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
15771         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
15772         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
15773         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15774         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
15775                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15776         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
15777         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
15778         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
15779         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
15780         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15781         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
15782                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15783         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
15784         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
15785         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
15786         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
15787         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
15788         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
15789         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15790         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
15791         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
15792         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
15793         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
15794         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
15795         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
15796         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
15797         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
15798         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
15799         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
15800         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
15801         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
15802         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
15803         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
15804         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
15805         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
15806         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
15807         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
15808         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
15809         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
15810         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
15811         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
15812         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
15813         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
15814         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15815         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
15816         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
15817         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
15818         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
15819         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
15820         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
15821         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
15822         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
15823                 0.0);
15824         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
15825                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
15826         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
15827                 rotationRate, 0.0);
15828         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
15829                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
15830         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
15831                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
15832         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
15833         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
15834         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
15835         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
15836         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
15837                 0.0);
15838         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
15839         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
15840         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
15841         assertEquals(time1, time2);
15842         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
15843         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
15844         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15845         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
15846         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
15847         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
15848         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
15849         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
15850         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
15851         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
15852         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
15853         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
15854         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
15855                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
15856         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
15857                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
15858         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
15859                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
15860         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
15861         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
15862         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
15863         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
15864         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
15865         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
15866         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
15867         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
15868         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
15869         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
15870         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
15871         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
15872         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
15873         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
15874         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
15875         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
15876         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
15877         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
15878         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
15879         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
15880         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
15881         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
15882         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
15883         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
15884         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
15885         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
15886         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
15887         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
15888         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
15889         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
15890         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
15891                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
15892         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
15893         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
15894         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15895         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15896         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
15897         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
15898         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15899         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15900         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
15901         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
15902         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
15903         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
15904         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
15905         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
15906         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
15907         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
15908         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
15909         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
15910         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
15911         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
15912         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
15913 
15914         // Force IllegalArgumentException
15915         calibrator = null;
15916         try {
15917             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
15918                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15919                     true, false, bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
15920             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15921         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15922         }
15923         try {
15924             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15925                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15926                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
15927                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
15928                     accelerometerBias, ma);
15929             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15930         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15931         }
15932         try {
15933             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15934                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15935                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
15936                     true,
15937                     false, bias, mg, gg,
15938                     accelerometerBias, ma);
15939             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15940         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15941         }
15942         try {
15943             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15944                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15945                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15946                     true,
15947                     false,
15948                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
15949             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15950         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15951         }
15952         try {
15953             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15954                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15955                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15956                     true,
15957                     false, bias,
15958                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
15959             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15960         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15961         }
15962         try {
15963             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15964                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15965                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15966                     true,
15967                     false,
15968                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
15969             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15970         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15971         }
15972         try {
15973             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15974                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15975                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15976                     true,
15977                     false,
15978                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma);
15979             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15980         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15981         }
15982         try {
15983             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15984                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15985                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15986                     true,
15987                     false,
15988                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma);
15989             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
15990         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
15991         }
15992         try {
15993             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
15994                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
15995                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
15996                     true,
15997                     false,
15998                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
15999             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16000         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16001         }
16002         try {
16003             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16004                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16005                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16006                     true,
16007                     false,
16008                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
16009                     new Matrix(1, 3));
16010             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16011         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16012         }
16013         try {
16014             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16015                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16016                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16017                     true,
16018                     false,
16019                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
16020                     new Matrix(3, 1));
16021             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16022         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16023         }
16024         assertNull(calibrator);
16025     }
16026 
16027     @Test
16028     public void testConstructor48() throws WrongSizeException {
16029         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
16030         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
16031                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
16032         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
16033                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
16034         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
16035         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
16036         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
16037         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
16038         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
16039         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
16040                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
16041 
16042         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
16043         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
16044                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
16045         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
16046                 Collections.emptyList();
16047         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
16048         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
16049         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
16050 
16051         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
16052         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
16053         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
16054         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
16055 
16056         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
16057         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
16058         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
16059         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
16060         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
16061         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
16062         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
16063         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
16064         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
16065 
16066         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
16067         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
16068         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
16069 
16070         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
16071         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
16072         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
16073 
16074         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
16075         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
16076         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
16077         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
16078         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
16079         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
16080         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
16081         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
16082         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
16083 
16084         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
16085         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
16086                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16087                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
16088                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
16089                         false, bias, mg, gg,
16090                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
16091 
16092         // check default values
16093         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
16094                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
16095         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
16096         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
16097                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
