16098         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
16099                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
16100         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
16101         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
16102         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
16103         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
16104         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
16105         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
16106         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16107         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
16108                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16109         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
16110         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
16111         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
16112         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
16113         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16114         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
16115                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16116         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
16117         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
16118         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
16119         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
16120         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16121         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
16122                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16123         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
16124         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
16125         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
16126         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
16127         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
16128         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
16129         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
16130         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
16131         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
16132         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16133         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
16134         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
16135         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
16136         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
16137         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
16138         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
16139         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
16140         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
16141         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
16142         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
16143         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
16144         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
16145         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16146         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
16147         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
16148         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
16149         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
16150         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16151         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
16152         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
16153         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16154         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
16155                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
16156         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
16157         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
16158         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
16159         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
16160         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16161         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
16162                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16163         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
16164         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
16165         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
16166         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
16167         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16168         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
16169                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16170         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
16171         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
16172         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
16173         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
16174         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
16175         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16176         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16177         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
16178         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
16179         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
16180         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
16181         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
16182         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
16183         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
16184         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
16185         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
16186         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
16187         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
16188         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
16189         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
16190         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
16191         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
16192         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
16193         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
16194         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
16195         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
16196         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16197         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
16198         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
16199         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
16200         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
16201         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16202         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
16203         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
16204         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
16205         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
16206         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16207         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
16208         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
16209         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
16210                 0.0);
16211         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
16212                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
16213         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
16214                 rotationRate, 0.0);
16215         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
16216                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16217         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
16218                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
16219         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
16220         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
16221         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
16222         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
16223         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
16224                 0.0);
16225         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
16226         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
16227         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
16228         assertEquals(time1, time2);
16229         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
16230         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
16231         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
16232         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
16233         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
16234         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
16235         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
16236         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
16237         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
16238         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
16239         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
16240         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
16241         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
16242                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
16243         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
16244                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
16245         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
16246                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
16247         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
16248         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
16249         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
16250         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
16251         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
16252         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
16253         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
16254         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
16255         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
16256         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
16257         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
16258         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
16259         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
16260         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
16261         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
16262         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
16263         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
16264         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
16265         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
16266         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
16267         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
16268         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
16269         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
16270         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
16271         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
16272         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
16273         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
16274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
16275         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
16276         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
16277         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
16278                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
16279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
16280         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
16281         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16282         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
16284         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
16285         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16286         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
16288         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
16289         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16290         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16291         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
16292         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
16293         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
16294         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
16295         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
16296         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
16297         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
16298         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
16299         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
16300 
16301         // Force IllegalArgumentException
16302         calibrator = null;
16303         try {
16304             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
16305                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16306                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
16307                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
16308             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16309         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16310         }
16311         try {
16312             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16313                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16314                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
16315                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
16316                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
16317             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16318         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16319         }
16320         try {
16321             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16322                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16323                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
16324                     true,
16325                     false, bias, mg, gg,
16326                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
16327             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16328         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16329         }

16331             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16332                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16333                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16334                     true,
16335                     false,
16336                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
16337                     this);
16338             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16339         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16340         }
16341         try {
16342             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16343                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16344                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16345                     true,
16346                     false, bias,
16347                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
16348                     this);
16349             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16350         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16351         }
16352         try {
16353             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16354                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16355                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16356                     true,
16357                     false,
16358                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
16359                     this);
16360             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16361         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16362         }
16363         try {
16364             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16365                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16366                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16367                     true,
16368                     false,
16369                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma,
16370                     this);
16371             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16372         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16373         }
16374         try {
16375             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16376                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16377                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16378                     true,
16379                     false,
16380                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma,
16381                     this);
16382             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16383         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16384         }
16385         try {
16386             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16387                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16388                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16389                     true,
16390                     false,
16391                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
16392             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16393         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16394         }
16395         try {
16396             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16397                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16398                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16399                     true,
16400                     false,
16401                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
16402                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
16403             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16404         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16405         }
16406         try {
16407             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16408                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16409                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16410                     true,
16411                     false,
16412                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
16413                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
16414             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16415         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16416         }
16417         assertNull(calibrator);
16418     }
16419 
16420     @Test
16421     public void testConstructor49() throws WrongSizeException {
16422         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
16423         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
16424                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
16425         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
16426                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
16427         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
16428         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
16429         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
16430         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
16431         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
16432         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
16433                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
16434 
16435         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
16436         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
16437                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
16438         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
16439                 Collections.emptyList();
16440         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
16441         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
16442         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
16443 
16444         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
16445         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
16446         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
16447         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
16448 
16449         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
16450         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
16451         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
16452         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
16453         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
16454         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
16455         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
16456         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
16457         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
16458 
16459         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
16460         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
16461         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
16462 
16463         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
16464         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
16465         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
16466 
16467         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
16468         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
16469         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
16470         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
16471         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
16472         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
16473         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
16474         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
16475         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
16476 
16477         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
16478         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
16479                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16480                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
16481                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
16482                         false, bg, mg, gg,
16483                         ba, ma);
16484 
16485         // check default values
16486         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
16487                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
16488         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
16489         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
16490                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
16491         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
16492                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
16493         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
16494         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
16495         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
16496         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
16497         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
16498         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
16499         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16500         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
16501                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16502         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
16503         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
16504         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
16505         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
16506         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16507         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
16508                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16509         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
16510         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
16511         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
16512         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
16513         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16514         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
16515                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16516         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
16517         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
16518         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
16519         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
16520         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
16521         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
16522         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
16523         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
16524         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
16525         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16526         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
16527         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
16528         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
16529         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
16530         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
16531         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
16532         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
16533         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
16534         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
16535         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
16536         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
16537         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
16538         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16539         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
16540         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
16541         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
16542         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
16543         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16544         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
16545         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
16546         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16547         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
16548                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
16549         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
16550         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
16551         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
16552         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
16553         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16554         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
16555                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16556         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
16557         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
16558         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
16559         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
16560         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16561         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
16562                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16563         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
16564         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
16565         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
16566         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
16567         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
16568         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16569         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16570         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
16571         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
16572         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
16573         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
16574         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
16575         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
16576         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
16577         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
16578         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
16579         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
16580         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
16581         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
16582         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
16583         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
16584         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
16585         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
16586         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
16587         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
16588         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
16589         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16590         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
16591         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
16592         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
16593         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
16594         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16595         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
16596         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
16597         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
16598         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
16599         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16600         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
16601         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
16602         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
16603                 0.0);
16604         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
16605                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
16606         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
16607                 rotationRate, 0.0);
16608         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
16609                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16610         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
16611                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
16612         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
16613         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
16614         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
16615         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
16616         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
16617                 0.0);
16618         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
16619         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
16620         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
16621         assertEquals(time1, time2);
16622         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
16623         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
16624         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
16625         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
16626         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
16627         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
16628         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
16629         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
16630         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
16631         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
16632         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
16633         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
16634         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
16635                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
16636         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
16637                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
16638         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
16639                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
16640         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
16641         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
16642         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
16643         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
16644         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
16645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
16646         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
16647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
16648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
16649         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
16650         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
16651         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
16652         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
16653         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
16654         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
16655         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
16656         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
16657         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
16658         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
16659         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
16660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
16661         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
16662         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
16663         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
16664         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
16665         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
16666         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
16667         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
16668         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
16669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
16670         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
16671                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
16672         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
16673         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
16674         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16675         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16676         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
16677         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
16678         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16679         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16680         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
16681         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
16682         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
16683         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
16684         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
16685         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
16686         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
16687         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
16688         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
16689         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
16690         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
16691         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
16692         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
16693 
16694         // Force IllegalArgumentException
16695         calibrator = null;
16696         try {
16697             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
16698                     ecefPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16699                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
16700                     ba, ma);
16701             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16702         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16703         }
16704         try {
16705             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16706                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16707                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
16708                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
16709                     ba, ma);
16710             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16711         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16712         }
16713         try {
16714             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16715                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16716                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
16717                     true,
16718                     false, bg, mg, gg,
16719                     ba, ma);
16720             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16721         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16722         }
16723         try {
16724             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16725                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16726                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16727                     true,
16728                     false,
16729                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
16730             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16731         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16732         }
16733         try {
16734             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16735                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16736                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16737                     true,
16738                     false,
16739                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
16740             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16741         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16742         }
16743         try {

16745                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16746                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16747                     true,
16748                     false, bg,
16749                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
16750             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16751         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16752         }
16753         try {
16754             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16755                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16756                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16757                     true,
16758                     false,
16759                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
16760             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16761         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16762         }
16763         try {
16764             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16765                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16766                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16767                     true,
16768                     false,
16769                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
16770             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16771         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16772         }
16773         try {
16774             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16775                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16776                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16777                     true,
16778                     false,
16779                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
16780             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16781         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16782         }
16783         try {
16784             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16785                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16786                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16787                     true,
16788                     false,
16789                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
16790             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16791         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16792         }
16793         try {
16794             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16795                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16796                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16797                     true,
16798                     false,
16799                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
16800             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16801         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16802         }
16803         try {
16804             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16805                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16806                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16807                     true,
16808                     false,
16809                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
16810                     new Matrix(1, 3));
16811             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16812         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16813         }
16814         try {
16815             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16816                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
16817                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
16818                     true,
16819                     false,
16820                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
16821                     new Matrix(3, 1));
16822             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
16823         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
16824         }
16825         assertNull(calibrator);
16826     }
16827 
16828     @Test
16829     public void testConstructor50() throws WrongSizeException {
16830         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
16831         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
16832                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
16833         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
16834                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
16835         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
16836         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
16837         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
16838         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
16839         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
16840         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
16841                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
16842 
16843         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
16844         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
16845                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
16846         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
16847                 Collections.emptyList();
16848         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
16849         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
16850         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
16851 
16852         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
16853         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
16854         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
16855         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
16856 
16857         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
16858         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
16859         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
16860         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
16861         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
16862         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
16863         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
16864         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
16865         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
16866 
16867         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
16868         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
16869         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
16870 
16871         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
16872         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
16873         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
16874 
16875         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
16876         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
16877         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
16878         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
16879         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
16880         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
16881         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
16882         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
16883         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
16884 
16885         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
16886         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
16887                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
16888                         qualityScores, ecefPosition, rotationRate,
16889                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
16890                         false, bg, mg, gg,
16891                         ba, ma, this);
16892 
16893         // check default values
16894         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
16895                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
16896         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
16897         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
16898                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
16899         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
16900                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
16901         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
16902         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
16903         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
16904         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
16905         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
16906         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
16907         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16908         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
16909                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16910         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
16911         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
16912         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
16913         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
16914         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16915         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
16916                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16917         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
16918         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
16919         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
16920         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
16921         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16922         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
16923                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
16924         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
16925         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
16926         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
16927         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
16928         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
16929         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
16930         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
16931         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
16932         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
16933         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16934         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
16935         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
16936         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
16937         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
16938         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
16939         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
16940         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
16941         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
16942         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
16943         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
16944         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
16945         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
16946         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
16947         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
16948         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
16949         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
16950         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
16951         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16952         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
16953         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
16954         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16955         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
16956                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
16957         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
16958         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
16959         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
16960         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
16961         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16962         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
16963                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16964         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
16965         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
16966         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
16967         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
16968         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16969         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
16970                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16971         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
16972         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
16973         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
16974         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
16975         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
16976         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
16977         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
16978         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
16979         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
16980         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
16981         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
16982         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
16983         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
16984         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
16985         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
16986         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
16987         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
16988         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
16989         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
16990         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
16991         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
16992         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
16993         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
16994         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
16995         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
16996         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
16997         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
16998         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
16999         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
17000         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
17001         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
17002         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17003         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
17004         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
17005         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
17006         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
17007         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17008         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
17009         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
17010         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
17011                 0.0);
17012         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
17013                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
17014         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
17015                 rotationRate, 0.0);
17016         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
17017                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17018         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
17019                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
17020         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
17021         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
17022         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
17023         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
17024         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
17025                 0.0);
17026         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
17027         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
17028         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
17029         assertEquals(time1, time2);
17030         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
17031         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
17032         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17033         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
17034         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
17035         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17036         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
17037         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
17038         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
17039         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
17040         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
17041         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
17042         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
17043                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
17044         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
17045                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
17046         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
17047                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
17048         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
17049         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
17050         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
17051         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
17052         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
17053         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
17054         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
17055         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
17056         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
17057         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
17058         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
17059         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
17060         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
17061         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
17062         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
17063         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
17064         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
17065         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
17066         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
17067         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
17068         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
17069         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
17070         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
17071         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
17072         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
17073         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
17074         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
17075         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
17076         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
17077         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
17078         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
17079                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
17080         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
17081         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
17082         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17083         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17084         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
17085         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
17086         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17087         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17088         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
17089         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
17090         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17091         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17092         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
17093         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
17094         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
17095         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
17096         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
17097         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
17098         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
17099         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
17100         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
17101 
17102         // Force IllegalArgumentException
17103         calibrator = null;
17104         try {
17105             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17106                     new double[9], ecefPosition,
17107                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17108                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
17109                     ba, ma, this);
17110             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17111         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17112         }
17113         try {
17114             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17115                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17116                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
17117                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
17118                     ba, ma, this);
17119             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17120         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17121         }
17122         try {
17123             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17124                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17125                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
17126                     true,
17127                     false, bg, mg, gg,
17128                     ba, ma, this);
17129             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17130         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17131         }
17132         try {
17133             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17134                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17135                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17136                     true,
17137                     false,
17138                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
17139             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17140         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17141         }
17142         try {
17143             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17144                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17145                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17146                     true,
17147                     false,
17148                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma, this);

17150         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17151         }

17153             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17154                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17155                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17156                     true,
17157                     false, bg,
17158                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma, this);
17159             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17160         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17161         }
17162         try {
17163             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17164                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17165                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17166                     true,
17167                     false,
17168                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma, this);
17169             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17170         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17171         }
17172         try {
17173             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17174                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17175                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17176                     true,
17177                     false,
17178                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma, this);
17179             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17180         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17181         }
17182         try {
17183             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17184                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17185                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17186                     true,
17187                     false,
17188                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma, this);
17189             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17190         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17191         }
17192         try {
17193             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17194                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17195                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17196                     true,
17197                     false,
17198                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma, this);
17199             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17200         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17201         }
17202         try {
17203             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17204                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17205                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17206                     true,
17207                     false,
17208                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma, this);
17209             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17210         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17211         }
17212         try {
17213             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17214                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
17215                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17216                     true,
17217                     false,
17218                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
17219                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
17220             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17221         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17222         }
17223         try {
17224             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(

17228                     false,

17230                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
17231             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17232         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17233         }
17234         assertNull(calibrator);
17235     }
