17237     @Test
17238     public void testConstructor51() throws WrongSizeException {
17239         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
17240         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
17241                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
17242         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
17243                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
17244         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
17245         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
17246         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
17247         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
17248         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
17249         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
17250                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
17251 
17252         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
17253         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
17254                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
17255         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
17256                 Collections.emptyList();
17257         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
17258         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
17259         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
17260 
17261         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
17262         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
17263         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
17264         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
17265 
17266         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
17267         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
17268         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
17269         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
17270         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
17271         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
17272         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
17273         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
17274         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
17275 
17276         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
17277         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
17278                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17279                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
17280                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
17281 
17282         // check default values
17283         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
17284                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
17285         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
17286         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
17287                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
17288         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
17289                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
17290         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
17291         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
17292         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
17293         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
17294         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
17295         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17296         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17297         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
17298                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17299         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
17300         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
17301         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
17302         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17303         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17304         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
17305                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17306         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
17307         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
17308         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
17309         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17310         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17311         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
17312                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17313         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
17314         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
17315         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
17316         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
17317         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
17318         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
17319         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
17320         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
17321         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
17322         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
17323         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
17324         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17325         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17326         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17327         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17328         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17329         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17330         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17331         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17332         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17333         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
17334         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
17335         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17336         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
17337         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
17338         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
17339         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
17340         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
17341         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
17342         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
17343         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17344         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
17345                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
17346         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
17347         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
17348         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
17349         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
17350         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17351         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
17352                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17353         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
17354         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
17355         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
17356         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
17357         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17358         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
17359                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17360         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
17361         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
17362         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
17363         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
17364         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
17365         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
17366         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17367         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
17368         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
17369         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
17370         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
17371         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
17372         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
17373         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
17374         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
17375         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
17376         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
17377         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
17378         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
17379         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
17380         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
17381         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
17382         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
17383         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
17384         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
17385         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
17386         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
17387         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
17388         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
17389         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
17390         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
17391         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17392         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
17393         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
17394         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
17395         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
17396         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17397         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
17398         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
17399         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
17400                 0.0);
17401         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
17402                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
17403         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
17404                 rotationRate, 0.0);
17405         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
17406                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17407         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
17408                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
17409         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
17410         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
17411         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
17412         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
17413         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
17414                 0.0);
17415         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
17416         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
17417         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
17418         assertEquals(time1, time2);
17419         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
17420         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17421         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17422         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
17423         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
17424         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17425         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
17426         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
17427         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
17428         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
17429         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
17430         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
17431         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
17432                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
17433         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
17434                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
17435         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
17436                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
17437         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
17438         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
17439         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
17440         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
17441         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
17442         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
17443         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
17444         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
17445         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
17446         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
17447         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
17448         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
17449         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
17450         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
17451         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
17452         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
17453         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
17454         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
17455         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
17456         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
17457         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
17458         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
17459         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
17460         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
17461         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
17462         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
17463         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
17464         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
17465         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
17466         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
17467         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
17468                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
17469         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
17470         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
17471         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17472         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17473         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
17474         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
17475         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17476         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17477         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
17478         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
17479         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17480         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17481         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
17482         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
17483         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
17484         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
17485         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
17486         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
17487         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
17488         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
17489         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
17490 
17491         // Force IllegalArgumentException
17492         calibrator = null;
17493         try {
17494             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17495                     new double[9], nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval,
17496                     measurements, bg, mg, gg);
17497             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17498         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17499         }
17500         try {
17501             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17502                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17503                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
17504                     bg, mg, gg);
17505             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17506         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17507         }
17508         try {
17509             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17510                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17511                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg);
17512             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17513         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17514         }
17515         try {
17516             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17517                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17518                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17519                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
17520             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17521         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17522         }
17523         try {
17524             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17525                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17526                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17527                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
17528             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17529         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17530         }
17531         try {
17532             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17533                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17534                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
17535                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
17536             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17537         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17538         }
17539         try {
17540             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17541                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17542                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
17543                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
17544             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17545         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17546         }
17547         try {
17548             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17549                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17550                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
17551                     new Matrix(1, 3));
17552             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17553         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17554         }
17555         try {
17556             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17557                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17558                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
17559                     new Matrix(3, 1));
17560             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17561         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17562         }
17563         assertNull(calibrator);
17564     }
17565 
17566     @Test
17567     public void testConstructor52() throws WrongSizeException {
17568         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
17569         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
17570                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
17571         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
17572                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
17573         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
17574         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
17575         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
17576         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
17577         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
17578         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
17579                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
17580 
17581         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
17582         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
17583                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
17584         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
17585                 Collections.emptyList();
17586         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
17587         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
17588         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
17589 
17590         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
17591         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
17592         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
17593         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
17594 
17595         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
17596         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
17597         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
17598         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
17599         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
17600         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
17601         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
17602         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
17603         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
17604 
17605         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
17606         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
17607                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17608                         qualityScores, nedPosition,
17609                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17610                         bg, mg, gg, this);
17611 
17612         // check default values
17613         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
17614                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
17615         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
17616         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
17617                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
17618         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
17619                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
17620         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
17621         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
17622         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
17623         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
17624         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
17625         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17626         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17627         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
17628                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17629         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
17630         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
17631         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
17632         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17633         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17634         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
17635                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17636         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
17637         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
17638         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
17639         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17640         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17641         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
17642                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17643         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
17644         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
17645         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
17646         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
17647         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
17648         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
17649         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
17650         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
17651         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
17652         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
17653         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
17654         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17655         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17656         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17657         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17658         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17659         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17660         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17661         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17662         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17663         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
17664         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
17665         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17666         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
17667         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
17668         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
17669         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
17670         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
17671         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
17672         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
17673         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17674         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
17675                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
17676         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
17677         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
17678         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
17679         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
17680         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17681         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
17682                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17683         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
17684         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
17685         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
17686         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
17687         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17688         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
17689                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17690         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
17691         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
17692         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
17693         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
17694         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
17695         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
17696         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17697         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
17698         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
17699         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
17700         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
17701         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
17702         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
17703         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
17704         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
17705         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
17706         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
17707         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
17708         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
17709         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
17710         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
17711         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
17712         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
17713         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
17714         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
17715         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
17716         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
17717         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
17718         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
17719         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
17720         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
17721         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17722         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
17723         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
17724         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
17725         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
17726         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
17727         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
17728         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
17729         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
17730                 0.0);
17731         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
17732                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
17733         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
17734                 rotationRate, 0.0);
17735         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
17736                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
17737         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
17738                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
17739         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
17740         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
17741         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
17742         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
17743         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
17744                 0.0);
17745         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
17746         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
17747         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
17748         assertEquals(time1, time2);
17749         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
17750         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17751         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17752         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
17753         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
17754         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
17755         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
17756         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
17757         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
17758         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
17759         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
17760         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
17761         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
17762                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
17763         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
17764                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
17765         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
17766                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
17767         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
17768         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
17769         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
17770         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
17771         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
17772         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
17773         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
17774         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
17775         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
17776         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
17777         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
17778         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
17779         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
17780         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
17781         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
17782         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
17783         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
17784         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
17785         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
17786         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
17787         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
17788         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
17789         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
17790         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
17791         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
17792         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
17793         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
17794         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
17795         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
17796         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
17797         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
17798                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
17799         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
17800         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
17801         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17802         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17803         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
17804         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
17805         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17806         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17807         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
17808         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
17809         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
17810         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
17811         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
17812         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
17813         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
17814         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
17815         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
17816         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
17817         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
17818         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
17819         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
17820 
17821         // Force IllegalArgumentException
17822         calibrator = null;
17823         try {
17824             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
17825                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17826                     bg, mg, gg, this);
17827             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17828         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17829         }
17830         try {
17831             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17832                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17833                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
17834                     bg, mg, gg, this);
17835             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17836         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17837         }
17838         try {
17839             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17840                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17841                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
17842                     this);
17843             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17844         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17845         }
17846         try {
17847             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17848                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17849                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17850                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg,
17851                     this);
17852             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17853         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17854         }
17855         try {
17856             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17857                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17858                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17859                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg,
17860                     this);
17861             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17862         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17863         }
17864         try {
17865             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17866                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17867                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
17868                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg,
17869                     this);
17870             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17871         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17872         }
17873         try {
17874             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17875                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17876                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
17877                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg,
17878                     this);
17879             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17880         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17881         }
17882         try {
17883             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17884                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17885                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
17886                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
17887             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17888         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17889         }
17890         try {
17891             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17892                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
17893                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
17894                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
17895             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
17896         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
17897         }
17898         assertNull(calibrator);
17899     }

17901     @Test
17902     public void testConstructor53() throws WrongSizeException {
17903         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
17904         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
17905                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
17906         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
17907                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
17908         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
17909         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
17910         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
17911         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
17912         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
17913         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
17914                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
17915 
17916         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
17917         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
17918                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
17919         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
17920                 Collections.emptyList();
17921         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
17922         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
17923         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
17924 
17925         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
17926         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
17927         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
17928         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
17929 
17930         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
17931         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
17932         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
17933         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
17934         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
17935         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
17936         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
17937         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
17938         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
17939 
17940         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
17941         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
17942                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
17943                         qualityScores, nedPosition,
17944                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
17945                         bias, mg, gg);
17946 
17947         // check default values
17948         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
17949                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
17950         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
17951         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
17952                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
17953         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
17954                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
17955         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
17956         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
17957         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
17958         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
17959         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
17960         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17961         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17962         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
17963                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17964         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
17965         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
17966         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
17967         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17968         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17969         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
17970                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17971         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
17972         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
17973         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
17974         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
17975         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17976         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
17977                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
17978         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
17979         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
17980         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
17981         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
17982         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
17983         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
17984         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
17985         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
17986         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
17987         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
17988         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
17989         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17990         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17991         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17992         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17993         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17994         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17995         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
17996         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
17997         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
17998         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
17999         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
18000         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18001         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
18002         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
18003         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
18004         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
18005         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18006         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
18007         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
18008         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18009         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
18010                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18011         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
18012         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
18013         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
18014         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
18015         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18016         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
18017                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18018         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
18019         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
18020         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
18021         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
18022         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18023         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
18024                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18025         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
18026         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
18027         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
18028         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
18029         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
18030         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18031         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18032         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
18033         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
18034         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
18035         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
18036         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
18037         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
18038         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
18039         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
18040         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
18041         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
18042         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
18043         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
18044         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
18045         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
18046         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
18047         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
18048         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
18049         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
18050         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
18051         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
18052         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
18053         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
18054         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
18055         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
18056         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18057         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
18058         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
18059         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
18060         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
18061         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18062         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
18063         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
18064         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
18065                 0.0);
18066         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
18067                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
18068         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
18069                 rotationRate, 0.0);
18070         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
18071                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18072         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
18073                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18074         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
18075         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
18076         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
18077         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
18078         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
18079                 0.0);
18080         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
18081         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
18082         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
18083         assertEquals(time1, time2);
18084         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
18085         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18086         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18087         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
18088         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
18089         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18090         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
18091         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
18092         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
18093         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
18094         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
18095         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
18096         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
18097                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
18098         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
18099                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
18100         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
18101                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
18102         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
18103         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
18104         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
18105         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
18106         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
18107         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
18108         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
18109         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
18110         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
18111         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
18112         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
18113         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
18114         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
18115         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
18116         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
18117         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
18118         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
18119         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
18120         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
18121         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
18122         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
18123         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
18124         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
18125         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
18126         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
18127         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
18128         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
18129         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
18130         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
18131         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
18132         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
18133                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
18134         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
18135         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
18136         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18137         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18138         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
18139         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
18140         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18141         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18142         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
18143         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
18144         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18145         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18146         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
18147         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
18148         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
18149         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
18150         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
18151         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
18152         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
18153         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
18154         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
18155 
18156         // Force IllegalArgumentException
18157         calibrator = null;
18158         try {
18159             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[7],
18160                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18161                     bias, mg, gg);
18162             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18163         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18164         }
18165         try {
18166             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18167                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18168                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
18169                     bias, mg, gg);
18170             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18171         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18172         }
18173         try {
18174             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18175                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18176                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg);
18177             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18178         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18179         }
18180         try {
18181             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18182                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18183                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18184                     new double[1], mg, gg);
18185             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18186         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18187         }
18188         try {
18189             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18190                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18191                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18192                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
18193             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18194         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18195         }
18196         try {
18197             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18198                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18199                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18200                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
18201             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18202         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18203         }
18204         try {
18205             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18206                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18207                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18208                     new Matrix(1, 3));
18209             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18210         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18211         }
18212         try {
18213             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18214                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18215                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18216                     new Matrix(3, 1));
18217             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18218         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18219         }
18220         assertNull(calibrator);
18221     }
18222 
18223     @Test
18224     public void testConstructor54() throws WrongSizeException {
18225         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
18226         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
18227                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
18228         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
18229                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
18230         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
18231         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
18232         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
18233         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
18234         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
18235         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
18236                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
18237 
18238         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
18239         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
18240                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
18241         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
18242                 Collections.emptyList();
18243         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
18244         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
18245         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
18246 
18247         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
18248         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
18249         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
18250         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
18251 
18252         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
18253         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
18254         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
18255         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
18256         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
18257         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
18258         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
18259         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
18260         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
18261 
18262         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
18263         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
18264                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18265                         qualityScores, nedPosition,
18266                         rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18267                         bias, mg, gg, this);
18268 
18269         // check default values
18270         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
18271                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
18272         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
18273         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
18274                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
18275         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
18276                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
18277         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
18278         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
18279         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
18280         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
18281         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
18282         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
18283         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18284         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
18285                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18286         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
18287         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
18288         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
18289         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
18290         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18291         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
18292                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18293         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
18294         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
18295         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
18296         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
18297         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18298         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
18299                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18300         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
18301         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
18302         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
18303         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
18304         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
18305         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
18306         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
18307         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
18308         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
18309         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
18310         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
18311         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
18312         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
18313         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
18314         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
18315         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
18316         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
18317         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
18318         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
18319         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
18320         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
18321         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
18322         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18323         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
18324         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
18325         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
18326         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
18327         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18328         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
18329         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
18330         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18331         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
18332                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18333         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
18334         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
18335         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
18336         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
18337         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18338         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
18339                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18340         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
18341         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
18342         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
18343         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
18344         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18345         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
18346                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18347         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
18348         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
18349         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
18350         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
18351         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
18352         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18353         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18354         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
18355         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
18356         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
18357         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
18358         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
18359         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
18360         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
18361         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
18362         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
18363         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
18364         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
18365         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
18366         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
18367         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
18368         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
18369         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
18370         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
18371         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
18372         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
18373         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
18374         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
18375         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
18376         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
18377         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
18378         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18379         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
18380         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
18381         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
18382         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
18383         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18384         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
18385         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
18386         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
18387                 0.0);
18388         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
18389                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
18390         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
18391                 rotationRate, 0.0);
18392         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
18393                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18394         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
18395                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18396         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
18397         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
18398         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
18399         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
18400         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
18401                 0.0);
18402         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
18403         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
18404         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
18405         assertEquals(time1, time2);
18406         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
18407         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18408         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18409         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
18410         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
18411         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18412         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
18413         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
18414         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
18415         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
18416         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
18417         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
18418         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
18419                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
18420         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
18421                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
18422         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
18423                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
18424         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
18425         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
18426         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
18427         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
18428         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
18429         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
18430         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
18431         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
18432         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
18433         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
18434         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
18435         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
18436         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
18437         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
18438         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
18439         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
18440         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
18441         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
18442         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
18443         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
18444         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
18445         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
18446         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
18447         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
18448         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
18449         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
18450         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
18451         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
18452         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
18453         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
18454         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
18455                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
18456         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
18457         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
18458         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18459         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18460         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
18461         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
18462         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18463         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18464         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
18465         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
18466         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18467         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18468         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
18469         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
18470         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
18471         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
18472         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
18473         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
18474         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
18475         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
18476         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
18477 
18478         // Force IllegalArgumentException
18479         calibrator = null;
18480         try {
18481             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
18482                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18483                     bias, mg, gg, this);
18484             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18485         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18486         }
18487         try {
18488             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18489                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18490                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
18491                     bias, mg, gg, this);
18492             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18493         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18494         }
18495         try {
18496             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18497                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18498                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18499                     this);
18500             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18501         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18502         }
18503         try {
