18504             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18505                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18506                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18507                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
18508             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18509         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18510         }
18511         try {
18512             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18513                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18514                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18515                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
18516             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18517         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18518         }
18519         try {
18520             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18521                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18522                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18523                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
18524             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18525         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18526         }
18527         try {
18528             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18529                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18530                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18531                     new Matrix(1, 3), this);
18532             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18533         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18534         }
18535         try {
18536             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18537                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18538                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18539                     new Matrix(3, 1), this);
18540             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18541         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18542         }
18543         assertNull(calibrator);
18544     }
18545 
18546     @Test
18547     public void testConstructor55() throws WrongSizeException {
18548         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
18549         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
18550                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
18551         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
18552                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
18553         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
18554         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
18555         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
18556         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
18557         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
18558         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
18559                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
18560 
18561         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
18562         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
18563                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
18564         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
18565                 Collections.emptyList();
18566         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
18567         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
18568         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
18569 
18570         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
18571         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
18572         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
18573         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
18574 
18575         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
18576         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
18577         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
18578         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
18579         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
18580         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
18581         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
18582         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
18583         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
18584 
18585         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
18586         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
18587         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
18588 
18589         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
18590         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
18591         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
18592 
18593         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
18594         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
18595         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
18596         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
18597         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
18598         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
18599         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
18600         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
18601         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
18602 
18603         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
18604         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
18605                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18606                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
18607                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18608                         accelerometerBias, ma);
18609 
18610         // check default values
18611         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
18612                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
18613         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
18614         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
18615                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
18616         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
18617                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
18618         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
18619         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
18620         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
18621         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
18622         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
18623         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
18624         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18625         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
18626                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18627         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
18628         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
18629         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
18630         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
18631         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18632         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
18633                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18634         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
18635         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
18636         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
18637         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
18638         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18639         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
18640                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18641         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
18642         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
18643         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
18644         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
18645         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
18646         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
18647         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
18648         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
18649         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
18650         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
18651         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
18652         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
18653         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
18654         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
18655         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
18656         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
18657         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
18658         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
18659         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
18660         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
18661         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
18662         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
18663         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18664         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
18665         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
18666         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
18667         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
18668         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18669         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
18670         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
18671         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18672         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
18673                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18674         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
18675         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
18676         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
18677         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
18678         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18679         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
18680                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18681         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
18682         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
18683         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
18684         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
18685         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18686         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
18687                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18688         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
18689         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
18690         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
18691         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
18692         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
18693         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
18694         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18695         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
18696         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
18697         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
18698         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
18699         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
18700         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
18701         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
18702         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
18703         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
18704         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
18705         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
18706         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
18707         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
18708         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
18709         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
18710         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
18711         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
18712         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
18713         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
18714         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
18715         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
18716         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
18717         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
18718         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
18719         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18720         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
18721         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
18722         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
18723         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
18724         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
18725         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
18726         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
18727         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
18728                 0.0);
18729         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
18730                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
18731         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
18732                 rotationRate, 0.0);
18733         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
18734                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
18735         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
18736                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
18737         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
18738         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
18739         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
18740         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
18741         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
18742                 0.0);
18743         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
18744         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
18745         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
18746         assertEquals(time1, time2);
18747         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
18748         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18749         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18750         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
18751         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
18752         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
18753         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
18754         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
18755         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
18756         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
18757         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
18758         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
18759         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
18760                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
18761         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
18762                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
18763         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
18764                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
18765         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
18766         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
18767         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
18768         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
18769         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
18770         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
18771         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
18772         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
18773         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
18774         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
18775         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
18776         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
18777         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
18778         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
18779         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
18780         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
18781         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
18782         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
18783         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
18784         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
18785         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
18786         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
18787         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
18788         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
18789         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
18790         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
18791         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
18792         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
18793         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
18794         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
18795         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
18796                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
18797         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
18798         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
18799         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18800         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18801         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
18802         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
18803         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18804         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18805         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
18806         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
18807         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
18808         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
18809         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
18810         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
18811         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
18812         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
18813         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
18814         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
18815         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
18816         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
18817         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
18818 
18819         // Force IllegalArgumentException
18820         calibrator = null;
18821         try {
18822             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
18823                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18824                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
18825             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18826         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18827         }
18828         try {
18829             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18830                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18831                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
18832                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
18833             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18834         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18835         }
18836         try {
18837             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18838                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18839                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18840                     accelerometerBias, ma);
18841             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18842         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18843         }
18844         try {
18845             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18846                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18847                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
18848                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
18849             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18850         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18851         }
18852         try {
18853             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18854                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18855                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18856                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
18857                     ma);
18858             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18859         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18860         }
18861         try {
18862             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18863                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18864                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18865                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
18866                     ma);
18867             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18868         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18869         }
18870         try {
18871             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18872                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18873                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18874                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
18875                     ma);
18876             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18877         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18878         }
18879         try {
18880             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18881                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18882                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
18883                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
18884                     ma);
18885             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18886         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18887         }
18888         try {
18889             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18890                     qualityScores, ecefPosition,
18891                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
18892                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
18893             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18894         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18895         }
18896         try {
18897             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18898                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18899                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18900                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3));
18901             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18902         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18903         }
18904         try {
18905             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18906                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
18907                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18908                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1));
18909             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
18910         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
18911         }
18912         assertNull(calibrator);
18913     }
18914 
18915     @Test
18916     public void testConstructor56() throws WrongSizeException {
18917         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
18918         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
18919                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
18920         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
18921                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
18922         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
18923         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
18924         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
18925         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
18926         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
18927         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
18928                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
18929 
18930         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
18931         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
18932                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
18933         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
18934                 Collections.emptyList();
18935         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
18936         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
18937         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
18938 
18939         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
18940         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
18941         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
18942         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
18943 
18944         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
18945         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
18946         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
18947         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
18948         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
18949         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
18950         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
18951         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
18952         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
18953 
18954         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
18955         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
18956         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
18957 
18958         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
18959         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
18960         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
18961 
18962         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
18963         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
18964         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
18965         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
18966         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
18967         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
18968         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
18969         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
18970         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
18971 
18972         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
18973         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
18974                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
18975                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
18976                         timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
18977                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
18978 
18979         // check default values
18980         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
18981                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
18982         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
18983         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
18984                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
18985         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
18986                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
18987         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
18988         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
18989         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
18990         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
18991         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
18992         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
18993         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18994         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
18995                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
18996         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
18997         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
18998         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
18999         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
19000         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19001         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
19002                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19003         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
19004         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
19005         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
19006         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
19007         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19008         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
19009                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19010         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
19011         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
19012         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
19013         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
19014         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
19015         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
19016         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
19017         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
19018         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
19019         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19020         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
19021         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
19022         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
19023         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
19024         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
19025         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
19026         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
19027         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
19028         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
19029         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
19030         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
19031         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
19032         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19033         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
19034         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
19035         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
19036         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
19037         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19038         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
19039         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
19040         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19041         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
19042                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19043         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
19044         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
19045         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
19046         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
19047         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19048         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
19049                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19050         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
19051         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
19052         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
19053         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
19054         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19055         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
19056                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19057         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
19058         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
19059         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
19060         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
19061         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
19062         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19063         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19064         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
19065         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
19066         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
19067         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
19068         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
19069         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
19070         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
19071         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
19072         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
19073         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
19074         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
19075         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
19076         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
19077         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
19078         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
19079         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
19080         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
19081         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
19082         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
19083         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19084         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
19085         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
19086         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
19087         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
19088         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19089         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
19090         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
19091         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
19092         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
19093         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19094         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
19095         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
19096         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
19097                 0.0);
19098         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
19099                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
19100         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
19101                 rotationRate, 0.0);
19102         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
19103                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19104         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
19105                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19106         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
19107         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
19108         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
19109         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
19110         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
19111                 0.0);
19112         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
19113         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
19114         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
19115         assertEquals(time1, time2);
19116         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
19117         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19118         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19119         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
19120         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
19121         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19122         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
19123         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
19124         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
19125         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
19126         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
19127         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
19128         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
19129                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
19130         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
19131                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
19132         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
19133                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
19134         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
19135         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
19136         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
19137         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
19138         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
19139         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
19140         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
19141         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
19142         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
19143         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
19144         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
19145         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
19146         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
19147         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
19148         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
19149         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
19150         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
19151         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
19152         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
19153         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
19154         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
19155         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
19156         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
19157         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
19158         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
19159         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
19160         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
19161         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
19162         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
19163         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
19164         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
19165                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
19166         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
19167         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
19168         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19169         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19170         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
19171         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
19172         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19173         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19174         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
19175         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
19176         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19177         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19178         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
19179         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
19180         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
19181         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
19182         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
19183         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
19184         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
19185         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
19186         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
19187 
19188         // Force IllegalArgumentException
19189         calibrator = null;
19190         try {
19191             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
19192                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19193                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
19194             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19195         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19196         }
19197         try {
19198             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19199                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19200                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
19201                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
19202             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19203         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19204         }
19205         try {
19206             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19207                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19208                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
19209                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
19210             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19211         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19212         }
19213         try {
19214             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19215                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19216                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19217                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma, this);
19218             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19219         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19220         }
19221         try {
19222             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19223                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19224                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
19225                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias,
19226                     ma, this);
19227             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19228         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19229         }
19230         try {
19231             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19232                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19233                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
19234                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias,
19235                     ma, this);
19236             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19237         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19238         }
19239         try {
19240             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19241                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19242                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
19243                     new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias,
19244                     ma, this);
19245             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19246         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19247         }
19248         try {
19249             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19250                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19251                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg,
19252                     new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias,
19253                     ma, this);
19254             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19255         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19256         }
19257         try {
19258             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19259                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19260                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias,
19261                     mg, gg, new double[1], ma, this);
19262             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19263         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19264         }
19265         try {
19266             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19267                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19268                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
19269                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
19270             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19271         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19272         }
19273         try {
19274             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19275                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19276                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bias, mg, gg,
19277                     accelerometerBias, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
19278             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19279         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19280         }
19281         assertNull(calibrator);
19282     }
19283 
19284     @Test
19285     public void testConstructor57() throws WrongSizeException {
19286         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
19287         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
19288                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
19289         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
19290                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
19291         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
19292         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
19293         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
19294         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
19295         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
19296         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
19297                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
19298 
19299         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
19300         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
19301                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
19302         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
19303                 Collections.emptyList();
19304         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
19305         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
19306         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
19307 
19308         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
19309         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
19310         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
19311         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
19312 
19313         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
19314         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
19315         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
19316         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
19317         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
19318         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
19319         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
19320         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
19321         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
19322 
19323         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
19324         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
19325         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
19326 
19327         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
19328         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
19329         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
19330 
19331         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
19332         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
19333         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
19334         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
19335         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
19336         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
19337         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
19338         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
19339         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
19340 
19341         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
19342         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
19343                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19344                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
19345                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
19346                         ba, ma);
19347 
19348         // check default values
19349         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
19350                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
19351         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
19352         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
19353                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
19354         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
19355                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
19356         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
19357         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
19358         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
19359         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
19360         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
19361         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
19362         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19363         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
19364                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19365         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
19366         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
19367         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
19368         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
19369         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19370         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
19371                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19372         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
19373         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
19374         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
19375         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
19376         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19377         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
19378                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19379         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
19380         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
19381         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
19382         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
19383         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
19384         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
19385         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
19386         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
19387         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
19388         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19389         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
19390         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
19391         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
19392         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
19393         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
19394         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
19395         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
19396         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
19397         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
19398         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
19399         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
19400         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
19401         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19402         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
19403         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
19404         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
19405         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
19406         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19407         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
19408         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
19409         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19410         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
19411                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19412         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
19413         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
19414         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
19415         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
19416         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19417         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
19418                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19419         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
19420         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
19421         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
19422         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
19423         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19424         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
19425                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19426         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
19427         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
19428         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
19429         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
19430         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
19431         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19432         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19433         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
19434         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
19435         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
19436         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
19437         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
19438         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
19439         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
19440         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
19441         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
19442         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
19443         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
19444         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
19445         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
19446         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
19447         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
19448         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
19449         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
19450         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
19451         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
19452         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19453         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
19454         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
19455         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
19456         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
19457         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19458         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
19459         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
19460         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
19461         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
19462         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19463         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
19464         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
19465         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
19466                 0.0);
19467         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
19468                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
19469         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
19470                 rotationRate, 0.0);
19471         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
19472                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19473         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
19474                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19475         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
19476         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
19477         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
19478         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
19479         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
19480                 0.0);
19481         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
19482         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
19483         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
19484         assertEquals(time1, time2);
19485         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
19486         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19487         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19488         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
19489         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
19490         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19491         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
19492         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
19493         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
19494         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
19495         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
19496         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
19497         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
19498                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
19499         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
19500                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
19501         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
19502                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
19503         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
19504         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
19505         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
19506         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
19507         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
19508         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
19509         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
19510         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
19511         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
19512         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
19513         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
19514         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
19515         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
19516         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
19517         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
19518         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
19519         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
19520         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
19521         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
19522         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
19523         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
19524         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
19525         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
19526         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
19527         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
19528         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
19529         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
19530         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
19531         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
19532         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
19533         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
19534                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
19535         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
19536         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
19537         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19538         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19539         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
19540         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
19541         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19542         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19543         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
19544         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
19545         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19546         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19547         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
19548         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
19549         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
19550         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
19551         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
19552         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
19553         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
19554         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
19555         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
19556 
19557         // Force IllegalArgumentException
19558         calibrator = null;
19559         try {
19560             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
19561                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19562                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma);
19563             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19564         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19565         }
19566         try {
19567             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19568                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19569                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
19570                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma);
19571             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19572         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19573         }
19574         try {
19575             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19576                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19577                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
19578                     ba, ma);
19579             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19580         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19581         }
19582         try {
19583             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19584                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19585                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19586                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);

19588         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19589         }
19590         try {
19591             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19592                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19593                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19594                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
19595             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19596         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19597         }
19598         try {
19599             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19600                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19601                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
19602                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
19603             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19604         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19605         }
19606         try {
19607             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19608                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19609                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
19610                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
19611             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19612         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19613         }
19614         try {
19615             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19616                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19617                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
19618                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
19619             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19620         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19621         }
19622         try {
19623             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19624                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19625                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
19626                     new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
19627             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19628         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19629         }
19630         try {
19631             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19632                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19633                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
19634                     mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
19635             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19636         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19637         }
19638         try {
19639             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19640                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19641                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
19642                     mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
19643             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19644         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19645         }
19646         try {
19647             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19648                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19649                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
