19651             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19652         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19653         }
19654         try {
19655             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19656                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19657                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
19658                     ba, new Matrix(3, 1));
19659             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19660         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19661         }
19662         assertNull(calibrator);
19663     }
19664 
19665     @Test
19666     public void testConstructor58() throws WrongSizeException {
19667         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
19668         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
19669                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
19670         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
19671                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
19672         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
19673         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
19674         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
19675         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
19676         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
19677         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
19678                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
19679 
19680         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
19681         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
19682                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
19683         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
19684                 Collections.emptyList();
19685         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
19686         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
19687         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
19688 
19689         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
19690         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
19691         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
19692         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
19693 
19694         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
19695         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
19696         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
19697         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
19698         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
19699         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
19700         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
19701         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
19702         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
19703 
19704         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
19705         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
19706         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
19707 
19708         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
19709         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
19710         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
19711 
19712         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
19713         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
19714         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
19715         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
19716         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
19717         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
19718         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
19719         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
19720         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
19721 
19722         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
19723         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
19724                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19725                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
19726                         timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg, gg, ba, ma,
19727                         this);
19728 
19729         // check default values
19730         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
19731                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
19732         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
19733         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
19734                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
19735         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
19736                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
19737         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
19738         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
19739         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
19740         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
19741         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
19742         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
19743         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19744         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
19745                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19746         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
19747         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
19748         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
19749         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
19750         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19751         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
19752                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19753         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
19754         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
19755         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
19756         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
19757         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19758         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
19759                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
19760         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
19761         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
19762         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
19763         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
19764         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
19765         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
19766         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
19767         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
19768         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
19769         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19770         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
19771         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
19772         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
19773         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
19774         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
19775         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
19776         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
19777         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
19778         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
19779         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
19780         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
19781         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
19782         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19783         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
19784         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
19785         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
19786         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
19787         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19788         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
19789         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
19790         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19791         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
19792                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19793         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
19794         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
19795         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
19796         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
19797         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19798         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
19799                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19800         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
19801         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
19802         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
19803         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
19804         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19805         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
19806                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19807         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
19808         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
19809         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
19810         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
19811         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
19812         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
19813         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19814         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
19815         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
19816         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
19817         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
19818         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
19819         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
19820         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
19821         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
19822         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
19823         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
19824         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
19825         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
19826         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
19827         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
19828         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
19829         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
19830         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
19831         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
19832         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
19833         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
19834         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
19835         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
19836         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
19837         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
19838         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19839         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
19840         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
19841         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
19842         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
19843         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
19844         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
19845         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
19846         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
19847                 0.0);
19848         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
19849                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
19850         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
19851                 rotationRate, 0.0);
19852         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
19853                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
19854         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
19855                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
19856         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
19857         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
19858         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
19859         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
19860         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
19861                 0.0);
19862         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
19863         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
19864         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
19865         assertEquals(time1, time2);
19866         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
19867         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19868         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19869         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
19870         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
19871         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
19872         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
19873         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
19874         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
19875         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 19);
19876         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
19877         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
19878         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
19879                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
19880         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
19881                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
19882         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
19883                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
19884         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
19885         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
19886         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
19887         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
19888         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
19889         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
19890         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
19891         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
19892         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
19893         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
19894         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
19895         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
19896         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
19897         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
19898         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
19899         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
19900         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
19901         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
19902         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
19903         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
19904         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
19905         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
19906         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
19907         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
19908         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
19909         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
19910         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
19911         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
19912         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
19913         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
19914         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
19915                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
19916         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
19917         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
19918         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19919         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19920         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
19921         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
19922         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19923         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19924         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
19925         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
19926         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
19927         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
19928         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
19929         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
19930         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
19931         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
19932         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
19933         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
19934         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
19935         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
19936         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);

19938         // Force IllegalArgumentException
19939         calibrator = null;
19940         try {
19941             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
19942                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
19943                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
19944             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19945         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19946         }
19947         try {
19948             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19949                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19950                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
19951                     bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
19952             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19953         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19954         }

19957                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19958                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements, bg, mg, gg,
19959                     ba, ma, this);

19961         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19962         }

19985         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19986         }
19987         try {
19988             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19989                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19990                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,
19991                     new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma, this);
19992             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
19993         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
19994         }
19995         try {
19996             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
19997                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
19998                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,
19999                     new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma, this);
20000             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20001         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20002         }
20003         try {
20004             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20005                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20006                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg, mg,

20008             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20009         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20010         }
20011         try {
20012             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20013                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20014                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements, bg,

20016             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20017         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20018         }
20019         try {

20045 
20046     @Test
20047     public void testConstructor59() throws WrongSizeException {
20048         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
20049         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
20050                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
20051         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
20052                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
20053         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
20054         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
20055         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
20056         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
20057         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
20058         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
20059                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
20060 
20061         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
20062         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
20063                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
20064         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
20065                 Collections.emptyList();
20066         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
20067         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
20068         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
20069 
20070         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
20071         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
20072         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
20073         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
20074 
20075         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
20076         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
20077         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
20078         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
20079         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
20080         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
20081         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
20082         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
20083         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
20084 
20085         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
20086         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
20087                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20088                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
20089                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
20090                         false, bg, mg, gg);
20091 
20092         // check default values
20093         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
20094                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
20095         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
20096         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
20097                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
20098         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
20099                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
20100         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
20101         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
20102         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
20103         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
20104         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
20105         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20106         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20107         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
20108                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20109         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
20110         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
20111         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
20112         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20113         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20114         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
20115                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20116         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
20117         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
20118         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
20119         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20120         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20121         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
20122                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20123         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
20124         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
20125         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
20126         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
20127         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
20128         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
20129         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
20130         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
20131         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
20132         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20133         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
20134         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20135         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20136         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20137         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20138         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20139         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20140         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20141         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20142         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20143         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
20144         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
20145         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20146         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
20147         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
20148         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
20149         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
20150         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20151         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
20152         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
20153         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20154         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
20155                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20156         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
20157         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
20158         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
20159         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
20160         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20161         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
20162                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20163         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
20164         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
20165         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
20166         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
20167         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20168         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
20169                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20170         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
20171         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
20172         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
20173         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
20174         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
20175         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20176         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20177         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
20178         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
20179         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
20180         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
20181         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
20182         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
20183         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
20184         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
20185         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
20186         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
20187         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
20188         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
20189         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
20190         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
20191         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
20192         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
20193         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
20194         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
20195         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
20196         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20197         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
20198         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
20199         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
20200         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
20201         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20202         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
20203         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
20204         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
20205         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
20206         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20207         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
20208         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
20209         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
20210                 0.0);
20211         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
20212                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
20213         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
20214                 rotationRate, 0.0);
20215         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
20216                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20217         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
20218                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20219         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
20220         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
20221         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
20222         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
20223         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
20224                 0.0);
20225         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
20226         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
20227         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
20228         assertEquals(time1, time2);
20229         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
20230         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20231         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20232         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
20233         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
20234         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20235         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
20236         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
20237         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
20238         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
20239         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
20240         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
20241         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
20242                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
20243         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
20244                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
20245         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
20246                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
20247         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
20248         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
20249         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
20250         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
20251         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
20252         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
20253         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
20254         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
20255         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
20256         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
20257         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
20258         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
20259         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
20260         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
20261         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
20262         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
20263         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
20264         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
20265         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
20266         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
20267         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
20268         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
20269         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
20270         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
20271         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
20272         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
20273         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
20274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
20275         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
20276         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
20277         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
20278                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
20279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
20280         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
20281         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20282         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
20284         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
20285         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20286         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
20288         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
20289         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20290         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20291         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
20292         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
20293         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
20294         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
20295         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
20296         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
20297         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
20298         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
20299         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
20300 
20301         // Force IllegalArgumentException
20302         calibrator = null;
20303         try {
20304             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
20305                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20306                     true, false, bg, mg, gg);
20307             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20308         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20309         }
20310         try {
20311             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20312                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20313                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
20314                     true, false, bg, mg, gg);
20315             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20316         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20317         }
20318         try {
20319             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20320                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20321                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
20322                     true,
20323                     false, bg, mg, gg);
20324             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20325         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20326         }
20327         try {
20328             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20329                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20330                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20331                     true,
20332                     false,
20333                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg);
20334             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20335         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20336         }
20337         try {
20338             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20339                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20340                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20341                     true,
20342                     false,
20343                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg);
20344             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20345         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20346         }
20347         try {
20348             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20349                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20350                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20351                     true,
20352                     false, bg,
20353                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
20354             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20355         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20356         }
20357         try {
20358             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20359                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20360                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20361                     true,
20362                     false,
20363                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
20364             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20365         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20366         }
20367         try {
20368             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20369                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20370                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20371                     true,
20372                     false,
20373                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
20374             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20375         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20376         }
20377         try {
20378             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20379                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20380                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20381                     true,
20382                     false,
20383                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
20384             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20385         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20386         }
20387         assertNull(calibrator);
20388     }
20389 
20390     @Test
20391     public void testConstructor60() throws WrongSizeException {
20392         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
20393         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
20394                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
20395         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
20396                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
20397         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
20398         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
20399         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
20400         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
20401         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
20402         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
20403                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
20404 
20405         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
20406         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
20407                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
20408         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
20409                 Collections.emptyList();
20410         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
20411         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
20412         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
20413 
20414         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
20415         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
20416         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
20417         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
20418 
20419         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
20420         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
20421         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
20422         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
20423         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
20424         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
20425         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
20426         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
20427         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
20428 
20429         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
20430         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
20431                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20432                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
20433                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
20434                         false, bg, mg, gg, this);
20435 
20436         // check default values
20437         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
20438                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
20439         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
20440         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
20441                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
20442         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
20443                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
20444         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
20445         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
20446         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
20447         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
20448         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
20449         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20450         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20451         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
20452                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20453         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
20454         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
20455         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
20456         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20457         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20458         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
20459                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20460         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
20461         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
20462         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
20463         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20464         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20465         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
20466                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20467         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
20468         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
20469         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
20470         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
20471         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
20472         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
20473         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
20474         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
20475         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
20476         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20477         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
20478         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20479         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20480         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20481         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20482         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20483         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20484         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20485         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20486         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20487         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
20488         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
20489         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20490         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
20491         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
20492         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
20493         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
20494         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20495         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
20496         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
20497         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20498         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
20499                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20500         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
20501         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
20502         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
20503         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
20504         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20505         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
20506                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20507         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
20508         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
20509         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
20510         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
20511         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20512         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
20513                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20514         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
20515         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
20516         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
20517         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
20518         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
20519         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20520         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20521         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
20522         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
20523         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
20524         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
20525         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
20526         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
20527         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
20528         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
20529         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
20530         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
20531         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
20532         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
20533         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
20534         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
20535         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
20536         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
20537         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
20538         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
20539         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
20540         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20541         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
20542         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
20543         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
20544         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
20545         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20546         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
20547         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
20548         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
20549         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
20550         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20551         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
20552         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
20553         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
20554                 0.0);
20555         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
20556                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
20557         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
20558                 rotationRate, 0.0);
20559         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
20560                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20561         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
20562                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20563         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
20564         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
20565         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
20566         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
20567         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
20568                 0.0);
20569         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
20570         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
20571         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
20572         assertEquals(time1, time2);
20573         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
20574         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20575         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20576         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
20577         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
20578         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20579         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
20580         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
20581         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
20582         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
20583         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
20584         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
20585         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
20586                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
20587         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
20588                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
20589         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
20590                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
20591         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
20592         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
20593         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
20594         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
20595         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
20596         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
20597         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
20598         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
20599         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
20600         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
20601         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
20602         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
20603         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
20604         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
20605         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
20606         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
20607         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
20608         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
20609         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
20610         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
20611         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
20612         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
20613         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
20614         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
20615         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
20616         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
20617         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
20618         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
20619         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
20620         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
20621         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
20622                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
20623         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
20624         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
20625         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20626         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20627         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
20628         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
20629         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20630         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20631         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
20632         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
20633         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20634         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20635         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
20636         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
20637         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
20638         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
20639         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
20640         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
20641         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
20642         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
20643         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
20644 
20645         // Force IllegalArgumentException
20646         calibrator = null;
20647         try {
20648             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20649                     new double[9], nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20650                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
20651                     this);
20652             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20653         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20654         }
20655         try {
20656             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20657                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20658                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
20659                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
20660                     this);
20661             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20662         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20663         }
20664         try {
20665             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20666                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20667                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
20668                     true,
20669                     false, bg, mg, gg, this);
20670             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20671         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20672         }
20673         try {
20674             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20675                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20676                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20677                     true,
20678                     false,
20679                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, this);
20680             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20681         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20682         }
20683         try {
20684             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20685                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20686                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20687                     true,
20688                     false,
20689                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, this);
20690             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20691         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20692         }
20693         try {
20694             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20695                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20696                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20697                     true,
20698                     false, bg,
20699                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
20700             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20701         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20702         }
20703         try {
20704             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20705                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20706                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20707                     true,
20708                     false,
20709                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
20710             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20711         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20712         }
20713         try {
20714             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20715                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20716                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20717                     true,
20718                     false,
20719                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
20720             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20721         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20722         }
20723         try {
20724             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20725                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
20726                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20727                     true,
20728                     false,
20729                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
20730             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20731         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20732         }
20733         assertNull(calibrator);
20734     }
20735 
20736     @Test
20737     public void testConstructor61() throws WrongSizeException {
20738         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
20739         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
20740                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
20741         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
20742                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
20743         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
20744         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
20745         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
20746         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
20747         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
20748         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
20749                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
20750 
20751         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
20752         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
20753                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
20754         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
20755                 Collections.emptyList();
20756         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
20757         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
20758         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
20759 
20760         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
20761         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
20762         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
20763         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
20764 
20765         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
20766         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
20767         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
20768         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
20769         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
20770         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
20771         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
20772         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
20773         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
20774 
20775         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
20776         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
20777                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
20778                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
20779                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
20780                         false, bias, mg, gg);
20781 
20782         // check default values
20783         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
20784                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
20785         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
20786         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
20787                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
20788         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
20789                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
20790         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
20791         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
20792         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
20793         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
20794         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
20795         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20796         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20797         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
20798                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20799         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
20800         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
20801         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
20802         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20803         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20804         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
20805                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20806         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
20807         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
20808         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
20809         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
20810         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20811         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
20812                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
20813         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
20814         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
20815         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
20816         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
20817         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
20818         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
20819         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
20820         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
20821         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
20822         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20823         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
20824         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20825         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20826         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20827         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20828         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20829         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20830         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
20831         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
20832         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
20833         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
20834         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
20835         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20836         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
20837         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
20838         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
20839         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
20840         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20841         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
20842         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
20843         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20844         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
20845                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20846         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
20847         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
20848         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
20849         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
20850         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20851         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
20852                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20853         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
20854         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
20855         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
20856         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
20857         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20858         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
20859                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20860         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
20861         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
20862         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
20863         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
20864         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
20865         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
20866         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20867         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
20868         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
20869         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
20870         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
20871         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
20872         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
20873         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
20874         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
20875         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
20876         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
20877         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
20878         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
20879         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
20880         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
20881         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
20882         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
20883         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
20884         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
20885         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
20886         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
20887         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
20888         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
20889         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
20890         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
20891         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20892         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
20893         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
20894         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
20895         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
20896         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
20897         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
20898         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
20899         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
20900                 0.0);
20901         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
20902                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
20903         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
20904                 rotationRate, 0.0);
20905         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
20906                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
20907         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
20908                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
20909         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
20910         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
20911         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
20912         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
20913         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
20914                 0.0);
20915         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
20916         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
20917         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
20918         assertEquals(time1, time2);
20919         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
20920         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20921         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20922         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
20923         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
20924         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
20925         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
20926         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
20927         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
20928         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
20929         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
20930         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
20931         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
20932                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
20933         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
20934                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
20935         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
20936                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
20937         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
20938         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
20939         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
20940         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
20941         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
20942         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
20943         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
20944         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
20945         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
20946         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
20947         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
20948         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
20949         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
20950         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
20951         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
20952         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
20953         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
20954         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
20955         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
20956         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
20957         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
20958         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
20959         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
20960         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
20961         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
20962         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
20963         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
20964         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
20965         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
20966         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
20967         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
20968                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
20969         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
20970         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
20971         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20972         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20973         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
20974         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
20975         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20976         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20977         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
20978         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
20979         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
20980         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
20981         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
20982         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
