20983         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
20984         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
20985         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
20986         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
20987         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
20988         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
20989         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
20990 
20991         // Force IllegalArgumentException
20992         calibrator = null;
20993         try {
20994             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
20995                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
20996                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
20997             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
20998         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
20999         }
21000         try {
21001             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21002                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21003                     0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
21004                     true, false, bias, mg, gg);
21005             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21006         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21007         }
21008         try {
21009             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21010                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21011                     rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
21012                     true,
21013                     false, bias, mg, gg);
21014             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21015         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21016         }
21017         try {
21018             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21019                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21020                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21021                     true,
21022                     false,
21023                     new double[1], mg, gg);
21024             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21025         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21026         }
21027         try {
21028             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21029                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21030                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21031                     true,
21032                     false, bias,
21033                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg);
21034             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21035         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21036         }
21037         try {
21038             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21039                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21040                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21041                     true,
21042                     false,
21043                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg);
21044             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21045         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21046         }
21047         try {
21048             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21049                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21050                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21051                     true,
21052                     false,
21053                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3));
21054             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21055         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21056         }
21057         try {
21058             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21059                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
21060                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21061                     true,
21062                     false,
21063                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1));
21064             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21065         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21066         }
21067         assertNull(calibrator);
21068     }
21069 
21070     @Test
21071     public void testConstructor62() throws WrongSizeException {
21072         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
21073         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
21074                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
21075         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
21076                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
21077         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
21078         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
21079         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
21080         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
21081         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
21082         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
21083                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
21084 
21085         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
21086         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
21087                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
21088         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
21089                 Collections.emptyList();
21090         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
21091         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
21092         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
21093 
21094         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
21095         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
21096         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
21097         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
21098 
21099         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
21100         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
21101         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
21102         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
21103         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
21104         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
21105         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
21106         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
21107         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
21108 
21109         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
21110         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
21111                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21112                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
21113                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
21114                         false, bias, mg, gg, this);
21115 
21116         // check default values
21117         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
21118                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
21119         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
21120         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
21121                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
21122         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
21123                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
21124         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
21125         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
21126         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
21127         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
21128         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
21129         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
21130         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21131         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
21132                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21133         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
21134         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
21135         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
21136         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
21137         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21138         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
21139                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21140         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
21141         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
21142         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
21143         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
21144         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21145         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
21146                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21147         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
21148         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
21149         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
21150         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, new double[3], 0.0);
21151         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
21152         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
21153         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
21154         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
21155         assertEquals(ba1, new Matrix(3, 1));
21156         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21157         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
21158         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
21159         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
21160         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
21161         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
21162         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
21163         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
21164         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
21165         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
21166         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
21167         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
21168         assertEquals(ma1, new Matrix(3, 3));
21169         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21170         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
21171         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
21172         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
21173         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
21174         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21175         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
21176         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
21177         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21178         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
21179                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21180         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
21181         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
21182         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
21183         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
21184         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21185         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
21186                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21187         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
21188         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
21189         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
21190         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
21191         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21192         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
21193                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21194         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
21195         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
21196         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
21197         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
21198         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
21199         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21200         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21201         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
21202         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
21203         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
21204         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
21205         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
21206         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
21207         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
21208         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
21209         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
21210         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
21211         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
21212         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
21213         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
21214         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
21215         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
21216         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
21217         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
21218         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
21219         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
21220         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21221         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
21222         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
21223         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
21224         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
21225         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21226         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
21227         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
21228         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
21229         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
21230         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21231         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
21232         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
21233         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
21234                 0.0);
21235         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
21236                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
21237         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
21238                 rotationRate, 0.0);
21239         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
21240                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21241         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
21242                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21243         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
21244         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
21245         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
21246         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
21247         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
21248                 0.0);
21249         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
21250         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
21251         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
21252         assertEquals(time1, time2);
21253         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
21254         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21255         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21256         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
21257         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
21258         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21259         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
21260         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
21261         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
21262         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
21263         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
21264         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
21265         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
21266                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
21267         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
21268                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
21269         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
21270                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
21271         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
21272         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
21273         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
21274         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
21275         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
21276         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
21277         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
21278         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
21279         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
21280         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
21281         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
21282         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
21283         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
21284         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
21285         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
21286         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
21287         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
21288         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
21289         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
21290         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
21291         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
21292         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
21293         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
21294         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
21295         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
21296         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
21297         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
21298         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
21299         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
21300         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
21301         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
21302                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
21303         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
21304         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
21305         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21306         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21307         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
21308         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
21309         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21310         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21311         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
21312         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
21313         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21314         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21315         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
21316         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
21317         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
21318         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
21319         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
21320         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
21321         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
21322         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
21323         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
21324 
21325         // Force IllegalArgumentException
21326         calibrator = null;
21327         try {
21328             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
21329                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21330                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
21331                     this);
21332             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21333         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21334         }
21335         try {

21337                     nedPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
21338                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,

21342         }

21345                     nedPosition, rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
21346                     true,
21347                     false, bias, mg, gg, this);
21348             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21349         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21350         }
21351         try {
21352             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21353                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21354                     true,
21355                     false,
21356                     new double[1], mg, gg, this);
21357             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21358         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21359         }
21360         try {
21361             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21362                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21363                     true,
21364                     false, bias,
21365                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, this);
21366             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21367         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21368         }
21369         try {
21370             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21371                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21372                     true,
21373                     false,
21374                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, this);
21375             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21376         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21377         }
21378         try {
21379             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21380                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21381                     true,
21382                     false,
21383                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), this);
21384             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21385         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21386         }
21387         try {
21388             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21389                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21390                     true,
21391                     false,
21392                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), this);
21393             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21394         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21395         }
21396         assertNull(calibrator);

21399     @Test
21400     public void testConstructor63() throws WrongSizeException {
21401         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
21402         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
21403                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
21404         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
21405                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
21406         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
21407         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
21408         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
21409         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
21410         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
21411         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
21412                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
21413 
21414         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
21415         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
21416                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
21417         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
21418                 Collections.emptyList();
21419         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
21420         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
21421         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
21422 
21423         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
21424         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
21425         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
21426         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
21427 
21428         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
21429         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
21430         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
21431         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
21432         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
21433         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
21434         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
21435         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
21436         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
21437 
21438         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
21439         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
21440         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
21441 
21442         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
21443         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
21444         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
21445 
21446         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
21447         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
21448         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
21449         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
21450         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
21451         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
21452         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
21453         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
21454         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
21455 
21456         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
21457         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
21458                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21459                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
21460                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
21461                         false, bias, mg, gg,
21462                         accelerometerBias, ma);
21463 
21464         // check default values
21465         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
21466                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
21467         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
21468         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
21469                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
21470         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
21471                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
21472         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
21473         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
21474         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
21475         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
21476         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
21477         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
21478         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21479         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
21480                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21481         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
21482         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
21483         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
21484         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
21485         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21486         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
21487                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21488         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
21489         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
21490         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
21491         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
21492         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21493         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
21494                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21495         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
21496         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
21497         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
21498         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
21499         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
21500         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
21501         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
21502         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
21503         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
21504         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21505         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
21506         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
21507         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
21508         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
21509         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
21510         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
21511         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
21512         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
21513         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
21514         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
21515         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
21516         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
21517         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21518         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
21519         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
21520         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
21521         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
21522         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21523         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
21524         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
21525         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21526         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
21527                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21528         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
21529         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
21530         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
21531         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
21532         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21533         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
21534                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21535         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
21536         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
21537         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
21538         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
21539         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21540         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
21541                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21542         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
21543         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
21544         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
21545         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
21546         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
21547         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21548         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21549         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
21550         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
21551         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
21552         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
21553         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
21554         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
21555         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
21556         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
21557         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
21558         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
21559         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
21560         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
21561         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
21562         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
21563         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
21564         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
21565         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
21566         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
21567         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
21568         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21569         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
21570         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
21571         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
21572         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
21573         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21574         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
21575         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
21576         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
21577         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
21578         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21579         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
21580         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
21581         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
21582                 0.0);
21583         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
21584                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
21585         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
21586                 rotationRate, 0.0);
21587         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
21588                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21589         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
21590                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21591         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
21592         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
21593         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
21594         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
21595         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
21596                 0.0);
21597         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
21598         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
21599         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
21600         assertEquals(time1, time2);
21601         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
21602         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21603         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21604         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
21605         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
21606         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21607         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
21608         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
21609         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
21610         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
21611         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
21612         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
21613         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
21614                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
21615         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
21616                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
21617         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
21618                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
21619         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
21620         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
21621         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
21622         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
21623         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
21624         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
21625         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
21626         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
21627         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
21628         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
21629         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
21630         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
21631         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
21632         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
21633         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
21634         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
21635         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
21636         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
21637         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
21638         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
21639         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
21640         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
21641         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
21642         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
21643         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
21644         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
21645         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
21646         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
21647         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
21648         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
21649         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
21650                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
21651         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
21652         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
21653         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21654         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21655         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
21656         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
21657         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21658         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21659         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
21660         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
21661         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
21662         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
21663         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
21664         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
21665         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
21666         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
21667         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
21668         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
21669         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
21670         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
21671         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
21672 
21673         // Force IllegalArgumentException
21674         calibrator = null;
21675         try {
21676             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
21677                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21678                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
21679                     accelerometerBias, ma);
21680             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21681         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21682         }
21683         try {
21684             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21685                     nedPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
21686                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
21687                     accelerometerBias, ma);
21688             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21689         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21690         }

21692             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21693                     nedPosition, rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
21694                     true,
21695                     false, bias, mg, gg,
21696                     accelerometerBias, ma);
21697             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21698         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21699         }

21702                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21703                     true,
21704                     false,
21705                     new double[1], mg, gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
21706             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21707         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21708         }
21709         try {
21710             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21711                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21712                     true,
21713                     false, bias,
21714                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
21715             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21716         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21717         }
21718         try {
21719             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21720                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21721                     true,
21722                     false,
21723                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma);
21724             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21725         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21726         }
21727         try {
21728             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21729                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21730                     true,
21731                     false,
21732                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma);
21733             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21734         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21735         }
21736         try {
21737             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21738                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21739                     true,
21740                     false,
21741                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma);
21742             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21743         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21744         }
21745         try {
21746             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21747                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21748                     true,
21749                     false,
21750                     bias, mg, gg, new double[1], ma);
21751             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21752         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21753         }
21754         try {
21755             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21756                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21757                     true,
21758                     false,
21759                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
21760                     new Matrix(1, 3));
21761             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21762         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21763         }
21764         try {
21765             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
21766                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
21767                     true,
21768                     false,
21769                     bias, mg, gg, accelerometerBias,
21770                     new Matrix(3, 1));
21771             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
21772         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
21773         }
21774         assertNull(calibrator);
21775     }
21776 
21777     @Test
21778     public void testConstructor64() throws WrongSizeException {
21779         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
21780         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
21781                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
21782         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
21783                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
21784         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
21785         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
21786         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
21787         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
21788         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
21789         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
21790                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
21791 
21792         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
21793         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
21794                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
21795         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
21796                 Collections.emptyList();
21797         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
21798         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
21799         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
21800 
21801         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
21802         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
21803         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
21804         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
21805 
21806         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
21807         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
21808         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
21809         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
21810         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
21811         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
21812         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
21813         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
21814         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
21815 
21816         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
21817         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
21818         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
21819 
21820         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
21821         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
21822         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
21823 
21824         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
21825         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
21826         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
21827         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
21828         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
21829         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
21830         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
21831         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
21832         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
21833 
21834         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
21835         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
21836                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
21837                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
21838                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
21839                         false, bias, mg, gg,
21840                         accelerometerBias, ma, this);
21841 
21842         // check default values
21843         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
21844                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
21845         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
21846         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
21847                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
21848         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
21849                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
21850         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
21851         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
21852         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
21853         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
21854         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
21855         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
21856         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21857         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
21858                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21859         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
21860         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
21861         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
21862         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
21863         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21864         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
21865                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21866         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
21867         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
21868         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
21869         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
21870         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21871         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
21872                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
21873         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
21874         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
21875         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
21876         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
21877         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
21878         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
21879         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
21880         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
21881         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
21882         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21883         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
21884         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
21885         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
21886         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
21887         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
21888         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
21889         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
21890         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
21891         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
21892         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
21893         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
21894         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
21895         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21896         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
21897         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
21898         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
21899         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
21900         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21901         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
21902         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
21903         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21904         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
21905                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21906         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
21907         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
21908         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
21909         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
21910         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21911         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
21912                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21913         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
21914         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
21915         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
21916         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
21917         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21918         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
21919                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21920         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
21921         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
21922         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
21923         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
21924         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
21925         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
21926         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21927         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
21928         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
21929         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
21930         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
21931         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
21932         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
21933         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
21934         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
21935         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
21936         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
21937         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
21938         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
21939         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
21940         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
21941         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
21942         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
21943         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
21944         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
21945         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
21946         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
21947         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
21948         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
21949         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
21950         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
21951         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21952         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
21953         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
21954         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
21955         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
21956         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
21957         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
21958         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
21959         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
21960                 0.0);
21961         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
21962                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
21963         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
21964                 rotationRate, 0.0);
21965         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
21966                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
21967         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
21968                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
21969         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
21970         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
21971         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
21972         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
21973         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
21974                 0.0);
21975         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
21976         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
21977         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
21978         assertEquals(time1, time2);
21979         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
21980         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21981         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21982         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
21983         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
21984         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
21985         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
21986         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
21987         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
21988         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
21989         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
21990         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
21991         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
21992                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
21993         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
21994                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
21995         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
21996                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
21997         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
21998         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
21999         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
22000         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
22001         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
22002         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
22003         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
22004         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
22005         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
22006         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
22007         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
22008         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
22009         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
22010         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
22011         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
22012         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
22013         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
22014         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
22015         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
22016         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
22017         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
22018         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
22019         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
22020         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
22021         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
22022         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
22023         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
22024         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
22025         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
22026         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
22027         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
22028                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
22029         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
22030         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
22031         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22032         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22033         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
22034         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
22035         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22036         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22037         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
22038         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
22039         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22040         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22041         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
22042         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
22043         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
22044         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
22045         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
22046         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
22047         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
22048         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
22049         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
22050 
22051         // Force IllegalArgumentException
22052         calibrator = null;
22053         try {
22054             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
22055                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22056                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
22057                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);
22058             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22059         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22060         }
22061         try {
22062             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22063                     nedPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
22064                     true, false, bias, mg, gg,
22065                     accelerometerBias, ma, this);

22067         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22068         }

22077         }

22087         }

22092                     false, bias,

22096         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22097         }

22100                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22101                     true,
22102                     false,
22103                     bias, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, accelerometerBias, ma,
22104                     this);
22105             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22106         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22107         }
22108         try {
22109             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22110                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22111                     true,
22112                     false,
22113                     bias, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), accelerometerBias, ma,
22114                     this);
22115             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22116         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22117         }
22118         try {
22119             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22120                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22121                     true,
22122                     false,
22123                     bias, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), accelerometerBias, ma,
22124                     this);
22125             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22126         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22127         }
22128         try {
22129             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22130                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22131                     true,
22132                     false,

22137         try {

22139                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
