22159 
22160     @Test
22161     public void testConstructor65() throws WrongSizeException {
22162         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
22163         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
22164                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
22165         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
22166                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
22167         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
22168         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
22169         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
22170         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
22171         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
22172         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
22173                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
22174 
22175         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
22176         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
22177                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
22178         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
22179                 Collections.emptyList();
22180         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
22181         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
22182         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
22183 
22184         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
22185         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
22186         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
22187         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
22188 
22189         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
22190         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
22191         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
22192         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
22193         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
22194         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
22195         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
22196         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
22197         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
22198 
22199         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
22200         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
22201         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
22202 
22203         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
22204         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
22205         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
22206 
22207         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
22208         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
22209         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
22210         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
22211         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
22212         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
22213         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
22214         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
22215         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
22216 
22217         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
22218         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
22219                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
22220                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
22221                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
22222                         false, bg, mg, gg,
22223                         ba, ma);
22224 
22225         // check default values
22226         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
22227                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
22228         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
22229         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
22230                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
22231         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
22232                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
22233         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
22234         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
22235         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
22236         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
22237         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
22238         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
22239         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22240         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
22241                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22242         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
22243         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
22244         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
22245         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
22246         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22247         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
22248                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22249         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
22250         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
22251         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
22252         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
22253         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22254         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
22255                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22256         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
22257         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
22258         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
22259         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
22260         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
22261         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
22262         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
22263         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
22264         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
22265         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
22266         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
22267         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
22268         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
22269         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
22270         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
22271         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
22272         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
22273         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
22274         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
22275         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
22276         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
22277         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
22278         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22279         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
22280         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
22281         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
22282         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
22283         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
22284         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
22285         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
22286         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22287         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
22288                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
22289         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
22290         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
22291         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
22292         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
22293         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22294         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
22295                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22296         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
22297         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
22298         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
22299         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
22300         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22301         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
22302                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22303         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
22304         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
22305         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
22306         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
22307         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
22308         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
22309         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22310         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
22311         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
22312         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
22313         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
22314         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
22315         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
22316         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
22317         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
22318         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
22319         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
22320         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
22321         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
22322         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
22323         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
22324         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
22325         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
22326         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
22327         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
22328         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
22329         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
22330         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
22331         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
22332         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
22333         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
22334         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22335         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
22336         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
22337         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
22338         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
22339         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22340         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
22341         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
22342         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
22343                 0.0);
22344         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
22345                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
22346         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
22347                 rotationRate, 0.0);
22348         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
22349                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22350         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
22351                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
22352         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
22353         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
22354         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
22355         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
22356         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
22357                 0.0);
22358         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
22359         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
22360         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
22361         assertEquals(time1, time2);
22362         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
22363         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22364         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22365         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
22366         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
22367         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22368         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
22369         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
22370         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());
22371         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
22372         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
22373         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
22374         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
22375                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
22376         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
22377                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
22378         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
22379                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
22380         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
22381         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
22382         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
22383         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
22384         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
22385         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
22386         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
22387         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
22388         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
22389         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
22390         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
22391         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
22392         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
22393         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
22394         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
22395         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
22396         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
22397         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
22398         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
22399         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
22400         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
22401         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
22402         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
22403         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
22404         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
22405         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
22406         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
22407         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
22408         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
22409         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
22410         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
22411                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
22412         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
22413         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
22414         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22415         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22416         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
22417         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
22418         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22419         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22420         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
22421         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
22422         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22423         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22424         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
22425         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
22426         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
22427         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
22428         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
22429         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
22430         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
22431         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
22432         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
22433 
22434         // Force IllegalArgumentException
22435         calibrator = null;
22436         try {
22437             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
22438                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22439                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
22440                     ba, ma);
22441             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22442         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22443         }
22444         try {
22445             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22446                     nedPosition, 0.0, timeInterval, measurements,
22447                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
22448                     ba, ma);
22449             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22450         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22451         }
22452         try {
22453             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22454                     nedPosition, rotationRate, 0.0, measurements,
22455                     true,
22456                     false, bg, mg, gg,
22457                     ba, ma);
22458             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22459         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22460         }
22461         try {
22462             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22463                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22464                     true,
22465                     false,
22466                     new Matrix(1, 1), mg, gg, ba, ma);
22467             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22468         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22469         }

22472                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22473                     true,
22474                     false,
22475                     new Matrix(3, 3), mg, gg, ba, ma);
22476             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22477         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22478         }
22479         try {
22480             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22481                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22482                     true,
22483                     false, bg,
22484                     new Matrix(1, 3), gg, ba, ma);
22485             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22486         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22487         }
22488         try {
22489             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22490                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22491                     true,
22492                     false,
22493                     bg, new Matrix(3, 1), gg, ba, ma);
22494             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22495         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22496         }
22497         try {
22498             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22499                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22500                     true,
22501                     false,
22502                     bg, mg, new Matrix(1, 3), ba, ma);
22503             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22504         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22505         }
22506         try {
22507             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22508                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22509                     true,
22510                     false,
22511                     bg, mg, new Matrix(3, 1), ba, ma);
22512             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22513         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22514         }
22515         try {
22516             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22517                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22518                     true,
22519                     false,
22520                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(1, 1), ma);
22521             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22522         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22523         }
22524         try {
22525             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(qualityScores,
22526                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22527                     true,
22528                     false,
22529                     bg, mg, gg, new Matrix(3, 3), ma);
22530             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22531         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22532         }
22533         try {
22534             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
22535                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
22536                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22537                     true,
22538                     false,
22539                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
22540                     new Matrix(1, 3));
22541             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22542         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22543         }
22544         try {
22545             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
22546                     qualityScores, nedPosition,
22547                     rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22548                     true,
22549                     false,
22550                     bg, mg, gg, ba,
22551                     new Matrix(3, 1));
22552             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22553         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22554         }
22555         assertNull(calibrator);
22556     }
22557 
22558     @Test
22559     public void testConstructor66() throws WrongSizeException {
22560         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
22561         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
22562                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
22563         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
22564                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
22565         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
22566         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
22567         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
22568         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
22569         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
22570         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
22571                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
22572 
22573         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
22574         final double timeInterval = randomizer.nextDouble(
22575                 MIN_TIME_INTERVAL, MAX_TIME_INTERVAL);
22576         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
22577                 Collections.emptyList();
22578         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
22579         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
22580         final Matrix gg = generateGg();
22581 
22582         final double bgx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
22583         final double bgy = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
22584         final double bgz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
22585         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
22586 
22587         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
22588         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
22589         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
22590         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
22591         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
22592         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
22593         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
22594         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
22595         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
22596 
22597         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
22598         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
22599         final double[] accelerometerBias = ba.getBuffer();
22600 
22601         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
22602         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
22603         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
22604 
22605         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
22606         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
22607         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
22608         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
22609         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
22610         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
22611         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
22612         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
22613         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
22614 
22615         final double[] qualityScores = new double[10];
22616         PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
22617                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
22618                         qualityScores, nedPosition, rotationRate,
22619                         timeInterval, measurements, false,
22620                         false, bg, mg, gg,
22621                         ba, ma, this);
22622 
22623         // check default values
22624         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
22625                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
22626         assertSame(calibrator.getQualityScores(), qualityScores);
22627         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(),
22628                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_INLIERS);
22629         assertEquals(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepResiduals(),
22630                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_COMPUTE_AND_KEEP_RESIDUALS);
22631         assertEquals(calibrator.getMethod(), RobustEstimatorMethod.PROSAC);
22632         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
22633         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
22634         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
22635         final Acceleration accelerationX1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
22636         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bax, 0.0);
22637         assertEquals(accelerationX1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22638         final Acceleration accelerationX2 = new Acceleration(
22639                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22640         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(accelerationX2);
22641         assertEquals(accelerationX1, accelerationX2);
22642         final Acceleration accelerationY1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
22643         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bay, 0.0);
22644         assertEquals(accelerationY1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22645         final Acceleration accelerationY2 = new Acceleration(
22646                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22647         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(accelerationY2);
22648         assertEquals(accelerationY1, accelerationY2);
22649         final Acceleration accelerationZ1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
22650         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), baz, 0.0);
22651         assertEquals(accelerationZ1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22652         final Acceleration accelerationZ2 = new Acceleration(
22653                 0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
22654         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(accelerationZ2);
22655         assertEquals(accelerationZ1, accelerationZ2);
22656         final double[] accelerometerBias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
22657         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias, 0.0);
22658         final double[] accelerometerBias2 = new double[3];
22659         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(accelerometerBias2);
22660         assertArrayEquals(accelerometerBias1, accelerometerBias2, 0.0);
22661         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
22662         assertEquals(ba1, ba);
22663         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
22664         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
22665         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
22666         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
22667         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
22668         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
22669         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
22670         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
22671         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
22672         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
22673         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
22674         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
22675         assertEquals(ma1, ma);
22676         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22677         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
22678         assertEquals(ma1, ma2);
22679         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bgx, 0.0);
22680         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), bgy, 0.0);
22681         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bgz, 0.0);
22682         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
22683         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgx, 0.0);
22684         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22685         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX2 = new AngularSpeed(
22686                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
22687         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeedX2);
22688         assertEquals(angularSpeedX1, angularSpeedX2);
22689         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
22690         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgy, 0.0);
22691         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22692         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY2 = new AngularSpeed(
22693                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22694         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeedY2);
22695         assertEquals(angularSpeedY1, angularSpeedY2);
22696         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
22697         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getValue().doubleValue(), bgz, 0.0);
22698         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22699         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ2 = new AngularSpeed(
22700                 0.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22701         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeedZ2);
22702         assertEquals(angularSpeedZ1, angularSpeedZ2);
22703         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
22704         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueX(), bgx, 0.0);
22705         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueY(), bgy, 0.0);
22706         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getValueZ(), bgz, 0.0);
22707         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22708         final AngularSpeedTriad initialBiasTriad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
22709         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(initialBiasTriad2);
22710         assertEquals(initialBiasTriad1, initialBiasTriad2);
22711         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
22712         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
22713         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
22714         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
22715         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
22716         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
22717         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
22718         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
22719         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
22720         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
22721         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias, 0.0);
22722         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
22723         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
22724         assertArrayEquals(bias1, bias2, 0.0);
22725         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
22726         assertEquals(bg1, bg);
22727         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
22728         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
22729         assertEquals(bg1, bg2);
22730         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
22731         assertEquals(mg1, mg);
22732         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22733         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
22734         assertEquals(mg1, mg2);
22735         final Matrix gg1 = calibrator.getInitialGg();
22736         assertEquals(gg1, gg);
22737         final Matrix gg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
22738         calibrator.getInitialGg(gg2);
22739         assertEquals(gg1, gg2);
22740         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
22741                 0.0);
22742         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
22743                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
22744         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
22745                 rotationRate, 0.0);
22746         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
22747                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
22748         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
22749                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
22750         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotationRate2);
22751         assertEquals(rotationRate1, rotationRate2);
22752         assertEquals(calibrator.getTimeInterval(), timeInterval, 0.0);
22753         final Time time1 = calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime();
22754         assertEquals(time1.getValue().doubleValue(), timeInterval,
22755                 0.0);
22756         assertEquals(time1.getUnit(), TimeUnit.SECOND);
22757         final Time time2 = new Time(0.0, TimeUnit.MILLISECOND);
22758         calibrator.getTimeIntervalAsTime(time2);
22759         assertEquals(time1, time2);
22760         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
22761         assertTrue(calibrator.getEcefPosition().equals(ecefPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22762         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22763         final NEDPosition nedPosition2 = new NEDPosition();
22764         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(nedPosition2));
22765         assertTrue(nedPosition2.equals(nedPosition, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
22766         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
22767         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
22768         assertSame(calibrator.getListener(), this);
22769         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(), 13);
22770         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
22771         assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
22772         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
22773                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
22774         assertEquals(calibrator.getConfidence(),
22775                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE, 0.0);
22776         assertEquals(calibrator.getMaxIterations(),
22777                 RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS);
22778         assertNull(calibrator.getInliersData());
22779         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
22780         assertTrue(calibrator.isCovarianceKept());
22781         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases());
22782         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(null));
22783         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix());
22784         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(null));
22785         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX());
22786         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY());
22787         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ());
22788         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX());
22789         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(null));
22790         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY());
22791         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(null));
22792         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ());
22793         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(null));
22794         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad());
22795         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAsTriad(null));
22796         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMg());
22797         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSx());
22798         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSy());
22799         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedSz());
22800         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxy());
22801         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMxz());
22802         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyx());
22803         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMyz());
22804         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzx());
22805         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedMzy());
22806         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
22807         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
22808         assertEquals(calibrator.getPreliminarySubsetSize(), TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator
22809                 .MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_GENERAL_AND_CROSS_BIASES);
22810         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
22811         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
22812         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22813         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22814         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
22815         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
22816         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22817         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22818         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
22819         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
22820         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed());
22821         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(null));
22822         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation());
22823         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(null));
22824         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage());
22825         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed());
22826         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(null));
22827         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm());
22828         assertNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed());
22829         assertFalse(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(null));
22830         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedMse(), 0.0, 0.0);
22831 
22832         // Force IllegalArgumentException
22833         calibrator = null;
22834         try {
22835             calibrator = new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(new double[9],
22836                     nedPosition, rotationRate, timeInterval, measurements,
22837                     true, false, bg, mg, gg,
22838                     ba, ma, this);

22954     @Test
22955     public void testGetSetThreshold() throws LockedException {
22956         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
22957                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
22958 
22959         // check default value
22960         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(),
22961                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, 0.0);
22962 
22963         // set new value
22964         calibrator.setThreshold(1.0);
22965 
22966         // check
22967         assertEquals(calibrator.getThreshold(), 1.0, 0.0);
22968 
22969         // Force IllegalArgumentException
22970         try {
22971             calibrator.setThreshold(0.0);
22972             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22973         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22974         }
22975     }
22976 
22977     @Test
22978     public void testGetSetQualityScores() throws LockedException {
22979         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
22980                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
22981 
22982         // check default value
22983         assertNull(calibrator.getQualityScores());
22984 
22985         // set new value
22986         final double[] qualityScores = new double[
22987                 TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_COMMON_Z_AXIS];
22988         calibrator.setQualityScores(qualityScores);
22989 
22990         // check
22991         assertSame(qualityScores, calibrator.getQualityScores());
22992 
22993         // Force IllegalArgumentException
22994         try {
22995             calibrator.setQualityScores(new double[9]);
22996             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
22997         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
22998         }
22999     }

23001     @Test
23002     public void testIsSetComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled() throws LockedException {
23003         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23004                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23005 
23006         // check default value
23007         assertFalse(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled());
23008 
23009         // set new value
23010         calibrator.setComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled(true);
23011 
23012         // check
23013         assertTrue(calibrator.isComputeAndKeepInliersEnabled());
23014     }

23031     @Test
23032     public void testGetSetProgressDelta() throws LockedException {
23033         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23034                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23035 
23036         // check default value
23037         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(),
23038                 PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DELTA, 0.0);
23039 
23040         // set new value
23041         calibrator.setProgressDelta(0.5f);
23042 
23043         // check
23044         assertEquals(calibrator.getProgressDelta(), 0.5f, 0.0);
23045 
23046         // Force IllegalArgumentException
23047         try {
23048             calibrator.setProgressDelta(-1.0f);
23049             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23050         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23051         }
23052         try {
23053             calibrator.setProgressDelta(2.0f);
23054             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23055         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23056         }
23057     }

23109     @Test
23110     public void testIsSetResultRefined() throws LockedException {
23111         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23112                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23113 
23114         // check default value
23115         assertTrue(calibrator.isResultRefined());
23116 
23117         // set new value
23118         calibrator.setResultRefined(false);
23119 
23120         // check
23121         assertFalse(calibrator.isResultRefined());

23124     @Test

23129         // check default value

23162     @Test
23163     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasX() throws LockedException {

23165                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();

23173 
23174         calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasX(bax);
23175 
23176         // check
23177         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
23178     }

23216     @Test
23217     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration() throws LockedException {
23218         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23219                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23220 
23221         // check default value
23222         final Acceleration acceleration1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
23223         assertEquals(acceleration1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23224         assertEquals(acceleration1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23225 
23226         // set new value
23227         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23228         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
23229         final Acceleration acceleration2 = new Acceleration(bax, AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23230         calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasX(acceleration2);
23231 
23232         // check
23233         final Acceleration acceleration3 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration();
23234         final Acceleration acceleration4 = new Acceleration(0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23235         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasXAsAcceleration(acceleration4);
23236         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration3);
23237         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration4);
23238     }
23239 
23240     @Test
23241     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration() throws LockedException {
23242         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23243                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23244 
23245         // check default value
23246         final Acceleration acceleration1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
23247         assertEquals(acceleration1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23248         assertEquals(acceleration1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23249 
23250         // set new value
23251         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23252         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
23253         final Acceleration acceleration2 = new Acceleration(bay, AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23254         calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasY(acceleration2);
23255 
23256         // check
23257         final Acceleration acceleration3 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration();
23258         final Acceleration acceleration4 = new Acceleration(0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23259         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasYAsAcceleration(acceleration4);
23260         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration3);
23261         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration4);
23262     }

23264     @Test
23265     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration() throws LockedException {
23266         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23267                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23268 
23269         // check default value
23270         final Acceleration acceleration1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
23271         assertEquals(acceleration1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23272         assertEquals(acceleration1.getUnit(), AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23273 
23274         // set new value
23275         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23276         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
23277         final Acceleration acceleration2 = new Acceleration(baz, AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23278         calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasZ(acceleration2);
23279 
23280         // check
23281         final Acceleration acceleration3 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration();
23282         final Acceleration acceleration4 = new Acceleration(0.0, AccelerationUnit.FEET_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23283         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZAsAcceleration(acceleration4);
23284         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration3);
23285         assertEquals(acceleration2, acceleration4);
23286     }

23288     @Test
23289     public void testSetAccelerometerBias1() throws LockedException {
23290         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23291                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23292 
23293         // check default values
23294         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
23295         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
23296         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
23297 
23298 
23299         // set new values
23300         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23301         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
23302         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
23303         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
23304 
23305         calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(bax, bay, baz);
23306 
23307         // check
23308         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
23309         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
23310         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
23311     }
23312 
23313     @Test
23314     public void testSetAccelerometerBias2() throws LockedException {
23315         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23316                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23317 
23318         // check default values
23319         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
23320         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
23321         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
23322 
23323         // set new values
23324         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23325         final double bax = ba.getElementAtIndex(0);
23326         final double bay = ba.getElementAtIndex(1);
23327         final double baz = ba.getElementAtIndex(2);
23328 
23329         final Acceleration accelerationX = new Acceleration(bax,
23330                 AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23331         final Acceleration accelerationY = new Acceleration(bay,
23332                 AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23333         final Acceleration accelerationZ = new Acceleration(baz,
23334                 AccelerationUnit.METERS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND);
23335 
23336         calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(
23337                 accelerationX, accelerationY, accelerationZ);
23338 
23339         // check
23340         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasX(), bax, 0.0);
23341         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasY(), bay, 0.0);
23342         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasZ(), baz, 0.0);
23343     }
23344 
23345     @Test
23346     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasArray() throws LockedException {
23347         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23348                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23349 
23350         // check default value
23351         assertArrayEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(), new double[3], 0.0);
23352 
23353         // set new value
23354         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23355         final double[] bias = ba.getBuffer();
23356 
23357         calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(bias);
23358 
23359         // check
23360         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBias();
23361         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
23362         calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(bias2);
23363 
23364         assertArrayEquals(bias, bias1, 0.0);
23365         assertArrayEquals(bias, bias2, 0.0);
23366 
23367         // Force IllegalArgumentException
23368         try {
23369             calibrator.getAccelerometerBias(new double[1]);
23370             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23371         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23372         }
23373         try {
23374             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(new double[1]);
23375             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23376         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23377         }
23378     }
23379 
23380     @Test
23381     public void testGetSetAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix()
23382             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
23383         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23384                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23385 
23386         // check default value
23387         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(),
23388                 new Matrix(3, 1));
23389 
23390         // set new value
23391         final Matrix ba = generateBa();
23392         calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(ba);
23393 
23394         // check
23395         final Matrix ba1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix();
23396         final Matrix ba2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
23397         calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(ba2);
23398 
23399         assertEquals(ba, ba1);
23400         assertEquals(ba, ba2);
23401 
23402         // Force IllegalArgumentException
23403         try {
23404             calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(
23405                     new Matrix(1, 1));
23406             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23407         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23408         }
23409         try {
23410             calibrator.getAccelerometerBiasAsMatrix(
23411                     new Matrix(3, 3));
23412             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23413         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23414         }
23415         try {
23416             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(
23417                     new Matrix(1, 1));
23418             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23419         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23420         }
23421         try {
23422             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(
23423                     new Matrix(3, 3));
23424             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23425         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23426         }
23427     }

23429     @Test
23430     public void testGetSetInitialBiasAsTriad() throws LockedException {
23431         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23432                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23433 
23434         // check default values
23435         final AngularSpeedTriad triad1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
23436         assertEquals(triad1.getValueX(), 0.0, 0.0);
23437         assertEquals(triad1.getValueY(), 0.0, 0.0);
23438         assertEquals(triad1.getValueZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
23439         assertEquals(triad1.getUnit(), AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23440         final AngularSpeedTriad triad2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
23441         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(triad2);
23442         assertEquals(triad1, triad2);
23443 
23444         // set new values
23445         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
23446         final double initialBiasX = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
23447         final double initialBiasY = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
23448         final double initialBiasZ = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
23449 
23450         final AngularSpeedTriad triad3 = new AngularSpeedTriad(
23451                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND,
23452                 initialBiasX, initialBiasY, initialBiasZ);
23453         calibrator.setInitialBias(triad3);
23454 
23455         final AngularSpeedTriad triad4 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad();
23456         final AngularSpeedTriad triad5 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
23457         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsTriad(triad5);
23458 
23459         assertEquals(triad3, triad4);
23460         assertEquals(triad3, triad5);
23461     }
23462

23668     @Test
23669     public void testGetSetAccelerometerCrossCouplingErrors()
23670             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
23671         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23672                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23673 
23674         // check default values
23675         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23676         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23677         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23678         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23679         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23680         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23681 
23682         // set new values
23683         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
23684         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
23685         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
23686         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
23687         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
23688         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
23689         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
23690 
23691         calibrator.setAccelerometerCrossCouplingErrors(
23692                 amxy, amxz, amyx, amyz, amzx, amzy);
23693 
23694         // check
23695         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
23696         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
23697         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
23698         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
23699         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
23700         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
23701     }
23702 
23703     @Test
23704     public void testGetSetAccelerometerScalingFactorsAndCrossCouplingErrors()
23705             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
23706         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23707                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23708 
23709         // check default values
23710         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23711         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23712         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23713         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23714         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23715         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23716         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23717         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23718         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23719 
23720         // set new values
23721         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
23722         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
23723         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
23724         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
23725         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
23726         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
23727         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
23728         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
23729         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
23730         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
23731 
23732         calibrator.setAccelerometerScalingFactorsAndCrossCouplingErrors(
23733                 asx, asy, asz, amxy, amxz, amyx, amyz, amzx, amzy);
23734 
23735         // check
23736         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
23737         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
23738         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
23739         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
23740         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
23741         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
23742         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
23743         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
23744         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
23745     }
23746 
23747     @Test
23748     public void testGetSetAccelerometerMa() throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
23749         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23750                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23751 
23752         // check default values
23753         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23754         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23755         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23756         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23757         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23758         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23759         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
23760         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
23761         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
23762 
23763         // set new values
23764         final Matrix ma = generateMa();
23765         final double asx = ma.getElementAt(0, 0);
23766         final double asy = ma.getElementAt(1, 1);
23767         final double asz = ma.getElementAt(2, 2);
23768         final double amxy = ma.getElementAt(0, 1);
23769         final double amxz = ma.getElementAt(0, 2);
23770         final double amyx = ma.getElementAt(1, 0);
23771         final double amyz = ma.getElementAt(1, 2);
23772         final double amzx = ma.getElementAt(2, 0);
23773         final double amzy = ma.getElementAt(2, 1);
23774 
23775         calibrator.setAccelerometerMa(ma);
23776 
23777         // check
23778         final Matrix ma1 = calibrator.getAccelerometerMa();
23779         final Matrix ma2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
23780         calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(ma2);
23781 
23782         assertEquals(ma, ma1);
23783         assertEquals(ma, ma2);
23784 
23785         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSx(), asx, 0.0);
23786         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSy(), asy, 0.0);
23787         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerSz(), asz, 0.0);
23788         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxy(), amxy, 0.0);
23789         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMxz(), amxz, 0.0);
23790         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyx(), amyx, 0.0);
23791         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMyz(), amyz, 0.0);
23792         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzx(), amzx, 0.0);
23793         assertEquals(calibrator.getAccelerometerMzy(), amzy, 0.0);
23794 
23795         // Force IllegalArgumentException
23796         try {
23797             calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(new Matrix(1, 3));
23798             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23799         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23800         }
23801         try {
23802             calibrator.getAccelerometerMa(new Matrix(3, 1));
23803             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23804         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23805         }
23806         try {
23807             calibrator.setAccelerometerMa(new Matrix(1, 3));
23808             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23809         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23810         }
23811         try {
23812             calibrator.setAccelerometerMa(new Matrix(3, 1));
23813             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
23814         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
23815         }
23816     }
23817

23872     @Test
23873     public void testGetSetInitialBiasAngularSpeedX()
23874             throws LockedException {
23875         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23876                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23877 
23878         // check default value
23879         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed1 = calibrator
23880                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
23881         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23882         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getUnit(),
23883                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23884 
23885         // set new value
23886         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
23887         final double bx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
23888         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed2 = new AngularSpeed(
23889                 bx, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23890 
23891         calibrator.setInitialBiasX(angularSpeed2);
23892 
23893         // check
23894         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed3 = calibrator
23895                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX();
23896         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed4 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
23897                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
23898         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedX(angularSpeed4);
23899 
23900         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed3);
23901         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed4);
23902     }
23903 
23904     @Test
23905     public void testGetSetInitialBiasAngularSpeedY()
23906             throws LockedException {
23907         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23908                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23909 
23910         // check default value
23911         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed1 = calibrator
23912                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
23913         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23914         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getUnit(),
23915                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23916 
23917         // set new value
23918         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
23919         final double by = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
23920         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed2 = new AngularSpeed(
23921                 by, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23922 
23923         calibrator.setInitialBiasY(angularSpeed2);
23924 
23925         // check
23926         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed3 = calibrator
23927                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
23928         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed4 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
23929                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
23930         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY(angularSpeed4);
23931 
23932         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed3);
23933         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed4);
23934     }
23935 
23936     @Test
23937     public void testGetSetInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ() throws LockedException {
23938         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23939                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23940 
23941         // check default value
23942         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed1 = calibrator
23943                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedY();
23944         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0, 0.0);
23945         assertEquals(angularSpeed1.getUnit(),
23946                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23947 
23948         // set new value
23949         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
23950         final double bz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
23951         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed2 = new AngularSpeed(
23952                 bz, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
23953 
23954         calibrator.setInitialBiasZ(angularSpeed2);
23955 
23956         // check
23957         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed3 = calibrator
23958                 .getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ();
23959         final AngularSpeed angularSpeed4 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
23960                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
23961         calibrator.getInitialBiasAngularSpeedZ(angularSpeed4);
23962 
23963         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed3);
23964         assertEquals(angularSpeed2, angularSpeed4);
23965     }

23991     @Test
23992     public void testSetInitialBias2() throws LockedException {
23993         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
23994                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
23995 
23996         // check default values
23997         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), 0.0, 0.0);
23998         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), 0.0, 0.0);
23999         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), 0.0, 0.0);
24000 
24001         // set new values
24002         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
24003         final double bx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
24004         final double by = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
24005         final double bz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
24006 
24007         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedX = new AngularSpeed(bx,
24008                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
24009         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedY = new AngularSpeed(by,
24010                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
24011         final AngularSpeed angularSpeedZ = new AngularSpeed(bz,
24012                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
24013 
24014         calibrator.setInitialBias(
24015                 angularSpeedX, angularSpeedY, angularSpeedZ);
24016 
24017         // check
24018         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), bx, 0.0);
24019         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), by, 0.0);
24020         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), bz, 0.0);
24021     }
