24219     @Test
24220     public void testSetInitialCrossCouplingErrors()
24221             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
24222         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24223                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24224 
24225         // check default values
24226         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24227         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24228         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24229         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24230         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24231         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24232 
24233         // set new values
24234         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
24235         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
24236         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
24237         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
24238         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
24239         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
24240         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
24241 
24242         calibrator.setInitialCrossCouplingErrors(
24243                 mxy, mxz, myx, myz, mzx, mzy);
24244 
24245         // check
24246         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
24247         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
24248         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
24249         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
24250         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
24251         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
24252     }
24253 
24254     @Test
24255     public void testSetInitialScalingFactorsAndCrossCouplingErrors()
24256             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
24257         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24258                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24259 
24260         // check default values
24261         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24262         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24263         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24264         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24265         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24266         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24267         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24268         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24269         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24270 
24271         // set new values
24272         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
24273         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
24274         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
24275         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
24276         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
24277         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
24278         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
24279         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
24280         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
24281         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
24282 
24283         calibrator.setInitialScalingFactorsAndCrossCouplingErrors(
24284                 sx, sy, sz, mxy, mxz, myx, myz, mzx, mzy);
24285 
24286         // check
24287         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
24288         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
24289         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
24290         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
24291         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
24292         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
24293         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
24294         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
24295         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
24296     }
24297 
24298     @Test
24299     public void testGetSetInitialBiasArray() throws LockedException {
24300         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24301                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24302 
24303         // check default value
24304         assertArrayEquals(calibrator.getInitialBias(), new double[3], 0.0);
24305 
24306         // set new value
24307         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
24308         final double[] bias = bg.getBuffer();
24309 
24310         calibrator.setInitialBias(bias);
24311 
24312         // check
24313         final double[] bias1 = calibrator.getInitialBias();
24314         final double[] bias2 = new double[3];
24315         calibrator.getInitialBias(bias2);
24316 
24317         assertArrayEquals(bias, bias1, 0.0);
24318         assertArrayEquals(bias, bias2, 0.0);
24319 
24320         // Force IllegalArgumentException
24321         try {
24322             calibrator.getInitialBias(new double[1]);
24323             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24324         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24325         }
24326         try {
24327             calibrator.setInitialBias(new double[1]);
24328             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24329         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24330         }
24331     }
24332 
24333     @Test
24334     public void testGetSetInitialBiasAsMatrix()
24335             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
24336         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24337                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24338 
24339         // check default value
24340         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(),
24341                 new Matrix(3, 1));
24342 
24343         // set new value
24344         final Matrix bg = generateBg();
24345         final double bx = bg.getElementAtIndex(0);
24346         final double by = bg.getElementAtIndex(1);
24347         final double bz = bg.getElementAtIndex(2);
24348 
24349         calibrator.setInitialBias(bg);
24350 
24351         // check
24352         final Matrix bg1 = calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix();
24353         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
24354         calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(bg2);
24355 
24356         assertEquals(bg, bg1);
24357         assertEquals(bg, bg2);
24358 
24359         assertEquals(bx, calibrator.getInitialBiasX(), 0.0);
24360         assertEquals(by, calibrator.getInitialBiasY(), 0.0);
24361         assertEquals(bz, calibrator.getInitialBiasZ(), 0.0);
24362 
24363         // Force IllegalArgumentException
24364         try {
24365             calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(new Matrix(1, 1));
24366             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24367         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24368         }
24369         try {
24370             calibrator.getInitialBiasAsMatrix(new Matrix(3, 3));
24371             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24372         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24373         }
24374         try {
24375             calibrator.setInitialBias(new Matrix(1, 1));
24376             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24377         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24378         }
24379         try {
24380             calibrator.setInitialBias(new Matrix(3, 3));
24381             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24382         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24383         }
24384     }
24385 
24386     @Test
24387     public void testGetSetInitialMg()
24388             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
24389         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24390                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24391 
24392         // check default value
24393         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMg(),
24394                 new Matrix(3, 3));
24395 
24396         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24397         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24398         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24399         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24400         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24401         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24402         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), 0.0, 0.0);
24403         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), 0.0, 0.0);
24404         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), 0.0, 0.0);
24405 
24406         // set new value
24407         final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
24408         final double sx = mg.getElementAt(0, 0);
24409         final double sy = mg.getElementAt(1, 1);
24410         final double sz = mg.getElementAt(2, 2);
24411         final double mxy = mg.getElementAt(0, 1);
24412         final double mxz = mg.getElementAt(0, 2);
24413         final double myx = mg.getElementAt(1, 0);
24414         final double myz = mg.getElementAt(1, 2);
24415         final double mzx = mg.getElementAt(2, 0);
24416         final double mzy = mg.getElementAt(2, 1);
24417 
24418         calibrator.setInitialMg(mg);
24419 
24420         // check
24421         final Matrix mg1 = calibrator.getInitialMg();
24422         final Matrix mg2 = new Matrix(3, 3);
24423         calibrator.getInitialMg(mg2);
24424 
24425         assertEquals(mg, mg1);
24426         assertEquals(mg, mg2);
24427 
24428         // check
24429         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSx(), sx, 0.0);
24430         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSy(), sy, 0.0);
24431         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialSz(), sz, 0.0);
24432         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxy(), mxy, 0.0);
24433         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMxz(), mxz, 0.0);
24434         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyx(), myx, 0.0);
24435         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMyz(), myz, 0.0);
24436         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzx(), mzx, 0.0);
24437         assertEquals(calibrator.getInitialMzy(), mzy, 0.0);
24438 
24439         // Force IllegalArgumentException
24440         try {
24441             calibrator.getInitialMg(new Matrix(1, 3));
24442             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24443         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24444         }
24445         try {
24446             calibrator.getInitialMg(new Matrix(3, 1));
24447             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24448         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24449         }
24450         try {
24451             calibrator.setInitialMg(new Matrix(1, 3));
24452             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24453         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24454         }
24455         try {
24456             calibrator.setInitialMg(new Matrix(3, 1));
24457             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24458         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24459         }
24460     }
24461 
24462     @Test
24463     public void testGetSetInitialGg()
24464             throws WrongSizeException, LockedException {
24465         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24466                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();

24488         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {

24491             calibrator.getInitialGg(new Matrix(3, 1));
24492             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24493         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24494         }
24495         try {
24496             calibrator.setInitialGg(new Matrix(1, 3));

24502             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24503         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24504         }
24505     }
24506 
24507     @Test
24508     public void testGetSetTurntableRotationRate() throws LockedException {
24509         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24510                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24511 
24512         // check default value
24513         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(),
24514                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
24515 
24516         // set new value
24517         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
24518         calibrator.setTurntableRotationRate(rotationRate);
24519 
24520         // check
24521         assertEquals(calibrator.getTurntableRotationRate(), rotationRate,
24522                 0.0);
24523 
24524         // Force IllegalArgumentException
24525         try {
24526             calibrator.setTurntableRotationRate(0.0);
24527             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24528         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24529         }
24530     }
24531 
24532     @Test
24533     public void testGetSetTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed()
24534             throws LockedException {
24535         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24536                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24537 
24538         final AngularSpeed rotationRate1 = calibrator
24539                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
24540         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getValue().doubleValue(),
24541                 Constants.EARTH_ROTATION_RATE, 0.0);
24542         assertEquals(rotationRate1.getUnit(),
24543                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
24544 
24545         // set new value
24546         final double rotationRate = getTurntableRotationRate();
24547         final AngularSpeed rotationRate2 = new AngularSpeed(rotationRate,
24548                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
24549         calibrator.setTurntableRotationRate(rotationRate2);
24550 
24551         // check
24552         final AngularSpeed rotation3 = calibrator
24553                 .getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed();
24554         final AngularSpeed rotation4 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
24555                 AngularSpeedUnit.DEGREES_PER_SECOND);
24556         calibrator.getTurntableRotationRateAsAngularSpeed(rotation4);
24557 
24558         assertEquals(rotation3, rotation4);
24559 
24560         // Force IllegalArgumentException
24561         try {
24562             calibrator.setTurntableRotationRate(
24563                     new AngularSpeed(0.0,
24564                             AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND));
24565             fail("IllegalArgumentException expected but not thrown");
24566         } catch (final IllegalArgumentException ignore) {
24567         }
24568     }
24569 
24570     @Test
24571     public void testGetSetMeasurements() throws LockedException {
24572         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24573                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24574 
24575         // check default value
24576         assertNull(calibrator.getMeasurements());
24577 
24578         // set new value
24579         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
24580                 Collections.emptyList();
24581         calibrator.setMeasurements(measurements);
24582 
24583         // check
24584         assertSame(calibrator.getMeasurements(), measurements);
24585     }
24586 
24587     @Test
24588     public void testGetSetEcefPosition() throws LockedException {
24589         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24590                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24591 
24592         // check default value
24593         assertNull(calibrator.getEcefPosition());
24594 
24595         // set new value
24596         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
24597         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
24598                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
24599         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
24600                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
24601         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
24602         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
24603         final NEDVelocity nedVelocity = new NEDVelocity();
24604         final ECEFPosition ecefPosition = new ECEFPosition();
24605         final ECEFVelocity ecefVelocity = new ECEFVelocity();
24606         NEDtoECEFPositionVelocityConverter.convertNEDtoECEF(nedPosition, nedVelocity,
24607                 ecefPosition, ecefVelocity);
24608 
24609         calibrator.setPosition(ecefPosition);
24610 
24611         // check
24612         assertSame(calibrator.getEcefPosition(), ecefPosition);
24613     }
24614 
24615     @Test
24616     public void testGetSetNedPosition() throws LockedException {
24617         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24618                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24619 
24620         // check default value
24621         assertNull(calibrator.getNedPosition());
24622         assertFalse(calibrator.getNedPosition(null));
24623 
24624         // set new value
24625         final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
24626         final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
24627                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
24628         final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
24629                 randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
24630         final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
24631         final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
24632 
24633         calibrator.setPosition(nedPosition);
24634 
24635         // check
24636         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition().equals(nedPosition,
24637                 LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
24638         final NEDPosition position2 = new NEDPosition();
24639         assertTrue(calibrator.getNedPosition(position2));
24640         assertTrue(nedPosition.equals(position2, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
24641     }
24642 
24643     @Test
24644     public void testIsSetCommonAxisUsed() throws LockedException {
24645         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24646                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24647 
24648         // check default value
24649         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24650 
24651         // set new value
24652         calibrator.setCommonAxisUsed(false);
24653 
24654         // check
24655         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24656     }
24657 
24658     @Test
24659     public void testIsSetGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated()
24660             throws LockedException {
24661         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24662                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24663 
24664         // check default value
24665         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
24666 
24667         // set new value
24668         calibrator.setGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated(false);

24674     @Test
24675     public void testGetSetListener() throws LockedException {
24676         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24677                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24678 
24679         // check default value
24680         assertNull(calibrator.getListener());

24684

24688 
24689     @Test
24690     public void testGetMinimumRequiredMeasurements() throws LockedException {
24691         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24692                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24693 
24694         // check default value
24695         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(),
24696                 19);
24697         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24698         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
24699 
24700         // set new value
24701         calibrator.setGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated(false);
24702 
24703         // check
24704         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(),
24705                 10);
24706         assertTrue(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24707         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
24708 
24709         // set new value
24710         calibrator.setCommonAxisUsed(false);
24711 
24712         // check
24713         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(),
24714                 13);
24715         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24716         assertFalse(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
24717 
24718         // set new value
24719         calibrator.setGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated(true);
24720 
24721         // check
24722         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(),
24723                 22);
24724         assertFalse(calibrator.isCommonAxisUsed());
24725         assertTrue(calibrator.isGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated());
24726     }
24727 
24728     @Test
24729     public void testIsReady() throws LockedException {
24730         final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24731                 new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator();
24732 
24733         // check default value
24734         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
24735         assertEquals(calibrator.getMinimumRequiredMeasurements(),
24736                 19);
24737 
24738         // set empty measurements
24739         final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
24740                 new ArrayList<>();
24741         calibrator.setMeasurements(measurements);
24742 
24743         // check
24744         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
24745 
24746         // set enough measurements
24747         for (int i = 0;
24748              i < TurntableGyroscopeCalibrator.MINIMUM_MEASUREMENTS_COMMON_Z_AXIS_AND_CROSS_BIASES; i++) {
24749             measurements.add(new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics());
24750         }
24751 
24752         // check
24753         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
24754 
24755         // add quality scores with invalid size
24756         double[] qualityScores = new double[measurements.size() + 1];
24757         calibrator.setQualityScores(qualityScores);
24758 
24759         assertFalse(calibrator.isReady());
24760 
24761         // add quality scores with valid size
24762         qualityScores = new double[measurements.size()];
24763         calibrator.setQualityScores(qualityScores);
24764 
24765         assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
24766     }
24767 
24768     @Test
24769     public void testCalibrateCommonAxisAndGDependentCrossBiasesDisabledAndNoInlierNoise()
24770             throws WrongSizeException,
24771             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
24772             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
24773 
24774         int numValid = 0;
24775         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
24776             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
24777             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
24778             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
24779             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
24780             final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
24781             final Matrix gg = new Matrix(3, 3);
24782             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
24783             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
24784             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
24785             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
24786 
24787             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
24788                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
24789             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
24790                     0.0, 0.0, accelQuantLevel,
24791                     gyroQuantLevel);
24792 
24793             final Random random = new Random();
24794             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
24795             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
24796                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
24797             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
24798                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
24799             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
24800             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
24801 
24802             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
24803             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
24804             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
24805 
24806             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
24807                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
24808 
24809             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
24810             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
24811                     new ArrayList<>();
24812             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
24813             double error;
24814             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
24815                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
24816                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24817                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
24818                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24819                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
24820                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24821 
24822                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
24823                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
24824                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
24825 
24826                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
24827                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
24828                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
24829 
24830                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
24831                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
24832                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
24833                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
24834                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
24835                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
24836 
24837                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
24838                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
24839                     timeInterval /= x;
24840                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
24841                 }
24842                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
24843                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
24844                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
24845                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
24846                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
24847 
24848                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
24849                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
24850                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
24851 
24852                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
24853                 // position, velocity and orientation
24854                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
24855                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
24856                                 ecefFrame1);
24857 
24858                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
24859                 // measured kinematics sample
24860                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
24861                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
24862                     // outlier
24863                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
24864                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
24865                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
24866 
24867                 } else {
24868                     // inlier
24869                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
24870                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
24871                     error = 0.0;
24872                 }
24873 
24874                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
24875                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
24876                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
24877                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
24878                 measurements.add(measurement);
24879 
24880                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
24881             }
24882 
24883             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
24884             // an initial solution close to the true solution
24885             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
24886                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
24887                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
24888                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
24889                             measurements,
24890                             true,
24891                             false,
24892                             bg, mg, gg, this);
24893             calibrator.setThreshold(THRESHOLD);
24894 
24895             // estimate
24896             reset();
24897             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
24898             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
24899             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
24900             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
24901             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
24902             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
24903 
24904             try {
24905                 calibrator.calibrate();
24906             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
24907                 continue;
24908             }
24909 
24910             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
24911             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
24912             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
24913             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
24914             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
24915             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
24916 
24917             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
24918             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
24919             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
24920 
24921             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
24922             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
24923             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
24924 
24925             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, true);
24926 
24927             assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
24928             checkCommonAxisCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
24929             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
24930 
24931             numValid++;
24932             break;
24933         }
24934 
24935         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
24936     }
24937 
24938     @Test
24939     public void testCalibrateGeneralAndGDependentCrossBiasesDisabledAndNoInlierNoise()
24940             throws WrongSizeException,
24941             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
24942             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
24943 
24944         int numValid = 0;
24945         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
24946             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
24947             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
24948             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
24949             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
24950             final Matrix mg = generateGeneralMg();
24951             final Matrix gg = new Matrix(3, 3);
24952             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
24953             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
24954             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
24955             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
24956 
24957             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
24958                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
24959             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
24960                     0.0, 0.0, accelQuantLevel,
24961                     gyroQuantLevel);
24962 
24963             final Random random = new Random();
24964             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
24965             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
24966                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
24967             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
24968                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
24969             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
24970             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
24971 
24972             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
24973             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
24974             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
24975 
24976             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
24977                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
24978 
24979             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
24980             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
24981                     new ArrayList<>();
24982             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
24983             double error;
24984             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
24985                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
24986                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24987                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
24988                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24989                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
24990                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
24991 
24992                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
24993                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
24994                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
24995 
24996                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
24997                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
24998                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
24999 
25000                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25001                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25002                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25003                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25004                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25005                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25006 
25007                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25008                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25009                     timeInterval /= x;
25010                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25011                 }
25012                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25013                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25014                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25015                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25016                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25017 
25018                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25019                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25020                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25021 
25022                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25023                 // position, velocity and orientation
25024                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25025                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25026                                 ecefFrame1);
25027 
25028                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25029                 // measured kinematics sample
25030                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25031                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25032                     // outlier
25033                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25034                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25035                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25036 
25037                 } else {
25038                     // inlier
25039                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25040                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25041                     error = 0.0;
25042                 }
25043 
25044                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25045                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25046                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25047                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25048                 measurements.add(measurement);
25049 
25050                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25051             }
25052 
25053             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25054             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25055             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25056                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25057                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25058                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25059                             measurements,
25060                             false,
25061                             false,
25062                             bg, mg, gg, this);
25063             calibrator.setThreshold(THRESHOLD);
25064 
25065             // estimate
25066             reset();
25067             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25068             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25069             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25070             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25071             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25072             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25073 
25074             try {
25075                 calibrator.calibrate();
25076             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25077                 continue;
25078             }
25079 
25080             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25081             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25082             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25083             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25084             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25085             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25086 
25087             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25088             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25089             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25090 
25091             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25092             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25093             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25094 
25095             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, true);
25096 
25097             assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25098             checkGeneralCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25099             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25100 
25101             numValid++;
25102             break;
25103         }
25104 
25105         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25106     }
25107 
25108     @Test
25109     public void testCalibrateCommonAxisAndGDependentCrossBiasesEnabledAndNoInlierNoise()
25110             throws WrongSizeException,
25111             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25112             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25113 
25114         int numValid = 0;
25115         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25116             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25117             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25118             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25119             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25120             final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
25121             final Matrix gg = generateGg();
25122             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25123             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25124             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25125             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25126 
25127             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25128                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25129             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25130                     0.0, 0.0, accelQuantLevel,
25131                     gyroQuantLevel);
25132 
25133             final Random random = new Random();
25134             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
25135             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
25136                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
25137             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
25138                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
25139             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
25140             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
25141 
25142             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
25143             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25144             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25145 
25146             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
25147                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
25148 
25149             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
25150             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
25151                     new ArrayList<>();
25152             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
25153             double error;
25154             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
25155                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
25156                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25157                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
25158                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25159                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
25160                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25161 
25162                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
25163                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25164                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25165 
25166                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
25167                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25168                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
25169 
25170                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25171                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25172                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25173                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25174                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25175                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25176 
25177                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25178                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25179                     timeInterval /= x;
25180                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25181                 }
25182                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25183                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25184                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25185                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25186                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25187 
25188                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25189                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25190                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25191 
25192                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25193                 // position, velocity and orientation
25194                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25195                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25196                                 ecefFrame1);
25197 
25198                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25199                 // measured kinematics sample
25200                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25201                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25202                     // outlier
25203                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25204                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25205                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25206 
25207                 } else {
25208                     // inlier
25209                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25210                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25211                     error = 0.0;
25212                 }
25213 
25214                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25215                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25216                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25217                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25218                 measurements.add(measurement);
25219 
25220                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25221             }
25222 
25223             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25224             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25225             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25226                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25227                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25228                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25229                             measurements,
25230                             true,
25231                             true,
25232                             bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
25233             calibrator.setThreshold(THRESHOLD);
25234 
25235             // estimate
25236             reset();
25237             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25238             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25239             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25240             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25241             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25242             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25243 
25244             try {
25245                 calibrator.calibrate();
25246             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25247                 continue;
25248             }
25249 
25250             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25251             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25252             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25253             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25254             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25255             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25256 
25257             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25258             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25259             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25260 
25261             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25262             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25263             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25264 
25265             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, false);
25266 
25267             if (calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance() != null) {
25268                 checkCommonAxisAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25269             }
25270             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25271 
25272             numValid++;
25273             break;
25274         }
25275 
25276         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25277     }
25278 
25279     @Test
25280     public void testCalibrateGeneralAndGDependentCrossBiasesEnabledAndNoInlierNoise()
25281             throws WrongSizeException,
25282             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25283             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25284 
25285         int numValid = 0;
25286         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25287             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25288             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25289             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25290             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25291             final Matrix mg = generateGeneralMg();
25292             final Matrix gg = generateGg();
25293             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25294             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25295             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25296             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25297 
25298             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25299                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25300             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25301                     0.0, 0.0, accelQuantLevel,
25302                     gyroQuantLevel);
25303 
25304             final Random random = new Random();
25305             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
25306             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
25307                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
25308             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
25309                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
25310             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
25311             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
25312 
25313             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
25314             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25315             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25316 
25317             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
25318                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
25319 
25320             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
25321             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
25322                     new ArrayList<>();
25323             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
25324             double error;
25325             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
25326                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
25327                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25328                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
25329                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25330                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
25331                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25332 
25333                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
25334                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25335                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25336 
25337                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
25338                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25339                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
25340 
25341                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25342                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25343                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25344                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25345                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25346                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25347 
25348                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25349                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25350                     timeInterval /= x;
25351                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25352                 }
25353                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25354                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25355                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25356                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25357                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25358 
25359                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25360                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25361                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25362 
25363                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25364                 // position, velocity and orientation
25365                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25366                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25367                                 ecefFrame1);
25368 
25369                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25370                 // measured kinematics sample
25371                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25372                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25373                     // outlier
25374                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25375                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25376                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25377 
25378                 } else {
25379                     // inlier
25380                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25381                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25382                     error = 0.0;
25383                 }
25384 
25385                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25386                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25387                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25388                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25389                 measurements.add(measurement);
25390 
25391                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25392             }
25393 
25394             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25395             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25396             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25397                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25398                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25399                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25400                             measurements,
25401                             false,
25402                             true,
25403                             bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
25404             calibrator.setThreshold(THRESHOLD);
25405 
25406             // estimate
25407             reset();
25408             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25409             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25410             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25411             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25412             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25413             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25414 
25415             try {
25416                 calibrator.calibrate();
25417             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25418                 continue;
25419             }
25420 
25421             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25422             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25423             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25424             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25425             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25426             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25427 
25428             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25429             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25430             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25431 
25432             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25433             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25434             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25435 
25436             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, false);
25437 
25438             if (calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance() != null) {
25439                 checkGeneralAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25440             }
25441             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25442 
25443             numValid++;
25444             break;
25445         }
25446 
25447         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25448     }
25449 
25450     @Test
25451     public void testCalibrateCommonAxisAndGDependentCrossBiasesDisabledWithInlierNoise()
25452             throws WrongSizeException,
25453             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25454             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25455 
25456         int numValid = 0;
25457         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25458             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25459             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25460             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25461             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25462             final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
25463             final Matrix gg = new Matrix(3, 3);
25464             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25465             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25466             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25467             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25468 
25469             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25470                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * accelNoiseRootPSD,
25471                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25472             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25473                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel,
25474                     gyroQuantLevel);
25475 
25476             final Random random = new Random();
25477             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
25478             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
25479                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
25480             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
25481                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
25482             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
25483             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
25484 
25485             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
25486             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25487             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25488 
25489             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
25490                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
25491 
25492             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
25493             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
25494                     new ArrayList<>();
25495             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
25496             double error;
25497             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
25498                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
25499                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25500                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
25501                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25502                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
25503                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25504 
25505                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
25506                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25507                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25508 
25509                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
25510                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25511                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
25512 
25513                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25514                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25515                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25516                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25517                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25518                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25519 
25520                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25521                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25522                     timeInterval /= x;
25523                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25524                 }
25525                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25526                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25527                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25528                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25529                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25530 
25531                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25532                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25533                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25534 
25535                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25536                 // position, velocity and orientation
25537                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25538                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25539                                 ecefFrame1);
25540 
25541                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25542                 // measured kinematics sample
25543                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25544                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25545                     // outlier
25546                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25547                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25548                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25549 
25550                 } else {
25551                     // inlier
25552                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25553                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25554                     error = 0.0;
25555                 }
25556 
25557                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25558                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25559                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25560                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25561                 measurements.add(measurement);
25562 
25563                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25564             }
25565 
25566             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25567             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25568             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25569                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25570                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25571                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25572                             measurements,
25573                             true,
25574                             false,
25575                             bg, mg, gg, this);
25576             calibrator.setThreshold(LARGE_THRESHOLD);
25577 
25578             // estimate
25579             reset();
25580             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25581             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25582             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25583             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25584             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25585             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25586 
25587             try {
25588                 calibrator.calibrate();
25589             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25590                 continue;
25591             }
25592 
25593             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25594             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25595             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25596             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25597             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25598             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25599 
25600             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25601             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25602             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25603 
25604             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25605             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25606             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25607 
25608             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, true);
25609 
25610             if (calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance() != null) {
25611                 checkCommonAxisCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25612             }
25613             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25614 
25615             numValid++;
25616             break;
25617         }
25618 
25619         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25620     }
25621 
25622     @Test
25623     public void testCalibrateGeneralAndGDependentCrossBiasesDisabledWithInlierNoise()
25624             throws WrongSizeException,
25625             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25626             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25627 
25628         int numValid = 0;
25629         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25630             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25631             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25632             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25633             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25634             final Matrix mg = generateGeneralMg();
25635             final Matrix gg = new Matrix(3, 3);
25636             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25637             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25638             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25639             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25640 
25641             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25642                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * accelNoiseRootPSD,
25643                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25644             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25645                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel,
25646                     gyroQuantLevel);
25647 
25648             final Random random = new Random();
25649             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
25650             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
25651                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
25652             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
25653                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
25654             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
25655             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
25656 
25657             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
25658             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25659             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25660 
25661             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
25662                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
25663 
25664             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
25665             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
25666                     new ArrayList<>();
25667             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
25668             double error;
25669             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
25670                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
25671                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25672                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
25673                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25674                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
25675                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25676 
25677                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
25678                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25679                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25680 
25681                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
25682                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25683                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
25684 
25685                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25686                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25687                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25688                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25689                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25690                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25691 
25692                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25693                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25694                     timeInterval /= x;
25695                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25696                 }
25697                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25698                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25699                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25700                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25701                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25702 
25703                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25704                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25705                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25706 
25707                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25708                 // position, velocity and orientation
25709                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25710                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25711                                 ecefFrame1);
25712 
25713                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25714                 // measured kinematics sample
25715                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25716                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25717                     // outlier
25718                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25719                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25720                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25721 
25722                 } else {
25723                     // inlier
25724                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25725                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25726                     error = 0.0;
25727                 }
25728 
25729                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25730                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25731                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25732                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25733                 measurements.add(measurement);
25734 
25735                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25736             }
25737 
25738             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25739             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25740             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25741                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25742                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25743                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25744                             measurements,
25745                             false,
25746                             false,
25747                             bg, mg, gg, this);
25748             calibrator.setThreshold(LARGE_THRESHOLD);
25749 
25750             // estimate
25751             reset();
25752             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25753             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25754             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25755             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25756             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25757             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25758 
25759             try {
25760                 calibrator.calibrate();
25761             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25762                 continue;
25763             }
25764 
25765             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25766             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25767             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25768             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25769             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25770             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25771 
25772             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25773             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25774             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25775 
25776             if (!bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
25777                 continue;
25778             }
25779             if (!mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
25780                 continue;
25781             }
25782             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25783             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25784             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25785 
25786             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, true);
25787 
25788             assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25789             checkGeneralCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25790             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25791 
25792             numValid++;
25793             break;
25794         }
25795 
25796         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25797     }
25798 
25799     @Test
25800     public void testCalibrateCommonAxisAndGDependentCrossBiasesEnabledWithInlierNoise()
