25801             throws WrongSizeException,
25802             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25803             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25804 
25805         int numValid = 0;
25806         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25807             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25808             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25809             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25810             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25811             final Matrix mg = generateCommonAxisMg();
25812             final Matrix gg = generateGg();
25813             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25814             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25815             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25816             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25817 
25818             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25819                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * accelNoiseRootPSD,
25820                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25821             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25822                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel,
25823                     gyroQuantLevel);
25824 
25825             final Random random = new Random();
25826             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
25827             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
25828                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
25829             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
25830                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
25831             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
25832             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
25833 
25834             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
25835             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25836             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
25837 
25838             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
25839                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
25840 
25841             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
25842             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
25843                     new ArrayList<>();
25844             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
25845             double error;
25846             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
25847                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
25848                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25849                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
25850                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25851                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
25852                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
25853 
25854                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
25855                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25856                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25857 
25858                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
25859                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25860                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
25861 
25862                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
25863                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
25864                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25865                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
25866                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
25867                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
25868 
25869                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
25870                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
25871                     timeInterval /= x;
25872                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
25873                 }
25874                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
25875                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
25876                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
25877                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
25878                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
25879 
25880                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
25881                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
25882                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
25883 
25884                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
25885                 // position, velocity and orientation
25886                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
25887                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
25888                                 ecefFrame1);
25889 
25890                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
25891                 // measured kinematics sample
25892                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
25893                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
25894                     // outlier
25895                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25896                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
25897                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
25898 
25899                 } else {
25900                     // inlier
25901                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
25902                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
25903                     error = 0.0;
25904                 }
25905 
25906                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
25907                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
25908                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
25909                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
25910                 measurements.add(measurement);
25911 
25912                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
25913             }
25914 
25915             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
25916             // an initial solution close to the true solution
25917             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
25918                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
25919                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
25920                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
25921                             measurements,
25922                             true,
25923                             true,
25924                             bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
25925             calibrator.setThreshold(LARGE_THRESHOLD);
25926 
25927             // estimate
25928             reset();
25929             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25930             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25931             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
25932             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
25933             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
25934             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
25935 
25936             try {
25937                 calibrator.calibrate();
25938             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
25939                 continue;
25940             }
25941 
25942             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
25943             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
25944             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
25945             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
25946             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
25947             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
25948 
25949             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
25950             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
25951             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
25952 
25953             if (!bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
25954                 continue;
25955             }
25956             if (!mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
25957                 continue;
25958             }
25959             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25960             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25961             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
25962 
25963             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, false);
25964 
25965             if (calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance() != null) {
25966                 checkCommonAxisAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
25967             }
25968             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
25969 
25970             numValid++;
25971             break;
25972         }
25973 
25974         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
25975     }
25976 
25977     @Test
25978     public void testCalibrateGeneralAndGDependentCrossBiasesEnabledWithInlierNoise()
25979             throws WrongSizeException,
25980             InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
25981             LockedException, NotReadyException, InvalidRotationMatrixException, RotationException {
25982 
25983         int numValid = 0;
25984         for (int t = 0; t < TIMES; t++) {
25985             final double rotationRate = 100.0 * getTurntableRotationRate();
25986             final Matrix ba = generateBa();
25987             final Matrix bg = generateBg();
25988             final Matrix ma = generateMa();
25989             final Matrix mg = generateGeneralMg();
25990             final Matrix gg = generateGg();
25991             final double accelNoiseRootPSD = getAccelNoiseRootPSD();
25992             final double gyroNoiseRootPSD = getGyroNoiseRootPSD();
25993             final double accelQuantLevel = 0.0;
25994             final double gyroQuantLevel = 0.0;
25995 
25996             final IMUErrors errorsOutlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
25997                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * accelNoiseRootPSD,
25998                     OUTLIER_ERROR_FACTOR * gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel, gyroQuantLevel);
25999             final IMUErrors errorsInlier = new IMUErrors(ba, bg, ma, mg, gg,
26000                     accelNoiseRootPSD, gyroNoiseRootPSD, accelQuantLevel,
26001                     gyroQuantLevel);
26002 
26003             final Random random = new Random();
26004             final UniformRandomizer randomizer = new UniformRandomizer(random);
26005             final double latitude = Math.toRadians(
26006                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LATITUDE_DEGREEs));
26007             final double longitude = Math.toRadians(
26008                     randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES, MAX_LONGITUDE_DEGREES));
26009             final double height = randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_HEIGHT, MAX_HEIGHT);
26010             final NEDPosition nedPosition = new NEDPosition(latitude, longitude, height);
26011 
26012             final double sqrtTimeInterval = Math.sqrt(TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
26013             final double specificForceStandardDeviation = getAccelNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
26014             final double angularRateStandardDeviation = getGyroNoiseRootPSD() / sqrtTimeInterval;
26015 
26016             final GaussianRandomizer errorRandomizer = new GaussianRandomizer(
26017                     random, 0.0, angularRateStandardDeviation);
26018 
26019             double timeInterval = TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
26020             final List<StandardDeviationBodyKinematics> measurements =
26021                     new ArrayList<>();
26022             final double[] qualityScores = new double[MEASUREMENT_NUMBER];
26023             double error;
26024             for (int i = 0; i < MEASUREMENT_NUMBER; i++) {
26025                 final double roll1 = Math.toRadians(
26026                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
26027                 final double pitch1 = Math.toRadians(
26028                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
26029                 final double yaw1 = Math.toRadians(
26030                         randomizer.nextDouble(MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES, MAX_ANGLE_DEGREES));
26031 
26032                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC1 = new CoordinateTransformation(
26033                         roll1, pitch1, yaw1, FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
26034                         FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
26035 
26036                 final NEDFrame nedFrame1 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC1);
26037                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame1 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
26038                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame1);
26039 
26040                 final Rotation3D rot1 = nedC1.asRotation();
26041                 final double[] axis1 = rot1.getRotationAxis();
26042                 double angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
26043                 if (Math.abs(angleIncrement) > Math.PI / 2.0) {
26044                     // angle = rot_rate * interval
26045                     // rot_rate * interval / x = angle / x
26046 
26047                     // if we want angle / x = pi / 2, then:
26048                     final double x = Math.abs(angleIncrement) / (Math.PI / 2.0);
26049                     timeInterval /= x;
26050                     angleIncrement = rotationRate * timeInterval;
26051                 }
26052                 final Rotation3D rot = new AxisRotation3D(axis1, angleIncrement);
26053                 final Rotation3D rot2 = rot1.combineAndReturnNew(rot);
26054                 final CoordinateTransformation nedC2 =
26055                         new CoordinateTransformation(rot2.asInhomogeneousMatrix(), FrameType.BODY_FRAME,
26056                                 FrameType.LOCAL_NAVIGATION_FRAME);
26057 
26058                 final NEDFrame nedFrame2 = new NEDFrame(nedPosition, nedC2);
26059                 final ECEFFrame ecefFrame2 = NEDtoECEFFrameConverter
26060                         .convertNEDtoECEFAndReturnNew(nedFrame2);
26061 
26062                 // compute ground-truth kinematics that should be generated at provided
26063                 // position, velocity and orientation
26064                 final BodyKinematics trueKinematics = ECEFKinematicsEstimator
26065                         .estimateKinematicsAndReturnNew(timeInterval, ecefFrame2,
26066                                 ecefFrame1);
26067 
26068                 // apply known calibration parameters to distort ground-truth and generate a
26069                 // measured kinematics sample
26070                 final BodyKinematics measuredKinematics;
26071                 if (randomizer.nextInt(0, 100) < OUTLIER_PERCENTAGE) {
26072                     // outlier
26073                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
26074                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsOutlier, random);
26075                     error = Math.abs(errorRandomizer.nextDouble());
26076 
26077                 } else {
26078                     // inlier
26079                     measuredKinematics = BodyKinematicsGenerator
26080                             .generate(timeInterval, trueKinematics, errorsInlier, random);
26081                     error = 0.0;
26082                 }
26083 
26084                 final StandardDeviationBodyKinematics measurement =
26085                         new StandardDeviationBodyKinematics(measuredKinematics,
26086                                 specificForceStandardDeviation,
26087                                 angularRateStandardDeviation);
26088                 measurements.add(measurement);
26089 
26090                 qualityScores[i] = 1.0 / (1.0 + error);
26091             }
26092 
26093             // When we have the minimum number of measurements, we need to provide
26094             // an initial solution close to the true solution
26095             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator =
26096                     new PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator(
26097                             qualityScores, nedPosition,
26098                             rotationRate, timeInterval,
26099                             measurements,
26100                             false,
26101                             true,
26102                             bg, mg, gg, ba, ma, this);
26103             calibrator.setThreshold(LARGE_THRESHOLD);
26104 
26105             // estimate
26106             reset();
26107             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
26108             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
26109             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 0);
26110             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 0);
26111             assertEquals(mCalibrateNextIteration, 0);
26112             assertEquals(mCalibrateProgressChange, 0);
26113 
26114             try {
26115                 calibrator.calibrate();
26116             } catch (final CalibrationException e) {
26117                 continue;
26118             }
26119 
26120             assertTrue(calibrator.isReady());
26121             assertFalse(calibrator.isRunning());
26122             assertEquals(mCalibrateStart, 1);
26123             assertEquals(mCalibrateEnd, 1);
26124             assertTrue(mCalibrateNextIteration > 0);
26125             assertTrue(mCalibrateProgressChange >= 0);
26126 
26127             final Matrix estimatedBg = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix();
26128             final Matrix estimatedMg = calibrator.getEstimatedMg();
26129             final Matrix estimatedGg = calibrator.getEstimatedGg();
26130 
26131             if (!bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
26132                 continue;
26133             }
26134             if (!mg.equals(estimatedMg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
26135                 continue;
26136             }
26137             if (!gg.equals(estimatedGg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR)) {
26138                 continue;
26139             }
26140             assertTrue(bg.equals(estimatedBg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
26141             assertTrue(mg.equals(estimatedMg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
26142             assertTrue(gg.equals(estimatedGg, VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR));
26143 
26144             assertEstimatedResult(estimatedBg, estimatedMg, estimatedGg, calibrator, false);
26145 
26146             if (calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance() != null) {
26147                 checkGeneralAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(calibrator.getEstimatedCovariance());
26148             }
26149             assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedMse() > 0.0);
26150 
26151             numValid++;
26152             break;
26153         }
26154 
26155         assertTrue(numValid > 0);
26156     }
26157 
26158     @Override
26159     public void onCalibrateStart(
26160             final RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator) {
26161         checkLocked((PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator) calibrator);
26162         mCalibrateStart++;
26163     }
26164 
26165     @Override
26166     public void onCalibrateEnd(
26167             final RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator) {
26168         checkLocked((PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator) calibrator);
26169         mCalibrateEnd++;
26170     }
26171 
26172     @Override
26173     public void onCalibrateNextIteration(
26174             final RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator,
26175             final int iteration) {
26176         checkLocked((PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator) calibrator);
26177         mCalibrateNextIteration++;
26178     }
26179 
26180     @Override
26181     public void onCalibrateProgressChange(
26182             final RobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator,
26183             final float progress) {
26184         checkLocked((PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator) calibrator);
26185         mCalibrateProgressChange++;
26186     }
26187 
26188     private void reset() {
26189         mCalibrateStart = 0;
26190         mCalibrateEnd = 0;
26191         mCalibrateNextIteration = 0;
26192         mCalibrateProgressChange = 0;
26193     }
26194 
26195     private void checkLocked(final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator) {
26196         assertTrue(calibrator.isRunning());
26197         try {
26198             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasX(0.0);
26199             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26200         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26201         }
26202         try {
26203             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasY(0.0);
26204             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26205         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26206         }
26207         try {
26208             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasZ(0.0);
26209             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26210         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26211         }
26212         try {
26213             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasX(null);
26214             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26215         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26216         }
26217         try {
26218             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasY(null);
26219             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26220         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26221         }
26222         try {
26223             calibrator.setAccelerometerBiasZ(null);
26224             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26225         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26226         }
26227         try {
26228             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(
26229                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
26230             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26231         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26232         }
26233         try {
26234             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias(
26235                     null, null, null);
26236             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26237         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26238         }
26239         try {
26240             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias((double[]) null);
26241             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26242         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26243         }
26244         try {
26245             calibrator.setAccelerometerBias((Matrix) null);
26246             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26247         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26248         }
26249         try {
26250             calibrator.setAccelerometerSx(0.0);
26251             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26252         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26253         }
26254         try {
26255             calibrator.setAccelerometerSy(0.0);
26256             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26257         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26258         }
26259         try {

26261             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26262         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26263         }

26266             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26267         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26268         }

26271             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");

26273         }

26276             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26277         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26278         }
26279         try {
26280             calibrator.setAccelerometerMyz(0.0);
26281             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26282         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26283         }
26284         try {
26285             calibrator.setAccelerometerMzx(0.0);
26286             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26287         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26288         }
26289         try {

26292         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {

26294         try {

26319         }

26329         }

26332             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26333         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {

26338         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {

26360         try {

26417                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0,
26418                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
26419             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");

26424                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0,
26425                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0,
26426                     0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
26427             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");

26474         }

26476             calibrator.setPosition((ECEFPosition) null);
26477             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26478         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {

26480         try {
26481             calibrator.setPosition((NEDPosition) null);
26482             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");

26486             calibrator.setCommonAxisUsed(true);
26487             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");

26489         }

26491             calibrator.setGDependentCrossBiasesEstimated(true);

26494         }

26496             calibrator.setListener(this);

26499         }

26501             calibrator.setProgressDelta(0.5f);

26503         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {

26506             calibrator.setConfidence(0.5);

26508         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26509         }

26512             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26513         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26514         }
26515         try {
26516             calibrator.setResultRefined(true);
26517             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26518         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26519         }
26520         try {
26521             calibrator.setCovarianceKept(true);
26522             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26523         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26524         }
26525         try {
26526             calibrator.setPreliminarySubsetSize(30);
26527             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26528         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26529         }
26530         try {
26531             calibrator.calibrate();
26532             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26533         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26534         } catch (final Exception e) {
26535             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26536         }
26537         try {
26538             calibrator.setThreshold(0.1);
26539             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26540         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26541         }

26546         }

26549             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26550         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26551         }
26552         try {
26553             calibrator.setComputeAndKeepResidualsEnabled(true);
26554             fail("LockedException expected but not thrown");
26555         } catch (final LockedException ignore) {
26556         }
26557     }
26558 
26559     private void assertEstimatedResult(
26560             final Matrix bg, final Matrix mg, final Matrix gg,
26561             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator,
26562             final boolean checkCovariance)
26563             throws WrongSizeException {
26564 
26565         final double[] estimatedBiases = calibrator.getEstimatedBiases();
26566         assertArrayEquals(bg.getBuffer(), estimatedBiases, 0.0);
26567 
26568         final double[] estimatedBiases2 = new double[3];
26569         calibrator.getEstimatedBiases(estimatedBiases2);
26570         assertArrayEquals(estimatedBiases, estimatedBiases2, 0.0);
26571 
26572         final Matrix bg2 = new Matrix(3, 1);
26573         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasesAsMatrix(bg2);
26574 
26575         assertEquals(bg, bg2);
26576 
26577         assertEquals(bg.getElementAtIndex(0), calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX(), 0.0);
26578         assertEquals(bg.getElementAtIndex(1), calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY(), 0.0);
26579         assertEquals(bg.getElementAtIndex(2), calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ(), 0.0);
26580 
26581         final AngularSpeed bgx1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX();
26582         final AngularSpeed bgx2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
26583                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26584         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedX(bgx2);
26585         assertEquals(bgx1, bgx2);
26586         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasX(),
26587                 bgx1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0);
26588         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, bgx1.getUnit());
26589 
26590         final AngularSpeed bgy1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY();
26591         final AngularSpeed bgy2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
26592                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26593         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedY(bgy2);
26594         assertEquals(bgy1, bgy2);
26595         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasY(),
26596                 bgy1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0);
26597         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, bgy1.getUnit());
26598 
26599         final AngularSpeed bgz1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ();
26600         final AngularSpeed bgz2 = new AngularSpeed(0.0,
26601                 AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26602         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasAngularSpeedZ(bgz2);
26603         assertEquals(bgz1, bgz2);
26604         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZ(),
26605                 bgz1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0);
26606         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, bgz1.getUnit());
26607 
26608         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(0, 0), calibrator.getEstimatedSx(),
26609                 0.0);
26610         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(1, 1), calibrator.getEstimatedSy(),
26611                 0.0);
26612         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(2, 2), calibrator.getEstimatedSz(),
26613                 0.0);
26614         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(0, 1), calibrator.getEstimatedMxy(),
26615                 0.0);
26616         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(0, 2), calibrator.getEstimatedMxz(),
26617                 0.0);
26618         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(1, 0), calibrator.getEstimatedMyx(),
26619                 0.0);
26620         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(1, 2), calibrator.getEstimatedMyz(),
26621                 0.0);
26622         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(2, 0), calibrator.getEstimatedMzx(),
26623                 0.0);
26624         assertEquals(mg.getElementAt(2, 1), calibrator.getEstimatedMzy(),
26625                 0.0);
26626 
26627         assertEquals(gg, calibrator.getEstimatedGg());
26628 
26629         if (checkCovariance) {
26630             assertCovariance(calibrator);
26631         }
26632     }
26633 
26634     private void assertCovariance(
26635             final PROSACRobustTurntableGyroscopeCalibrator calibrator) {
26636         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
26637 
26638         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXVariance());
26639         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation());
26640         final AngularSpeed stdBx1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed();
26641         assertNotNull(stdBx1);
26642         final AngularSpeed stdBx2 = new AngularSpeed(1.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26643         assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(stdBx2));
26644         assertEquals(stdBx1, stdBx2);
26645 
26646         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYVariance());
26647         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation());
26648         final AngularSpeed stdBy1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed();
26649         assertNotNull(stdBy1);
26650         final AngularSpeed stdBy2 = new AngularSpeed(1.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26651         assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(stdBy2));
26652         assertEquals(stdBy1, stdBy2);
26653 
26654         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZVariance());
26655         assertNotNull(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation());
26656         final AngularSpeed stdBz1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed();
26657         assertNotNull(stdBz1);
26658         final AngularSpeed stdBz2 = new AngularSpeed(1.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26659         assertTrue(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviationAsAngularSpeed(stdBz2));
26660         assertEquals(stdBz1, stdBz2);
26661 
26662         final AngularSpeedTriad std1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation();
26663         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation(), std1.getValueX(), 0.0);
26664         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation(), std1.getValueY(), 0.0);
26665         assertEquals(calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation(), std1.getValueZ(), 0.0);
26666         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, std1.getUnit());
26667         final AngularSpeedTriad std2 = new AngularSpeedTriad();
26668         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviation(std2);
26669 
26670         final double avgStd = (calibrator.getEstimatedBiasXStandardDeviation() +
26671                 calibrator.getEstimatedBiasYStandardDeviation() +
26672                 calibrator.getEstimatedBiasZStandardDeviation()) / 3.0;
26673         assertEquals(avgStd, calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverage(), 0.0);
26674         final AngularSpeed avg1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed();
26675         assertEquals(avgStd, avg1.getValue().doubleValue(), 0.0);
26676         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, avg1.getUnit());
26677         final AngularSpeed avg2 = new AngularSpeed(1.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26678         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationAverageAsAngularSpeed(avg2);
26679         assertEquals(avg1, avg2);
26680 
26681         assertEquals(std1.getNorm(), calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNorm(), ABSOLUTE_ERROR);
26682         final AngularSpeed norm1 = calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed();
26683         assertEquals(std1.getNorm(), norm1.getValue().doubleValue(), ABSOLUTE_ERROR);
26684         assertEquals(AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND, norm1.getUnit());
26685         final AngularSpeed norm2 = new AngularSpeed(1.0, AngularSpeedUnit.RADIANS_PER_SECOND);
26686         calibrator.getEstimatedBiasStandardDeviationNormAsAngularSpeed(norm2);
26687         assertEquals(norm1, norm2);
26688     }
26689 
26690     private void checkCommonAxisAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(
26691             final Matrix covariance) {
26692         assertEquals(covariance.getRows(), 21);
26693         assertEquals(covariance.getColumns(), 21);
26694 
26695         for (int j = 0; j < 21; j++) {
26696             final boolean colIsZero = j == 8 || j == 10 || j == 11;
26697             for (int i = 0; i < 21; i++) {
26698                 final boolean rowIsZero = i == 8 || i == 10 || i == 11;
26699                 if (colIsZero || rowIsZero) {
26700                     assertEquals(covariance.getElementAt(i, j), 0.0, 0.0);
26701                 }
26702             }
26703         }
26704     }
26705 
26706     private void checkGeneralAndGDependantCrossBiasesCovariance(
26707             final Matrix covariance) {
26708         assertEquals(covariance.getRows(), 21);
26709         assertEquals(covariance.getColumns(), 21);
26710 
26711         for (int i = 0; i < 21; i++) {
26712             assertNotEquals(covariance.getElementAt(i, i), 0.0);
26713         }
26714     }
26715 
26716     private void checkCommonAxisCovariance(final Matrix covariance) {
26717         assertEquals(covariance.getRows(), 21);
26718         assertEquals(covariance.getColumns(), 21);
26719 
26720         for (int j = 0; j < 21; j++) {
26721             final boolean colIsZero = j == 8 || j > 9;
26722             for (int i = 0; i < 21; i++) {
26723                 final boolean rowIsZero = i == 8 || i > 9;
26724                 if (colIsZero || rowIsZero) {
26725                     assertEquals(covariance.getElementAt(i, j), 0.0, 0.0);
26726                 }
26727             }
26728         }
26729     }
26730 
26731     private void checkGeneralCovariance(final Matrix covariance) {
26732         assertEquals(covariance.getRows(), 21);
26733         assertEquals(covariance.getColumns(), 21);
26734 
26735         for (int j = 0; j < 21; j++) {
26736             final boolean colIsZero = j > 11;
26737             for (int i = 0; i < 21; i++) {
26738                 final boolean rowIsZero = i > 11;
26739                 if (colIsZero || rowIsZero) {
26740                     assertEquals(covariance.getElementAt(i, j), 0.0, 0.0);
26741                 }
26742             }
26743         }
26744     }
26745 
26746     private Matrix generateBa() {
26747         return Matrix.newFromArray(new double[]{
26748                 900 * MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED,
26749                 -1300 * MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED,
26750                 800 * MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED});
26751     }
26752 
26753     private Matrix generateBg() {
26754         return Matrix.newFromArray(new double[]{
26755                 -9 * DEG_TO_RAD / 3600.0,
26756                 13 * DEG_TO_RAD / 3600.0,
26757                 -8 * DEG_TO_RAD / 3600.0});
26758     }
26759 
26760     private Matrix generateMa() throws WrongSizeException {
26761         final Matrix result = new Matrix(3, 3);
26762         result.fromArray(new double[]{
26763                 500e-6, -300e-6, 200e-6,
26764                 -150e-6, -600e-6, 250e-6,
26765                 -250e-6, 100e-6, 450e-6
26766         }, false);
26767 
26768         return result;
26769     }
26770 
26771     private Matrix generateCommonAxisMg() throws WrongSizeException {
26772         final Matrix result = new Matrix(3, 3);
26773         result.fromArray(new double[]{
26774                 400e-6, -300e-6, 250e-6,
26775                 0.0, -300e-6, -150e-6,
26776                 0.0, 0.0, -350e-6
26777         }, false);
26778 
26779         return result;
26780     }
26781 
26782     private Matrix generateGeneralMg() throws WrongSizeException {
26783         final Matrix result = new Matrix(3, 3);
26784         result.fromArray(new double[]{
26785                 400e-6, -300e-6, 250e-6,
26786                 -300e-6, -300e-6, -150e-6,
26787                 250e-6, -150e-6, -350e-6
26788         }, false);
26789 
26790         return result;
26791     }
26792 
26793     private Matrix generateGg() throws WrongSizeException {
26794         final Matrix result = new Matrix(3, 3);
26795         final double tmp = DEG_TO_RAD / (3600 * 9.80665);
26796         result.fromArray(new double[]{
26797                 0.9 * tmp, -1.1 * tmp, -0.6 * tmp,
26798                 -0.5 * tmp, 1.9 * tmp, -1.6 * tmp,
26799                 0.3 * tmp, 1.1 * tmp, -1.3 * tmp
26800         }, false);
26801 
26802         return result;
26803     }
26804 
26805     private double getAccelNoiseRootPSD() {
26806         return 100.0 * MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED;
26807     }
26808 
26809     private double getGyroNoiseRootPSD() {
26810         return 0.01 * DEG_TO_RAD / 60.0;
26811     }
26812 
26813     private double getTurntableRotationRate() {
26814         final UniformRandomizer randomizer =
26815                 new UniformRandomizer(new Random());
26816         return Math.toRadians(randomizer.nextDouble(
26817                 MIN_ROTATION_RATE_DEGREES_PER_SECOND, MAX_ROTATION_RATE_DEGREES_PER_SECOND));
26818     }
26819 }
